Starting the game as a mercenary and joining the Imperial Guards will give a completely different experience, different quests, different content and points of view than, say, playing the game as a merchant (less buying low and selling high, more scheming and plotting to gain advantages for the guild), a praetor serving a Noble House, or an assassin. The questlines are interwoven, forming a large, overarching story, so playing the game only once will be like witnessing events from a single perspective, which is limited by default. You will have to play the game several times to better understand what’s going on, piece everything together, and see the full effect of the choices you make. The Big Question: Should You Buy The Game? Try before you buy. Even if everything I said sounds exactly like your kind of game, try the demo first. That’s what it’s there for. It gives you access to the first Chapter, consisting of 3 locations and about 30 quests split between mutually exclusive questlines and decisions.

Total War: ATTILA transports you to 395 AD, a period of immense hardship characterized by famine, disease, and conflict, heralding the dawn of the Dark Ages. A formidable new power emerges from the East, poised to challenge Rome with a vast army. This game presents a stark choice: will you forge your own kingdom or strive to preserve the crumbling Roman Empire? The "Scourge of God" approaches, and your world stands on the brink of annihilation.

The game emphasizes **apocalyptic destruction**. You can employ **fire in battle** to devastate settlements and sow terror. The **raze mechanic** allows for the complete obliteration of cities and territories, leaving no trace.

A particularly challenging **legendary start position** is the Western Roman Empire. While you command a substantial territory, internal strife and external invasions create a desperate struggle for survival.

Total War: ATTILA introduces **overhauled game mechanics**. The user interface has been enhanced, and systems governing politics, family, cities, and technology have been refined. You will encounter **authentic period detail**, reflecting the new technologies, weaponry, religions, cultures, and societal shifts of the Dark Ages. The game boasts **outstanding visual fidelity**, presenting a bleak vision of the apocalypse and the decline of civilization. With its grand scale and immersive atmosphere, improved campaign and battle visuals offer enhanced performance, allowing you to witness the end of an era and seize the opportunity to forge your own legend.

In **Expeditions: Rome**, you embody a young Legatus whose life is shattered by his father's murder. Fleeing Rome, you join a military campaign against a Greek revolt, evolving from a fugitive into a formidable leader. As one observer noted, "**The choices you make will echo through the ages, shaping not only your destiny but the very future of Rome.**"

This immersive RPG places you at the helm of a Roman commander, wielding influence across varied regions from Greece to Gaul. You'll confront pivotal decisions: will you govern with an iron fist or a persuasive approach? Will you adhere to tradition or pioneer a new course within the perilous Roman Senate? Each decision affects your legion, your allies, and Rome itself.

**Craft your distinct Legatus** by personalizing appearance, gender, class, and abilities. Participate in strategic, turn-based combat, where a detailed skill system and diverse weaponry dictate your success on the battlefield. Travel with five unique companions, delving into their compelling histories and personalities. Explore a vivid, historically inspired world encompassing North Africa, Greece, Gaul, and Rome, all brought to life through a fully voiced narrative where your decisions carry significant weight.

**Advance your characters** by gaining experience and choosing from a broad spectrum of skills and passive traits, unlocking extensive tactical options. Improve your experience by acquiring, creating, and equipping a wide range of weapons, armor, and tactical gear. Guide your legion through three extensive war campaigns in Greece, North Africa, and Gaul. Enlist legionaries, strengthen your warcamp, seize territories, manage resources, and protect your domains to secure ultimate triumph.

For retro gaming fans seeking a unique challenge, **Time Commando**, released in 1996, offers an exciting adventure. This game throws players into a fight against a time-warping virus that has infected a military supercomputer, putting global technology at risk. To stop this disaster, you'll travel through history, battling dangerous warriors.

Time Commando's journey through different eras includes:

*   **Nine unique worlds:** Explore settings like prehistoric times, Ancient Rome, feudal Japan, the Medieval period, the Conquistador era, the Wild West, and modern warfare.
*   **A varied arsenal:** Use weapons from Katanas and rifles to combat yo-yos and magic spells.
*   **Engaging gameplay:** Experience a mix of combat, puzzles, and a captivating story, all with a distinctive visual style.

Time Commando is a standout title, providing an entertaining and challenging experience for serious game collectors.

**Note:** This game requires DosBox to run. The European release features an introduction without voice-over. Starting on easy mode is recommended for a smoother experience.

Name: Rome: Total War™ - Alexander
Description:
Rome: Total War - Alexander is the second official expansion pack to Rome: Total War. An entirely new campaign map that stretches from Macedonia to Greece and into the heart of the ancient Persian Empire New campaign game that tasks players with matching the exploits of Alexander the Great as he swept across Central Asia and dominated the Persian Empire Four new factions including the Macedonians, Persians and Indians Over 25 new units, including Alexander's own renowned historical troops Historical Alexander the Great campaign with six new historical battles that unlock sequentially, telling the story of Alexander and providing a historical backdrop to each of the battles All-new movies to support the Alexander campaign, with professional voiceovers by actor Brian Blessed (Alexander, Star Wars Episode I: The Phantom Menace)

**Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition: A Grand Strategy Journey Through the Roman Republic**

Dive into the heart of ancient history with Europa Universalis: Rome - Gold Edition, a comprehensive package that merges the acclaimed grand strategy game Europa Universalis: Rome with its substantial expansion, Vae Victis. This title invites you to experience a pivotal era of world history, meticulously crafted by masters of the genre. Immerse yourself in the grandeur of the greatest cultural and military civilizations, brought to life with remarkable strategic and tactical depth.

Set during the flourishing Roman Republic, a time when the Senate held sway over the vast empire, Vae Victis introduces a wealth of additions and enhancements to Europa Universalis: Rome. This expansion significantly enriches a game already renowned for its expansive portrayal of the era. A primary focus of Vae Victis is the overhaul of the game's government systems, designed to foster more fluid and balanced gameplay. The historical figures of the ancient world have also undergone a significant transformation, with improvements across various aspects. Furthermore, the addition of new missions, decisions, and laws ensures that Vae Victis is brimming with fresh content.

As noted by Paradox Development Studio, the creators of the game, "Vae Victis is an expansion packed with a huge amount of new content." This sentiment is echoed in the game's features.

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive 3D Map:** Explore a fully 3D map with integrated graphics and detailed topography, offering a visually rich representation of the ancient world.
*   **Flexible Starting Dates:** Begin your campaign at any point between 280 B.C. and 27 B.C., allowing for diverse historical playthroughs.
*   **Vast Civilizations and Factions:** Choose from 10 distinct cultures, including Roman, Celtic, Greek, and Egyptian, with over 53 playable factions spread across hundreds of provinces.
*   **Dynamic Character Development:** Witness your characters evolve new traits through political intrigue and interactions with thousands of other individuals.
*   **Strategic Gameplay:** Engage in trade, diplomacy, and warfare with neighboring powers, and advance your technologies to achieve dominance over the Mediterranean World.
*   **Robust Multiplayer:** Challenge up to 32 players in competitive or cooperative multiplayer modes.

**New Key Features in Vae Victis:**

*   **Advanced Military AI:** Experience a completely revised military AI, particularly in the execution of military campaigns, leading to more challenging and realistic battles.
*   **Living Characters:** The characters within the Republic will truly come to life, possessing their own personal goals and agendas. As one developer stated, "The dynamics of the characters that live in the Republic will come to life as the men and women have their own personal goals and agendas."
*   **Senate Influence:** As a republic, you will now need to actively consider the Senate's influence. Characters will align with various parties based on their objectives, values, and ambitions.
*   **Monarchy and Tribal Courts:** Monarchies and Tribes will feature their own distinct courts. Be wary of ambitious individuals, as "bootlickers and sycophants who will stop at nothing to replace your divinely appointed ruler."

**Don Bradman Cricket 17: A New Era of Cricket Simulation**

**Don Bradman Cricket 17** revolutionizes the cricket gaming experience with its **advanced control system**, offering unparalleled **depth and accuracy** in batting, bowling, and fielding. Players can now **"bat like a pro"** with an expanded repertoire of shots, including the **helicopter, reverse sweep, and scoop**, providing a wider array of **offensive strategies**.

The bowling mechanics have been significantly refined, enabling players to **"stump their opponent"** through **strategic variations**. This includes the ability to seamlessly blend **fast deliveries**, such as leg-cutters and off-cutters, with **spin options** like the doosra and googly. Enhancing the immersive gameplay is a new **'reflex catching' mechanism** within the fielding system, alongside realistic slides, boundary tap-backs, and relay throws.

A **more comprehensive career mode** allows players to forge their own path, whether starting as an **experienced professional** or a **rookie** in club cricket. Notably, **Don Bradman Cricket 17** is the **first in the series** to feature **motion-captured first-class cricketers**, including **female players**, integrated across all game modes.

The game also introduces a **"world-first stadium and logo creator,"** empowering players to **design and share their unique creations**. Furthermore, the **community-driven aspect** is amplified by the ability to download and play with **thousands of user-generated players, teams, umpires, stadiums, and logos**.

*An internet connection is required for the initial game launch. Disconnection is possible once the main menu is reached.*

Name: Cricket Captain 2014
Description:
Cricket Captain is back for the 2014 season, with a beautiful new interface, updated 3D graphics engine, and all the attention to detail that you expect from the series. Cricket Captain has been hailed as the best cricket management simulation every created, and with one of the most exciting cricket seasons for a decade in prospect, it’s about time you took control. Game-play options & features: New Interface: beautifully designed to enhance your playing experience. Improved Highlights: adding atmosphere and excitement. New Stadiums: new stadiums will be added shortly after release. Classic England vs. India scenarios: play one of the classic test series between these nations. Cup Modes: World Cup, Twenty Over Cup and Champions Cup modes. Domestic and International Modes: Captain domestic teams from the English, Australian and Indian leagues, an international team, or both. International and 'All-Time Greats' Series: Play international series with current or all-time-great players. On-Line Play: updated and improved on-line engine. Play domestic and international matches over the internet, including improved detection of edited teams. Match Engine: further refinements to the game engine, giving greater realism in all match-types. Choose the Teams You Want to Captain: twenty over, one-day, first-class (or all three) for domestic and international competitions. Complete statistical update. Statistics: Player statistics for all domestic competitions. Database: Complete player database of over 4000 players, containing every current first-class or limited-over player from around the world. Records: Updated partnership and team records for first-class, one-day and twenty-over matches. Squads: Up-to date county, state and domestic twenty over squads for the new season. Fixtures: Comprehensive domestic and international fixture lists, including updated competition formats and rules.

**Cricket Captain 2016: The Ultimate Cricket Management Experience**

The highly acclaimed cricket management game is back with the release of **Cricket Captain 2016**. This installment offers cricket enthusiasts worldwide an unparalleled opportunity to showcase their strategic prowess. Developed in collaboration with Chris Rogers, captain of Somerset County Cricket Club and a former Australian opener, Cricket Captain 2016 boasts an expanded roster of playable teams and an array of exciting new features.

Widely recognized as the premier cricket management simulation, Cricket Captain 2016 elevates the gameplay to new heights. It introduces **new teams**, a **stunningly redesigned interface**, an **updated 3D graphics engine**, and the meticulous attention to detail that fans have come to expect from the series.

**Key features for 2016 include:**

*   **Extensive Playable Teams:** Engage with **79 playable domestic teams** spanning **5 domestic leagues**. This includes the addition of **12 new teams** from the New Zealand and South African domestic cricket leagues.
*   **World Cup Tournament Modes:** Experience updated **One Day International (ODI)** and **20-over (T20) World Cup Tournament modes**. You can now play as any international team that participated in the last two World Cups, including nations like Afghanistan, Hong Kong, Ireland, Netherlands, Oman, Scotland, and the UAE.
*   **New Match Features:** Enjoy the thrill of **Day/Night matches** enhanced by a **new 3D lighting system**.
*   **Improved Match Engine:** Benefit from an **improved One Day and T20 match engine**, coupled with **enhanced player form calculation** for these formats.
*   **Updated Visuals:** Features **updated kits for International teams**.
*   **Historical Scenarios:** Dive into **Sri Lanka and Pakistan historical scenarios**.
*   **Enhanced Database:** A **new database** offers **improved player ability ratings**.
*   **User-Friendly Interface:** Navigate the game with a **new and improved interface**.
*   **In-Game Support:** Access an **In-Game Help System** for assistance.
*   **Achievements:** Track your progress with **new Achievements**.

Name: VR Batting
Description:
'VR Batting' is a virtual reality cricket simulator made for the HTC Vive. Pickup the bat, take guard and play! From smashing the ball out of the park to playing textbook cover drives, play real cricket shots all over the ground in a virtual cricket field. Features: - 360 degree freedom of stroke-play. - Face deliveries of up to 100 miles per hour and challenge your reflexes. - Variations in deliveries: Medium-Fast, Fast, Conventional Swing, Reverse Spin and Spin. - Shred the ball past the fielders and battle against their AI to score runs. - Two game modes: 5 Overs Mode and Survival Mode. - Bat right handed or left handed. - Leaderboards for highest score, survival mode and six distance, to compete against players from around the world. - Immersive look and feel enhanced with haptic and audio feedback. Upcoming features: - Game achievements - Different fielding settings

Name: Cricket 19
Description:
Earn World Glory At The Pinnacle Of Cricket! Lead your team to international glory with Cricket 19. The truly global cricket simulation from Big Ant Studios, the leading name in authentic, realistic cricket action, Cricket 19 allows you to take control of your team, from club through national level, and lead them to T20, ODI, or Test Match glory. Create your own club, stadia, sponsor logos and uniforms via Big Ant’s acclaimed Cricket Academy to recreate your local matches and dramas! Build a rookie player’s career from their junior years at club cricket. Perform well and before you know it, you’ll be leading your nation on to the field. Key features include: Deep player, stadia, logo and scenario creator. Full support for all formats of cricket - T20, ODI and Test Match. Real world AI and tactics. Dozens of teams to choose between.

**Cricket Captain 2017: The Ultimate Cricket Management Simulation**

**Cricket Captain 2017** delivers an **unrivaled cricket management simulation**, boasting significant enhancements over previous versions. A **key highlight** is the series' **most extensive domestic team expansion ever**, featuring **130 playable domestic teams** across eight countries. This **massive expansion**, developed with input from cricket legend **Jimmy Anderson**, introduces **new twenty-over leagues** in the West Indies, South Africa, Pakistan, and Bangladesh. Players can now **fully immerse themselves** in the domestic leagues of the West Indies and Pakistan, offering **exceptional depth** for simulation enthusiasts. Gaming publications have lauded the game's **expanded statistics**, which include **comprehensive ground and international versus records**, alongside an **updated interface** and a **more refined match engine**.

The game introduces **three entirely new domestic systems**, granting players **enhanced managerial control**. You can now **compete in all major global 20-over leagues**, encompassing India, England, Australia, the West Indies, Pakistan, South Africa, Bangladesh, and New Zealand. Cricket Captain 2017 provides access to **detailed individual, team, and partnership records** for over 130 grounds and all ten Test-playing nations across various formats. Four new, **meticulously modelled grounds**—Cardiff, Taunton, Bristol, and Hobart—have been added, with existing grounds also receiving **updated models**. **Historical scenarios** allow players to relive iconic cricketing moments from England vs. South Africa and England vs. West Indies matches. Early access reviews from outlets like PC Gamer highlighted a **revamped database** that improves player ability and player type accuracy for **more realistic gameplay**.

The **expanded domestic play offers deep immersion**. In Pakistan, players can manage one of **16 domestic teams** and **6 franchise 20-over sides**. The West Indies features **12 playable teams** across both domestic and franchise systems. Bangladesh includes **8 playable 20-over teams**, and a **new 20-over league debuts** in South Africa. The **updated season and interface** provide a refreshed look for the 2017 edition, including an updated English domestic season with 8 teams in Division 1, reflecting Durham's points deductions. Tournament modes have been updated, featuring the **prestigious 2017 Champions Trophy**. **New achievements** are also available to unlock, further enhancing the simulation's **replayability**.

Name: JUST BAT (VR CRICKET)
Description:
JUST BAT is a revolutionary new VR CRICKET game that allows you to master the art of batting. An innovative new control system allows unrivalled control of shots in any style and direction. Set high scores and compete with others around the world. Features Include: - Spin and Fast Bowling - Ball Speed Control - Ball Line and Length Control - Helmet View - Feedback on Bat-Ball Collision Position - Force Feedback - Two Game Modes: 5 Over Challenge and Free Play - A Global Leader Board for the 5 Over Challenge - AI Fielders - Pick Gaps and Score Runs - Bowler Animation - Full Freedom with Shot Selection - Separate Field Settings and Bowling Configurations for Left and Right Hand Batsmen

Cricket Captain 2021 puts you in charge of a dynamic cricket season, emphasizing **strategic management** and introducing **exciting new competitions**. This year's game features the **inaugural Test Match Championship** and a **new ODI World Championship**, providing a path for teams to qualify for the 2023 World Cup. Reflecting the sport's evolution, the game also debuts the **100 Ball competition**, a fast-paced, strategic short-format game. You can guide your chosen team through these and many other thrilling tournaments and formats.

Significant improvements have been made to the 20 Over match simulation in Cricket Captain 2021. A **rebalanced match engine** and an updated **batting aggression bar** offer finer control over scoring. Realism is boosted with more outfield catches when batsmen play aggressively. The old target Run Per Over (RPO) indicator is now an **estimated RPO (E.RPO) system**, which includes bowler tactics for more accurate scoring predictions. In 20 Over matches, **dot ball percentage** replaces maidens, giving a clearer view of bowler performance. The exciting **Super Over**, a one-over tie-breaker, also makes its debut.

The English domestic system is fully updated with the latest competition rules and overseas player regulations. The South African domestic system has also been revitalized, adding **15 new teams**. Cricket Captain 2021 includes a comprehensive database update with new statistics for the **fastest 50s and 100s** across various records, offering chances to break historical benchmarks. The game continues to advance cricket management simulation with many options for achieving championship success.

**Ashes Cricket: Experience the Iconic Rivalry**

**Ashes Cricket** is the officially licensed video game that puts you right into the heart of cricket's most famous contest. This game captures the **excitement, powerful hitting, and strategic depth** that define this legendary competition. You'll experience the Ashes with incredible realism, feeling like you're part of the action. Lead your team to glory in the **2017/2018 men's and women's Ashes tours**.

Using Big Ant's advanced **photogrammetry technology**, Ashes Cricket features **realistic player models** for all the Australian and English men's and women's teams. This technology creates an immersive experience, making you feel like you're at the actual matches. As one developer mentioned, "Key Test players have been **fully motion-captured** for authentic on-field movements." Players can also customize their play by choosing their preferred **batting or bowling style**. Big Ant's most advanced cricket engine yet offers **true 360-degree batting**, ensuring a unique experience for every player.

This game is the most **complete and true-to-life cricket simulation** available, packed with features:

*   **Deep Career Mode:** Begin as a rookie, hone your skills in local matches, and climb to the international level, or jump straight in as a star player.
*   **Extensive Customization:** The **Cricket Academy** lets you create your own players, teams, and even umpires. You can then share your creations with players worldwide.
*   **Real Stadiums:** Play in all the **official stadiums** that hosted the 2017/18 Ashes tour.
*   **Create Your Own Tournaments:** Design your own **stadiums and logos** to make your gaming experience truly your own.
*   **Online Competition:** Compete against players globally in what is considered the **most challenging online cricket game** available.

Cricket Revolution offers a **premier PC cricket sports simulation** that places you directly into the heart of the action. This game stands out with its **innovative gameplay mechanics**, a **wide array of engaging modes**, and **intelligent AI opponents** that present a substantial challenge. Get ready for **intense online competitions** as you aim to climb the global leaderboards.

Key features of Cricket Revolution include:

*   **Authentic Batting Experience:** Experience **precise shot control** with intuitive controls. Player attributes, unique abilities, and lifelike animations combine for a truly satisfying batting feel. As one developer stated, "Our goal was for players to feel complete command over every single shot they played."
*   **Award Recognition:** The game meticulously records your significant achievements. **Exceptional performances**, high scores, hat-tricks, and extended winning streaks are all recognized with **prestigious awards**.
*   **Comprehensive Statistics:** Every run scored, wicket taken, and century achieved is logged. Access historical scores, your complete batting record, detailed averages, and wicket tallies to **strategically improve your standing** on the leaderboards.
*   **Advanced Bowling Mastery:** A **revolutionary bowling system** gives bowlers fine-tuned control over speed, spin, swing, seam movement, and specialized deliveries. This allows bowlers to employ **strategic approaches** and outsmart their opponents.
*   **Worldwide Competition:** Compete with players globally on the **online leaderboards**. The game features a **vibrant online community**, including integrated chat, friend lists, organized tournaments, and **detailed ranking systems**.

Name: OMORI
Description:
Explore a strange world full of colorful friends and foes. Navigate through the vibrant and the mundane in order to uncover a forgotten past. When the time comes, the path you’ve chosen will determine your fate... and perhaps the fate of others as well.

Rakuen is a poignant adventure game where players guide a young boy confined to a hospital. His deepest wish is to visit the magical world from his beloved storybook and seek a favor from the Guardian of the Forest. To make this dream a reality, the Boy must aid his fellow patients by interacting with their fantasy counterparts and conquering various challenges.

These challenges include helping:

*   A grumpy old man who guards a broken music box and laments his solitude.
*   A young woman in a coma, whose devoted husband remains faithfully by her side.
*   A young girl grieving a friend she couldn't bid farewell to before her illness.

As the Boy delves deeper, he realizes that his neighbors' struggles and untold stories are intricately linked to the enigmatic hospital. As noted by a reviewer for *GameSpot*, Rakuen "explores themes of loss, memory, and the power of connection in a truly unique way."

**Key Features:**

*   **Heartfelt Narrative:** Immerse yourself in a compelling story featuring memorable characters.
*   **Unique Gameplay:** This non-violent adventure combines charming dungeon exploration, intricate escape room puzzles, and narrative-driven mysteries.
*   **Empathy and Resolution:** Step into the shoes of each character to understand their unresolved issues and help them find peace.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** Experience an original score with multiple vocal tracks, each tied to a character's personal journey.
*   **Building Connections:** Collect items and forge relationships to cultivate a more positive hospital atmosphere.
*   **Whimsical Quests:** Undertake imaginative quests alongside fantastical beings in the dreamlike realm.

Name: Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass
Description:
Jimmy and the Pulsating Mass is a Japanese-style RPG made by a guy from Texas. It was very much influenced by SNES-era jRPGs, particularly Earthbound , Final Fantasy 5 , and the Breath of Fire series, among others. It was also heavily influenced by Yume Nikki . The game takes place in the dream of an eight-year-old boy. When an alien entity appears and threatens his family and the stability of the dream world itself, Jimmy sets out on an adventure to save his family and eradicate the threat of the Pulsating Mass. Along the way, Jimmy will have to work with his family, confront his own shortcomings, and brave the creeping nightmares of his subconscious. Features: -Full-length Japanese-style RPG. -Classic turn-based combat with some modern sensibilities. -A big emphasis on exploration. -As an empathetic kid, Jimmy gains the ability to imagine himself as several of the monsters he meets, allowing him to interact with the world in new ways. -These different transformations can also be leveled up, granting Jimmy higher stats and new abilities. -A story for adults delivered from the perspective of a child. -Jokes. -Unspeakable horrors. Note: for some versions of Mac, the game may not be able to save if you've placed the game in the root '/Applications' folder. Instead, put it somewhere in your home folder, such as '~/Documents.'​​

**Reliving Life's Dreams: A Journey to the Moon**

In a remarkable service, Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts provide a profound opportunity: the chance to experience your entire life from its very beginning, all within the confines of your own mind. This unique procedure is designed for individuals on their deathbeds, offering them a final chance to realize lifelong dreams that remained unfulfilled. The life they construct becomes their ultimate memory, creating a deeply personal and meaningful conclusion.

This narrative centers on the doctors as they assist an elderly man named Johnny in fulfilling his most cherished dying wish. Their journey takes them through his past in reverse, uncovering scattered fragments of his life and gradually revealing the motivations behind his ultimate desire. Johnny's poignant wish is to **go to the moon**.

"To the Moon" is celebrated as a story-driven adventure that places a strong emphasis on emotional resonance and thoughtful exploration, rather than combat. It artfully combines adventure game mechanics with the classic aesthetics of RPGs, resulting in a distinctive gameplay experience. The critically acclaimed original soundtrack further elevates the emotional journey, and the entire experience is expertly crafted with a singular focus on narrative impact, ensuring no element detracts from the core story.

**Finding Paradise: A Second Chance at Life**

In a remarkable profession, Dr. Rosalene and Dr. Watts offer individuals a unique opportunity: a second chance to relive their lives from the very beginning. This profound experience, however, unfolds entirely within the patient's mind. Due to the intense nature of the procedure, the newly constructed life becomes the final memory before the patient passes away. Therefore, this operation is reserved for those on their deathbeds, designed to fulfill lifelong wishes that remained unrealized.

**Finding Paradise**, the second full episode in the beloved **To the Moon** series, focuses on the doctors' latest patient, Colin. As Rosalene and Watts explore his memories, they must piece together a life that seems sharply divided. Their central challenge is to fulfill a wish that, at first glance, appears to be fundamentally contradictory. Importantly, like its predecessor **To the Moon**, **Finding Paradise** is a **standalone full game**. This means you can experience Colin's story without needing to have played any previous titles in the series.

Impostor Factory is a unique narrative adventure game that takes players on a wild ride. The game centers on Quincy, who receives an invitation to a lavish party at a secluded mansion. Despite the suspicious nature of the location, Quincy attends, drawn by the allure of the fancy event.

Inside the mansion, Quincy discovers a surprising amenity: a time machine in the bathroom. This allows for a rather efficient way to multitask, combining personal hygiene with temporal displacement. However, the party takes a dark turn as people begin to die. The situation escalates, introducing Lovecraftian elements and tentacles into the mix. This bizarre turn of events covers about a third of the game's overall plot.

The game features a story designed to provoke strong reactions from players. It blends adventure game mechanics with classic RPG visuals, creating a distinctive atmosphere. The dialogue is crafted to be unsettling yet strangely fitting. Impostor Factory is presented as a tightly paced experience, free of unnecessary content or time-wasting elements.

Regarding its connection to other games, Impostor Factory can be enjoyed as a standalone experience. It is not strictly a sequel to *To the Moon* or *Finding Paradise*, though its exact relationship to those titles is left ambiguous, potentially being a sequel, prequel, or both. Regardless, no prior knowledge of other games is required to play Impostor Factory.

**OneShot: A Unique Puzzle Adventure with a Meta Twist**

Discover *OneShot*, a captivating puzzle adventure game that offers a truly unique experience. Available at www.oneshot-game.com, you'll guide a child through an enigmatic world on a monumental mission: to reignite its long-extinguished sun. This quest is far from straightforward, as the world is aware of your presence, and your actions have tangible consequences. The very possibility of saving this dying realm hangs precariously in the balance, a constant reminder that you only have **one shot**.

*OneShot* distinguishes itself with innovative gameplay mechanics that extend beyond the confines of the game window, creating a deeply immersive experience. This is complemented by a haunting original soundtrack and distinctive artwork that perfectly captures the game's atmosphere. A profound and unique relationship develops between the game and its player, fostering a persistent sense that the complete narrative unfolds only for those who delve deeper and seek out hidden clues.

**Content Warning:** While *OneShot* does not fall into the horror genre conventionally, certain elements within the game may evoke feelings of paranoia. Players are advised to proceed with caution.

**Regarding Closing the Game Window:** It is entirely safe to close the game window. This action serves solely to save your progress.

Name: The Chronicles of Nyanya
Description:
Thrilling like a payday, a story of cats in funny costumes that do RPGish things. It is full of many unexpected and incredible twists, the tragedies of an individual lured into the trap of an adventourist internship, and friendly pastry, which is very sensitive to nihilism. The game also contains many thrilling conversations, walking around the map with some logical puzzles sprinkled in here and there – but don’t worry, even a liberal arts student should be able to solve them – raising pastry, and deliberations about important moral and existential issues, the majority of which will affect the ending you get. The ending will sum up the fates of the most important characters, in-game achievements, your proficiency in fighting the ultimate bad guy, your finesse in raising pastry and the degree of faith in friendship. This results in dozens of possible ending combinations. After completing the game, you can try NewGame+ to unlock additional, normally unavailable skills for the main character. The world of Nyanya Nyanya is an enormous cat world that can take up to 20 hours to fully explore. The main plotline itself is good for more than 8 hours of fun, but the game also includes many side quests found on numerous maps, hundreds of interactions with NPCs and over a thousand descriptions of nearly everything. You can also find dozens of exciting items such as the legendary Excalipurr and the frightening Berserker Catnip. The role of the majority of animals is played by various kinds of rolls, which, together with cats, pidgins, and sneks, constitute the entirety of Nyanya’s fauna. Kibble is found in mines and on can triis, almost all buildings are boxes (because cardboard boxes are cats’ natural habitat) and cleaning fur is a matter of importance to the state. The sense and logic of this world are therefore highly debatable... But don’t worry about its coherence. We made sure that it is top-notch. All this mess is watched over by cat gods, such as the mysterious Great Bowl of Goodness – a giant stone leg, whose calf disappears in the clouds, Meowrida the Brave – goddess of shooting, and Overcat – the creator of everything that's feline. The game is produced in a retro jRPG style. Party The protagonist of the game is Catair, a meowsassin, who is as optimistic and sweet as sandpaper. When she sets out on her amazing journey, she has the chance to discover friendship, love, and revenge and to travel through many wonderful lands that she does not want to visit... And yet, she has no choice. She will join the party led by the veteran of the war in Furajevo – Francat the clericat. Their adventourist paths will cross with Purrgli, a yes-cat and an outstanding purrior, Catniss – a fighter for friendship and even more friendship, as well as meowmage Meowdledore, whose parents bought him gifts instead of giving him some attention. You can meet them here . Combat The game features tons of epic turn-based jRPG fights, where you will have an opportunity to use dozens of such unique cat techniques as Boot to the Head, Slipper Comet or a Hairball of Darkness. The characters represent traditional classes such as meowsassin, meowmage and purrior. With their powers combined, they are able to face adversities such as student internships and unpaid overtime. Among the dozens of opponents, you will find monstrosities such as orcats, aggressive cat fetuses enchanted in slime, or Purrevar, Prince of the Underpurr. What is more, The Chronicles of Nyanya is probably the only game in which you can charge Nazi furniture on your rollicorn or fight their mysterious Wundermöbelwaffe. Parody and pop culture The game is filled with familiar-sounding places and names. If you love comic books, memes or just pop culture in general, you will feel right at home in Nyanya. You will meet Cateris, talk with Granny Weathercat, Furry Catter and Nyoda and listen to the moving stories of Catmerian guards, who always wanted to be adventourists like you, but they took an arrow to their knees. In other games, references are Easter eggs, in Nyanya they are the main course. Creators The game was created by hamstercube studio, made up of Ilona, author of chatolandia and Adrian. The graphics were created mainly by Revv, known from her Tak bardzo źle blog; Ilona also had something to do with it. The moving music, which tickles your aesthetic sense was composed by Marcin Maślanka, an experienced composer of soundtracks for games and films.

**Echoes of Aetheria: An Epic RPG Adventure**

Prepare for an unforgettable journey with *Echoes of Aetheria*, the latest role-playing game epic from the acclaimed creators of *Skyborn*. This game begins with a classic, yet compelling, premise: a wedding ceremony abruptly interrupted, and the bride spirited away. Your heroes embark on a pursuit, their individual motivations soon converging as their seemingly simple quest to rescue the bride escalates into a grand saga filled with war, love, and profound betrayal.

As you navigate this rich narrative, you will find yourself entangled in a web of treason, defection, and rebellion. You will even play a pivotal role in the very creation of a new nation. The scope of the story expands dynamically with your heroes' progression, culminating in a grand finale where your decisions and their far-reaching consequences will determine the fate of entire nations.

**Key Features:**

*   **Characters Drive the Narrative:** *Echoes of Aetheria* transcends a mere story; it is a deeply personal tale centered on its characters. Each individual is meticulously crafted with distinct dreams, aspirations, motivations, and imperfections. These characters inhabit a world brimming with its own unique legends, intricate intrigue, and compelling drama. This rich tapestry sets the stage for a narrative that evolves from a lighthearted adventure into an epic campaign of unprecedented scale and ambition.

*   **A Welcoming Home Base:** Throughout your travels, you will always have a dedicated home base to return to. This sanctuary is far more than just a place to rest; it serves as the central hub around which the story's events revolve. Here, you can engage in commerce, hone your crafting skills, and converse with your party members to advance plot elements. Additionally, you can test your mettle in the Battle Arena, facing combat challenges for valuable loot and experience points.

*   **Exploration Yields Rich Rewards:** Discovering hidden loot through exploration is just one of the many benefits; you will also gain valuable experience from these concealed caches. Dedicate time to thoroughly explore the world, and you will be amply rewarded for your efforts.

*   **Master the Art of Crafting:** With thousands of items available to craft, salvage, or augment, the crafting system in *Echoes of Aetheria* is remarkably comprehensive. This integrated system allows you to create, purchase, or sell the necessary materials. Those who delve deeply into its intricacies will find themselves significantly rewarded in combat.

*   **Strategic Encounters, Not Randomness:** Enemies in *Echoes of Aetheria* possess their own distinct map artificial intelligence. Will you opt for a direct, forceful approach to overcome encounters, or will you employ stealth to conserve your resources? You can strategically position yourself behind an enemy to gain the crucial advantage of surprise. However, be vigilant, as your adversaries are equally capable of ambushing you.

*   **An Innovative Battle System:** Are you weary of JRPGs that cling to outdated mechanics? *Echoes of Aetheria* introduces a novel 15-tile combat system that utilizes both sides of the battlefield. The positioning and formations of your characters are as critical to success as the skills and spells you deploy.

*   **A Sweeping Orchestral Score:** Immerse yourself in the game's epic soundtrack, meticulously composed to enhance every moment of your adventure.

**Actual Sunlight: An Indie Game Exploring Life's Hard Truths**

**Actual Sunlight** is a highly-praised indie game that dives deep into the **profound loneliness and depression** of its main character, Evan Winter. The game asks a tough question: "Why keep going when life feels stuck?" This text-based adventure is known for its **sharp, dark humor** and honest look at the human experience. It tells a moving story that starts with a bang and ends with a powerful punch, offering a **challenging, haunting, and beautiful** game.

The game tackles **video game addiction, unsatisfying jobs, and deep loneliness**. Its **striking art**, a mix of pixel and CG styles, brings Toronto, Canada, to life. This visual style works with a **moody soundtrack** that perfectly matches the game's tone and the **harsh indifference** of real life. Creator Will O'Neill says, "**Actual Sunlight is about finding meaning in a world that often feels meaningless.**" The game uses **explicit language** and deals with **mature themes** like depression and suicidal thoughts, so it's **not for players under 18**. Like other art that explores difficult topics, **Actual Sunlight** can be a very emotional and thought-provoking experience. Follow creator Will O'Neill on Twitter for updates.

Football Manager 2019 (FM19) puts you in charge of a football club. You guide its future with smart choices. While players act on the field, your tactics are key to their wins. FM19 offers a deep management game with new features and improvements. These give you fresh, real ways to lead your team. This creates an exciting story as your club grows.

FM19 features a **new tactics system**. This lets you create unique team plans that match today's football. The system includes new tactics and game phases, reflecting modern play. For a quick start, ready-made tactics are available. The **training system is also improved**. You get detailed control over player growth. You can create custom training sessions and plans, like real clubs do. Or, you can let your coaches handle it. A **new manager guide**, led by your Assistant Manager, teaches you the basics of football management. It sets you on a clear path to success.

A big new part of FM19 is the **Bundesliga**. You can manage in Germany's top two leagues for the first time. Both the Bundesliga and 2. Bundesliga are fully licensed. They have official club logos, kits, and real player looks. The game also has a **new look**. Its modern design is seen as the best and easiest to use yet.

FM19 also adds major upgrades to game matches. These include **VAR and goal-line technology**. You'll also get better agent feedback in transfers. Manager roles are more lively. Pre-match talks give more details. These updates, plus general interface tweaks and new Steam achievements, make FM19 a fuller Football Manager game.

Rocket League is a unique sports game that combines fast-paced arcade soccer with exciting car-based action. Its physics-driven gameplay and simple controls create a smooth and engaging experience for millions of players worldwide. The game is easy for beginners to pick up but offers substantial depth for competitive play.

Players can choose from various modes to suit their preferences. **Online matches** are available in both casual and competitive formats. For those who prefer playing offline, **Season Mode** offers a complete campaign. **Extra Modes** introduce unique gameplay twists inspired by sports like hockey and basketball, while **Mutators** let players customize game rules for new challenges.

The game features extensive cosmetic customization, allowing players to create over **500 trillion unique vehicle combinations**. This depth, along with its engaging gameplay, has earned Rocket League more than **150 "Game of the Year" awards and nominations**. With a player base exceeding **57 million**, the game continues to grow through regular updates that introduce new **DLCs, content packs, features, modes, and arenas**.

Recent updates have focused on enhancing the player experience. The **Rocket Pass**, a premium feature, provides a **50% XP bonus** and allows players to unlock up to **70 rewards**, including new Battle-Cars and Goal Explosions. The **Challenge System** lets players earn exclusive Rocket Pass rewards by completing **Weekly Challenges** during Online Matches. Additionally, the **Esports Shop** allows fans to support professional teams by purchasing in-game items like Decals, Wheels, and Player Banners.

Rocket League has also updated its platform support. The game now uses technologies like **DirectX 11** and a **64-bit client**. However, support for **macOS and Linux (SteamOS)** has ended. The final update for these platforms was released on **March 10, 2020**, which disabled online functionalities. Offline modes, such as Local Matches and splitscreen play, remain accessible. Players on SteamOS and macOS might encounter bugs not present in the Windows version, and these issues are not expected to be fixed.

Online multiplayer access is also limited in certain regions due to agreements with the online service provider. Players in **China, Crimea, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, and Syria** cannot access online services. The developers apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. All software and online features are subject to the game's license, terms of use, and privacy policy, available at rocketleague.com/eula, rocketleague.com/tou, and rocketleague.com/privacy.

Name: Football Manager 2020
Description:
Run your football club, your way. Every decision counts in Football Manager 2020 with new features and polished game mechanics rewarding planning and progression like never before, empowering managers to develop and refine both your club’s and your own unique identity. Walk down the tunnel to a living, breathing football world with you at the very heart of it. Around here, your opinion matters! This is a world that rewards planning and knowledge but, unlike other games, there’s no pre-defined ending or script to follow – just endless possibilities and opportunities. Every club has a story to tell and it’s down to you to create it. They say football is a game of dreams. Well, managers are a special breed of dreamers. They don’t see problems, only opportunities: the chance to prove themselves against the best in the world, to develop and instil a new footballing philosophy, to nurture talent through the ranks, to lift the club to greater heights and end the wait for silverware. How you get to the top is up to you… you’ll own your decisions, and the consequences they bring… Base yourself in 50 of the biggest footballing countries worldwide Oversee a new era of success at one of 2,500 clubs at every level Sign the best and mould the future – scout more than 500,000 real players and staff Create your tactical vision and bring it to life on the training pitch Kick every ball with our most immersive and smartest match engine to date DEVELOPMENT CENTRE Take full control of your youth team operations in a new all-encompassing hub. Nurture your young stars from the moment they arrive at your club and through the youth ranks until they’re ready for first-team action. CLUB VISION Develop a culture, work with the board to achieve ongoing objectives and plot a course for your club to progress in seasons to come. Club vision goes far beyond the boardroom; impacting on transfers, playing style and competition expectations as you look to strengthen your club’s identity and meet the multi-year milestones. PLAYING TIME PATHWAY A whole new way to define a player’s standing in your squad. Build in current and future playing time across the length of a contract, defining a clear pathway from Fringe Player to Star Player and everything in between. BACKROOM STAFF New roles, advice and interaction make your staff more involved and important than ever. More collaboration across more areas brings the game closer to the structure of a real-life backroom team. GRAPHIC IMPROVEMENTS Redesigned player and manager models, improved lighting and overhauled pitch visuals combine to create the most realistic and best-looking match experience to date.

The **PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018: FC Barcelona Edition Bundle** is a special package for dedicated fans of both FC Barcelona and the PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER game series. This bundle is designed to **fully immerse players** in the world of their favorite club, offering exclusive in-game content for the popular myClub mode. Konami, the game's developer, highlighted that this edition aims to **strengthen the bond** between players and the renowned FC Barcelona team within the virtual football environment.

Beyond club-specific items, this bundle provides a **significant boost** to players' progress in myClub. It includes exclusive FC Barcelona content, such as a special FCB Agent and an FCB Legend Special Agent. Additionally, players receive a substantial amount of in-game resources. Promotional materials detail this bonus myClub content, which includes **1,000 myClub coins**, four Start Up Agents, one Partner Club Agent, and **10,000 GP awarded weekly for ten weeks**.

PRO EVOLUTION SOCCER 2018 itself boasts numerous improvements. Key gameplay enhancements include a "Gameplay Masterclass" with **better strategic dribbling** and Real Touch+ for improved ball control, alongside updated set pieces. The game's presentation is also greatly enhanced with **new menus and authentic player images**. For competitive play, PES League modes, including myClub, offer new ways to compete, and an **Online Co-op Mode** has been added for teamwork. The popular Random Selection Match mode returns with updated features. The Master League has been significantly upgraded with new pre-season tournaments, a **better transfer system**, and improved presentations. These gameplay and presentation enhancements are supported by **improved visuals**, featuring new lighting effects, updated player models and animations, and detailed facial expressions and body movements, all contributing to a more **realistic football simulation**.

**Pro Evolution Soccer 2019 (PES 2019): Editions, Bonuses, and New Features**

Pro Evolution Soccer 2019 (PES 2019) provides a range of editions, each offering unique bonuses for the myClub mode.

The **Standard Edition** includes a 10-match loan of David Beckham 2018 and Philippe Coutinho. You'll also receive 10 weeks of Premium Agents (delivering 3 players each week) and 3 Player Contracts.

For more substantial rewards, the **David Beckham Edition** offers a permanent David Beckham 2018. This edition also includes a 10-match loan for Philippe Coutinho and extends the Premium Agents and 3 Player Contracts to 20 weeks each.

The **Legend Edition** provides the most comprehensive package. It features a special 3D scanned version of David Beckham from 2018, a PES Legend Player for myClub, a 10-match loan for Philippe Coutinho, and an impressive 30 weeks of Premium Agents (3 players each week) and 3 Player Contracts.

PES 2019 also introduces several exciting new gameplay elements. The game boasts **Authentic Leagues**, featuring a significant number of officially licensed competitions. **Magic Moments** are enhanced with 11 new skill traits, allowing for greater player individuality. Players can execute spectacular goals thanks to improved shooting mechanics and animations. Additionally, **Visible Fatigue** adds a new layer of realism, impacting player stamina during matches.

The **New myClub** mode has been completely redesigned, from how you acquire players to the introduction of special player versions released periodically. **The Beautiful Game** is brought to life with photo-realistic graphics, stunning animation flow, and support for 4K HDR. Finally, **ML Real Season** immerses you in the life of a manager through three major updates: ICC pre-season tournaments, an advanced transfer system, and new league licenses.

Name: Altitude
Description:
Blast your way across the cartoon skies in this fast-paced game of aerial combat. Nimbly Games has crafted an instantly accessible, rewardingly deep, and ravishingly fun multiplayer action game. The sirens have sounded, bogies are coming in hot… Jump into the fast and agile Loopy and drop your enemies from the sky with a tactical EMP blast - but hit your afterburners before your Biplane support tears them to pieces with 20mm cannons blazing! Barrel roll through the enemy minefield and arm your nuke as you enter the drop zone. There it is - the enemy base - but two Mirandas just warped in with lasers hot and an Explodet is lumbering into position over their hangar decks — will you carry your team to victory? Multiplayer Done Right: Altitude combines Call-of-Duty style perks with the gameplay variety of Team Fortress 2 in a fresh multiplayer experience. Carefully refined controls, netcode, and balance make for hundreds of hours of deep, rewarding gameplay. Seven Engaging Game Modes: Plane Ball's constant action makes it a favorite among new and casual players while team-based tactical maneuvers like passing and blocking provide a fun challenge for veterans. Team Base Destruction offers an intense, competitive experience where coordinated pushes and strategic loadout decisions turn the tide. Try a friendly pickup game or join a clan and play in the 'Altitude ProLeague' - a competitive tournament scene run by hardcore gamers from the Starcraft and Counter-Strike communities. For the ultimate test of dogfighting skills try 1-life Deathmatch or compete in Demolition for a more tactical, objective-based experience. Or enjoy classic game modes like Free For All and Team Deathmatch.

Name: NBA 2K19
Description:
TAKE CONTROL WITH TAKEOVER Harness your MyPLAYER’s full basketball potential with the new Takeover feature. Unlock special moves and abilities never before seen on the court, or activate Team Takeover and unleash the power of your full squad. RUN THE NEIGHBORHOOD (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) You won’t want to miss a single day in the updated Neighborhood. Make a name for yourself on the court, at the Under Armour Cages, and during live events on the block. Ball until dawn with new day to night transitions, walk on at the Jordan Rec Center, or get the old Crew back together for exciting 3 on 3 streetball action. MyTEAM (ONLINE SERVICE DISCONTINUED FOR NBA 2K19) Create your very first MyPLAYER card, and ball with LeBron, Kobe, and the rest of your collection in a variety of competitive modes. Introducing the new Unlimited mode, allowing you to pick any five cards from your deck without restrictions and battle against other players online. MyCAREER From neighborhood legend to global phenomenon. The original career story mode returns with an all-new, immersive narrative charting your journey from China to the G League and eventually the NBA. Featuring an all-star cast, endorsements tied to your popularity, and new team chemistry elements that allow you to dominate the hardwood

**Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions: Experience Arcade Football Action**

Captain Tsubasa: Rise of New Champions injects arcade-style excitement into the football gaming genre, offering a departure from traditional simulations with its rapid gameplay and over-the-top, spectacular shots.

This title empowers players to construct their ideal squad by designing custom characters endowed with distinctive abilities. Subsequently, you can forge your ultimate team for both offline and online competitions. Up to four individuals can engage in local versus matches, while online modes provide opportunities to secure trophies and valuable rewards. Immerse yourself in two distinct story modes: one allows for a retrospective journey through the anime's narrative, and the other plunges you directly into the vibrant Captain Tsubasa universe.

## Football Drama: A Unique Football Management Experience

**Football Drama** puts you in the role of Rocco Galliano, a manager given a second chance at Calchester Assembled Football Club. After a seven-year break, you're hired by billionaire president Boris Aluminovitch to bring the team back to glory. The previous manager was fired for poor performance, and now it's your turn to lead.

Your choices are key to the story. Will you inspire your players with fiery sideline speeches, or consult the ancient "Book of Changes"? Your past might also resurface, leading to trouble with corruption, crime, drugs, and romance. Each path has consequences. Simply finishing a season is tough, but remember, **Football Drama** isn't just about winning the championship.

This interactive story lets your decisions shape the game. Your personal life and in-game actions affect the outcome through a karma or chaos system. Matches are turn-based with live animations during a 18-week championship. You could be fired anytime! Your choices and match results influence your card deck, filled with funny cards that poke fun at football's quirks. Each match has a detailed, illustrated log with commentary from a witty main commentator and his sidekick. Every championship is different, leading to multiple endings and high replayability. The game features a great interface by Pino Panzarella, with art by Daniele Giardini ('Demigiant').

The developers were inspired by football's rich literary and film history. They looked to authors like Pasolini and Hornby, and films such as "The Lost World Cup" and Wenders' "The Goalie's Anxiety at the Penalty Kick." Adam Hurrey's "Football Clichés" also fueled their interest in the sport's appeal. They aimed to use gaming for powerful storytelling. **Football Drama** was made by a small, self-funded team of three. They know it's not a blockbuster and priced it accordingly. The Steam version adds more content, achievements, and full-screen art.

**Behold the Kickmen: A Football Simulation Like No Other**

Behold the Kickmen began as a simple joke on Twitter, blossoming into what is arguably the year's least thrilling and most inaccurate football simulation. This game offers a unique perspective on football, as if viewed by someone completely unfamiliar with or uninterested in the actual rules of the sport. Players begin at the lowest rung of the "Big Boring British Football Spreadsheet system" and must endure grueling matches to ascend the ranks. The ultimate goal is to become the greatest football player ever seen and claim the World Cup for your trophy shelf.

The game features core mechanics such as kicking, passing, tackling, squad management, and the repetitive act of scoring goals. A full story mode is also included, filled with exaggerated drama and nonsensical choices.

**Two Ways to Play!**

For those who dislike football, Behold the Kickmen offers an alternative. With a simple switch, the entire game can be re-skinned into a Dystopian Future Bloodsport.

**Important Note:** Behold the Kickmen is strictly a single-player experience. It **does not** feature online or local multiplayer. As the developer stated, "I wanted to make a Single Player game, I didn't want to make a Multiplayer game." Therefore, please do not purchase this game if you are seeking a social gaming experience.

**BattleBlock Theater®: A Feline-Fueled Adventure of Survival and Shenanigans**

Prepare for **BattleBlock Theater®**, a game that throws you into a bizarre predicament: shipwrecked and forced to entertain a horde of insatiable cats. This twisted narrative sees you embarking on a perilous quest to rescue over 300 companions from the clutches of technologically advanced, evil felines. The gameplay experience is as unique as it is engaging, blending treacherous platforming with a darkly humorous story.

You'll navigate a landscape filled with danger, armed with an array of inventive weapon-tools. Hundreds of meticulously designed levels await your conquest, each presenting a new challenge and a piece of the perplexing truth behind this strange theatrical enterprise. For those seeking shared mayhem, BattleBlock Theater® offers robust online multiplayer and local co-op options. You can team up with a friend for the story or dive into competitive arenas. Furthermore, an integrated level editor empowers you to design and share your own devious trials, extending the game's replayability infinitely.

**Key Features of BattleBlock Theater®:**

*   **Co-Optional Gameplay:** Engage in Story mode with up to two players, or join up to four in the chaotic Arena modes. Whether you choose to cooperate or compete, the game supports both online play and couch co-op.
*   **Dynamic Arenas:** BattleBlock Theater® features eight distinct arena modes, each designed to put your skills to the test and perhaps instill a bit of stage fright in your opponents.
*   **Insane Mode Challenge:** For the ultimate test of gaming prowess, tackle the Insane Mode campaign. This mode offers a single life, mirroring the high-stakes nature of a live performance.
*   **Vast Level Selection:** With over 450 levels spread across all game modes, BattleBlock Theater® provides a staggering amount of content to explore.
*   **Rescue Over 300 Prisoners:** Your mission is to liberate your captured friends from the feline captors. Earn gems through deadly plays to secure their freedom.
*   **Theatrical Weaponry and Combat:** Master a variety of actions, including jumping, pushing, pulling, and punching. Employ unconventional methods like exploding, freezing, poisoning, or even digesting foes. Strategically equip and swap between two weapons to overcome obstacles and enemies.
*   **Create and Share Levels:** Utilize the intuitive Level Editor to construct your own challenging levels using over 20 interactive block types. Share your creations with friends and the wider community.

Explore the chaotic arcade-simulation adventure of **Russian Subway Dogs**, a game inspired by the remarkable resilience of stray dogs navigating Moscow's subway. Developed by the creators of They Bleed Pixels, this unique title plunges you into the gritty reality of scavenging for food amidst bustling Russian commuters. Your survival hinges on skillfully evading hazards like volatile vodka bottles, aggressive rival dogs, and the surprisingly formidable Subway Bear.

**Russian Subway Dogs** offers engaging gameplay through distinct modes. **Campaign Mode** features dozens of levels with over 100 unique challenges orchestrated by your demanding boss, The Proletaricat. These missions test your ingenuity, presenting scenarios like protecting a bear on a vegetarian diet or stopping pigeons from cannibalism. Successfully completing these trials leads you to the game's secret final station. For those seeking a competitive edge, **Endless Mode** provides a highly replayable experience. Compete for top spots on online leaderboards, where a dynamic score-driven difficulty algorithm ensures each playthrough is fresh and escalating. This mode is enhanced by random mini-challenges from The Proletaricat and their mischievous Kittens.

The game boasts visually stunning, detailed pixel art that recreates the ornate grandeur of Moscow's world-famous subway stations. Beyond the core gameplay, **Russian Subway Dogs** features a rich tapestry of simulated systems for players to discover and exploit. For instance, players can discover emergent strategies like **Culinary Exploitation**, where consuming tempting but toxic chocolate can yield a significant point boost or sabotage a rival dog's meal. Similarly, **Power-Up Potions** can be utilized; drinking hot sauce unleashes powerful fire barks, or feeding it to a pigeon can gain aerial support in the form of fiery droppings.

You can also play as a diverse cast of unlockable characters, including beloved animals from other indie games and comics. Special guests include Question Hound from KC Green's Gunshow, Fidel from Fidel Dungeon Rescue, Nacho & Rad Shiba from VA-11 HALL-A, Ratcoon from Ruin of the Reckless, Uay Chivo from Guacamelee!, Nidhogg from Nidhogg 2, and Clawed Kitty, inspired by They Bleed Pixels. **Russian Subway Dogs** is designed with simple controls but offers depth for seasoned players. Core mechanics involve running and jumping along subway platforms, barking at commuters to startle them into dropping food, and strategically bouncing vodka bottles. As you progress, you'll uncover advanced tactics, including the ability to cook and consume rival wildlife, often amplified by explosive vodka interactions. Ultimately, the game empowers you to utilize your acquired knowledge and unique abilities to fill your canine stomach and create as much delightful pandemonium as possible.

Complementing the engaging gameplay is an original soundtrack by Peter Chapman (COINS), whose previous work includes acclaimed titles like Guacamelee! and LittleBigPlanet Karting. This soundtrack masterfully blends Slavic sounds and Baltic beats with electronic dance music, creating an immersive auditory experience that perfectly complements the game's chaotic charm. Whether you're a devoted dog person or lean more towards feline companionship, **Russian Subway Dogs** offers an engaging and entertaining experience for all.

## Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin: A Goddess's Journey of Cultivation and Combat

**Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin** plunges players into the role of Sakuna, a spoiled harvest goddess unceremoniously banished from her celestial home to a demon-infested island. This wild new world forces her to confront her destiny as the daughter of a warrior god and a harvest goddess. To survive and thrive, Sakuna must master the elements, battle fearsome monsters, and, most importantly, cultivate rice – the very source of her divine power.

### Companions on Hinoe Island

Accompanying Sakuna on her exile is her loyal guardian, Tama, alongside a band of outcast humans. This unlikely fellowship must work together to tame both the untamed land and the demonic inhabitants of Hinoe Island. Developed by Edelweiss, the indie studio also known for **Astebreed**, **Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin** masterfully blends engaging side-scrolling action with intricate crafting and detailed rice cultivation. The game weaves a compelling narrative about self-discovery and finding one's purpose.

### Refined Side-Scrolling Action

Players will wield farm tools as formidable weapons, chaining together quick, heavy, and special attacks to vanquish demonic beasts. The magical "divine raiment" serves as a crucial tool, enabling Sakuna to grapple onto distant platforms, evade perilous attacks, and overcome formidable adversaries.

### Deep Simulation-Style Gameplay

The game invites players to learn the ancient art of agriculture through meticulously detailed steps, from the initial planting to the final harvest, all in pursuit of cultivating the perfect crop. As a harvest goddess, Sakuna's strength is directly tied to the quality of her rice harvests. Attributes such as aesthetic appeal and flavor directly influence her combat prowess.

### Building a Home in the Wilderness

Sakuna's mortal companions play a vital role in their survival, crafting weapons, armor, and nourishing meals using the materials Sakuna gathers. Completing their individual quests unlocks new opportunities for survival and advancement, further solidifying their home in the wilderness.

### A Unique Take on Japanese Mythology

The game's heroine and her world are inspired by a pantheon of gods and demons drawn from traditional Japanese mythology. **Sakuna: Of Rice and Ruin** offers a fresh perspective on these familiar elements, introducing numerous unique twists. The narrative and the game's world are rich with lovingly rendered details, seamlessly blending well-known mythological concepts with original creations. As one developer noted, "We wanted to create a world that felt both familiar and entirely new, drawing on the depth of Japanese folklore while forging our own path."

**Chicken Police - Paint it RED!** is a **narrative-driven noir adventure** that plunges players into a world of mystery and intricate detective work. This **cinematic experience** features a **thrilling, rich storyline** steeped in classic film-noir style, offering a truly unique gaming journey. The game boasts **professional voiceover** with **over 8 hours of spoken dialogue**, bringing to life a **carefully crafted, unique, and 'colorful' world** inhabited by **30 fully voiced characters**. Players will uncover **numerous clues, pieces of information, and collectibles** while enjoying a **beautiful original soundtrack**. The story kicks off with a mysterious Dame, a peculiar case, and the wildest cops in the Wilderness.

At its core, the game follows **Sonny Featherland and Marty MacChicken**, once celebrated as the Chicken Police. However, nearly a decade has passed, and their prime has waned. Sonny is now a **semi-alcoholic wreck on paid leave**, while Marty desperately clings to his former detective glory. Their last case nearly fractured their partnership, and they haven't spoken since. Now, Sonny and Marty are **forced to collaborate** on a case that is **stranger and more chaotic** than anything they've encountered before.

**Chicken Police** is a **story-rich, dialogue-heavy adventure** that expertly blends visual novel and classic adventure game elements. You'll interact with **over 30 characters**, some requiring intense interrogation. Gather a **wealth of clues, evidence, and highly sensitive personal information** from Clawville's shady residents, which can be used strategically. Explore **over 30 distinct locations** in Clawville, many of which evolve as the story progresses. You can **revisit earlier locations** to uncover hidden secrets, meet new characters, or gather vital information.

The game features a **strikingly unique visual style**, utilizing real photographs and photo-realistic 3D backgrounds, heavily inspired by classic film-noir movies and games like *Grim Fandango* and *L.A. Noire*. Additional inspiration is drawn from animated features like *Porco Rosso* and *BoJack Horseman*. The pervasive noir atmosphere is amplified by an **original musical score** and **professional voice acting** from the studio behind voices in *The Wolf Among Us* and *Horizon Zero Dawn*. The game is **fully voice-acted**, with over 8 hours of dialogue.

Clawville, once envisioned as a harmonious sanctuary, has devolved into the **darkest corner of the Wilderness**. **Chicken Police** serves as a **satire**, capturing the mood of 1940s film-noir. It is **gritty and bleak**, yet infused with a significant amount of **cynical humor**.

**Expert Opinions:**

*   **FORBES** noted, "It's also clear from the trailer that its dark story will be pretty funny, with plenty of scope to establish it as one of the more unique releases in its genre. Needless to say, there'll be absolutely nothing like it released during 2020, and hopefully, it'll be as brilliant as it is different."
*   **DESTRUCTOID** shared, "I know I mostly cover animal-based games, but few have ever stopped me dead in my tracks like this one. I mean, did you hear that song in the trailer? That's original music, baby! I'm a sucker for games with quirky themes and original music, so of course, I took notice to this one straight away. Mix that with the animals-as-people motif and spot-on detective visuals, and yeah I didn't really stand a chance."
*   **ROCK PAPER SHOTGUN** commented, "Fortunately I’m batting my jet-lagged eyes at Chicken Police, an upcoming noir detective adventure with grizzled chickens and a very good raccoon. It’s a point and clicker, which means I’ll almost certainly never play it. But I’d still like you to revel in this trailer with me. It’s a cinematographic masterpiece."
*   **ALPHA BETA GAMER** praised, "It really nails the film noir vibe it’s going for. Meanwhile, the voice acting is excellent throughout, the story is interesting and the writing is very witty, packed full of cynical humor and animal-based puns. A ridiculous and riveting hardboiled detective adventure that will give you a clucking good time."

**The Cat Lady: A Psychological Horror Game**

**The Cat Lady** is a **suspenseful psychological horror game** that immerses players in the bleak world of Susan Ashworth. Susan, a 40-year-old woman, struggles with deep loneliness and suicidal thoughts. Her life, lacking meaningful connections and hope, is about to change drastically.

This narrative, created by Remigiusz Michalski of Harvester Games, features five characters who will profoundly influence Susan's journey. The game is known for its **unique, stylized art** and **easy-to-use keyboard controls**, which contribute to its immersive atmosphere. It also includes **English voice acting** and a **captivating, atmospheric 70-minute soundtrack** by micAmic, which is now free with every purchase. The soundtrack features music from artists like Warmer, 5iah, and Tears Of Mars.

Creator Remigiusz Michalski stated, "The goal was to explore the darker aspects of the human psyche." **The Cat Lady tackles mature themes**, making it **appropriate only for players aged 18 and above**. Those who enjoy this game or are curious about the developer's other projects might want to check out their other titles.

Name: Gato Roboto
Description:
Pounce inside of your cozy armored mech and set off on a dangerous trek through an alien underworld full of irritable creatures and treacherous obstacles in a valiant effort to save your stranded captain and his crashed spaceship. Tiptoe outside the friendly confines of your technological marvel and follow your feline instincts through tight tunnels and mysterious waterways to scavenge for new weapons and gear. Adventure awaits the most curious of cats in Gato Roboto! * Explore the underground labyrinth of a deep space outpost and uncover the dastardly deeds that unfolded before your arrival. * Blast and dash your way through enemies and obstacles in an agile mech suit to face the guardians stationed precariously throughout the base. * Cautiously venture outside the mech and risk all nine lives to explore areas inaccessible to your bulky, mechanical armor. * Discover secrets abound and gather new weapons and items to help open up new areas on your journey through dozens of handcrafted environments.

Embark on an **epic open-world RPG adventure** in Cat Quest, a game where you play as a brave catventurer in the vibrant land of Felingard. Your primary mission is to **defeat the evil Drakoth** and rescue your kidnapped sister.

Explore Felingard's **vast overworld map**, venturing into dangerous dungeons to find **valuable loot and treasures**. Along the way, you'll encounter a variety of **feline characters**, each offering unique stories and side quests that enrich your journey.

Cat Quest offers **fast-paced, real-time combat**. Master your blade, dodge enemy attacks, and cast **powerful spells** such as Lightnyan, Flamepurr, and Healpaw to vanquish your foes.

**Customize your catventurer** to suit your preferred playstyle. Equip gear like arcane hoods and staffs to enhance your magical abilities, or opt for chainmail armor for greater health and defense. The ability to **mix and match weapons, armor, and spells** allows you to craft your ideal character build.

Discover **intriguing locations and memorable characters** across Felingard. You might help a town plagued by a peculiar meat craving or assist the mages Mewlin and Meowgan. Quests vary from locating lost deliveries to exploring captivating areas like Bermewda's Triangle and Pawt City. The game's **enchanting orchestral soundtrack** complements the vibrant world and engaging gameplay, fully immersing you in the magical realm of Cat Quest.

In Atomicrops, you'll experience a unique farming simulation where the main goal is to plant and harvest fast-growing crops before the day ends, all while striving for maximum profit. Your journey will take you through various biomes, where you'll uncover valuable relics from ancient farms. The powerful loot you discover will significantly enhance your farming abilities and assist you in combat.

A vital aspect of Atomicrops involves defending your precious crops from nightly attackers eager to consume your harvest, which could result in starvation. You will confront challenging bosses each season, leading up to the ultimate trial of the Nuclear Winter. At the close of each day, you can visit the town to purchase essential weapons and items. Special shops offering unique rewards become available at the end of each season.

To improve your farming efficiency, you can befriend animal companions such as pigs, chickens, and cows, who will automate various farming tasks. You can also pursue and marry a town resident, who will then join you in both farming and combat.

Atomicrops features a robust system of permanent upgrades for both farming and combat. Each playthrough earns a special currency for lasting improvements and unlocks. Prepare for a demanding challenge, as even the easiest setting will test your skills. Achieving victory is a hard-earned and highly satisfying accomplishment.

As you progress, you will unlock new characters, spouses, difficulty levels, and permanent upgrades. Notably, you can unlock numerous cats that will roam your farm, and yes, you can pet them. Atomicrops is designed for high replayability, ensuring fresh surprises and item combinations are discovered with every playthrough.
