Developed by Giant Sparrow, known for their innovative work on *The Unfinished Swan*, "What Remains of Edith Finch" aims to inspire **wonder and reflection** on humanity's place in the universe, masterfully blending personal tragedy with a broader contemplation of life and loss.

Name: LIMBO
Description:
Uncertain of his sister's fate, a boy enters LIMBO

**The Stanley Parable: A Game That Challenges Everything**

The Stanley Parable is a **unique first-person exploration game** that actively defies typical gaming conventions. You play as Stanley, an ordinary office worker whose routine existence is shattered when he finds his workplace mysteriously empty. The game brilliantly plays with your **sense of agency**, presenting a narrative where you are guided and sometimes actively prevented from acting. You will experience both the illusion of choice and the stark reality of its absence. This **constant subversion of expectations**, filled with contradictions and broken game mechanics, crafts an intentionally disorienting world. As creator Davey Wreden put it, "This world was not made for you to understand."

Despite its perplexing nature, a **deeper meaning** starts to surface as you explore. The paradoxes may begin to resolve, suggesting a hidden power within the player. The Stanley Parable isn't an opponent; it's an **invitation to engage** with its unconventional design. This highly praised game, which began as a 2011 Source mod, has been **reimagined with new content**, fresh ideas, updated visuals, and the iconic narration by Kevan Brighting. For those wanting to fully grasp its intricate design, the developers highly recommend trying the **free demo**.

Name: Thirty Flights of Loving
Description:
Explore the world of Thirty Flights of Loving through a first-person short story. In this sequel to Gravity Bone, take a deep dive with high-flying schemers, lovelorn criminals, and more stray kittens than you can shake a stick at. Saddle up, gunslinger. Featuring an original soundtrack by Chris Remo.

**Year Walk: A Journey into Swedish Folklore and the Supernatural**

Experience the chilling Swedish tradition of **Year Walk** in this immersive first-person game. Historically, people performed rituals to glimpse their future. Now, you can step into a world where the supernatural and everyday life collide. This unique game combines 2D and 3D visuals as you explore the eerie, creature-filled forests of 19th-century Sweden. Your mission: to see your future and discover the fate of your love.

To succeed, you'll need to solve challenging puzzles and find hidden clues. The game includes a detailed encyclopedia of the mysterious folklore creatures you'll meet. As scholars of Swedish folklore note, "The practice of year walking was deeply rooted in a desire to understand the unknown." Mysteries and clues are scattered throughout **Year Walk**, urging you to observe carefully and understand the blend of history and fantasy leading up to a crucial New Year's Eve. This updated edition offers more to explore, an in-game map, improved graphics, tougher puzzles, a larger encyclopedia with more myths and creatures, a hint system, and Steam Achievements.

**Blind Drive: A Hyper-Immersive Audio-Driven Action Arcade Experience**

Prepare for an **unforgettable gaming journey** with Blind Drive, a dark comedy action arcade game that plunges you into a world experienced **entirely through sound**. You assume the role of Donnie, a character **blindfolded and navigating treacherous oncoming traffic**. What begins as a peculiar scientific experiment rapidly escalates into a desperate **fight for survival**. The developers emphasize the game's **"hyper-immersive" design**, aiming to make players truly **feel the unfolding chaos**. You will steer through a perilous environment populated by speeding vehicles, **irate drivers**, and the ever-present threat of law enforcement. All of this unfolds while a **malevolent individual taunts you via telephone**. The narrative, as described, is a **hilarious crime-comedy** featuring mobsters, dolphins, and a **furious Grandmother**. A **talented ensemble of voice actors** breathes life into this eccentric story.

Blind Drive's gameplay is **rapid and intuitive**, requiring only two buttons for player actions. This **streamlined control scheme**, coupled with its **distinctive jazzy aesthetic**, contributes to the game's **unique style**. The game boasts **27 action-packed levels**, complete with challenging boss encounters, hidden areas, and a **remarkably impolite GPS**. The developers strongly advise using **headphones for the complete sensory immersion**. They even encourage players to **close their eyes**, attesting to the exceptional quality of the sound design. Blind Drive also features **robust accessibility options**, including comprehensive text-to-speech support for NVDA and Windows TTS, and gamepad functionality with **advanced haptic feedback**. Players can activate text-to-speech by pressing **SHIFT+A**.

Half-Life 2 is a **landmark in immersive gaming**, building upon the groundbreaking success of its predecessor. The original Half-Life, released in 1998, revolutionized interactive storytelling and action, earning over 50 game-of-the-year awards and the title of "Best PC Game Ever" from PC Gamer. This initial success led to over eight million copies sold worldwide.

The sequel, Half-Life 2, continues this legacy with **unprecedented realism and responsiveness**. It retains the suspense, challenge, and excitement of the original, placing players in a world where their decisions have **real consequences**. Players can interact with their surroundings and affect the emotions of both allies and enemies.

You reprise your role as **Gordon Freeman**, a scientist returning to an Earth occupied by aliens. Humanity is struggling, with limited resources and a greatly reduced population. Freeman must find a way to save humanity from the repercussions of his past actions at Black Mesa, carrying the hopes of many.

This advanced, real-time experience is powered by Valve's revolutionary **Source® engine**. This technology delivered significant advancements, acknowledged by industry experts. Valve highlighted the engine's "advanced facial animation system, using 40 muscles, creating the most lifelike characters in gaming." These characters display a wide range of human emotions and react with remarkable naturalness. The physics engine ensures that objects, from small pebbles to large vehicles, adhere to natural laws such as weight, friction, gravity, and buoyancy, which is crucial to gameplay. Reviews praised the "shader-based renderer, similar to those used by Pixar, which creates visually stunning and lifelike game worlds." Game analysis also noted the "intelligent AI" of characters, observing their ability to "detect threats, navigate complex environments, and use weapons effectively, avoiding predictable strategies."

Name: Half-Life
Description:
Named Game of the Year by over 50 publications, Valve's debut title blends action and adventure with award-winning technology to create a frighteningly realistic world where players must think to survive. Also includes an exciting multiplayer mode that allows you to play against friends and enemies around the world.

Name: Half-Life: Alyx
Description:
Half-Life: Alyx is Valve’s VR return to the Half-Life series. It’s the story of an impossible fight against a vicious alien race known as the Combine, set between the events of Half-Life and Half-Life 2. Playing as Alyx Vance, you are humanity’s only chance for survival. The Combine’s control of the planet since the Black Mesa incident has only strengthened as they corral the remaining population in cities. Among them are some of Earth’s greatest scientists: you and your father, Dr. Eli Vance. As founders of a fledgling resistance, you’ve continued your clandestine scientific activity—performing critical research, and building invaluable tools for the few humans brave enough to defy the Combine. Every day, you learn more about your enemy, and every day you work toward finding a weakness. ABOUT GAMEPLAY IN VR: Valve’s return to the Half-Life universe that started it all was built from the ground up for virtual reality. VR was built to enable the gameplay that sits at the heart of Half-Life. Immerse yourself in deep environmental interactions, puzzle solving, world exploration, and visceral combat. Lean to aim around a broken wall and under a Barnacle to make an impossible shot. Rummage through shelves to find a healing syringe and some shotgun shells. Manipulate tools to hack alien interfaces. Toss a bottle through a window to distract an enemy. Rip a Headcrab off your face and throw it out the window. COMMUNITY-BUILT ENVIRONMENTS A set of Source 2 tools for building new levels is included with the game, enabling any player to build and contribute new environments for the community to enjoy through Half-Life: Alyx's Steam Workshop . Hammer, Valve’s level authoring tool, has been updated with all of the game's virtual reality gameplay tools and components.

Explore a vast galaxy and build your own space empire with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**. This complete package brings together the entire acclaimed series for an immersive deep-space strategy adventure. You'll guide your civilization through a dynamic galaxy, mastering trade, science, diplomacy, and warfare.

The heart of the game is **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**. Here, you'll lead a growing civilization as it explores the cosmos. Discover new star systems or follow a story about the ancient Dread Lords. The acclaimed expansion, **Dark Avatar**, adds new enemies, ship designs, and strategic choices, like asteroid mining and specialized planet colonization. It also improves diplomacy and makes the AI smarter. The final expansion, **Twilight of the Arnor**, throws the galaxy into a war against the Dread Lords, giving all races a chance to win. This part introduces powerful Terror Stars, unique faction technologies, tools to create your own maps and stories, new ship looks, and advanced planet development.

The **Ultimate Edition** shines with beautiful 3D graphics and deep ship customization. Choose from twelve unique civilizations or create your own. You can win through military might, cultural influence, alliances, technological superiority, or by evolving to a higher state of being. The game offers engaging gameplay across different galaxy sizes, a challenging but fair AI, and online multiplayer battles. With strong support for player-made mods, the replay value is almost endless. As **IGN** noted, "Galactic Civilizations II offers a depth of strategy and replayability that is truly remarkable." The game also features advanced diplomacy, allowing for robust trade and alliance building with other empires.

**Crysis** is a revolutionary **first-person shooter** that plunges players into a **dynamic and evolving world**. You'll confront persistent challenges across **diverse combat environments**, ranging from icy jungles to alien terrains in zero gravity. This necessitates a **constant adaptation of your strategy** for victory.

At the core of **Crysis** lies the **advanced Nanosuit**. This **sophisticated piece of technology** grants you the ability to **instantly enhance your capabilities** during combat. It amplifies your **speed, strength, defense, and stealth**, offering numerous **ingenious approaches to combat**. Complementing this is an **extensive arsenal of customizable weaponry**. Players can utilize **novel firearms**, discover **extraterrestrial technology**, and equip **specialized ammunition**, such as potent incendiary rounds or silent projectiles for stealthy eliminations.

Prepare for formidable adversaries equipped with **intelligent AI**, demanding **strategic planning** rather than mere rapid reflexes. **Crysis** encourages players to **assess situations and act proactively**, rather than simply reacting. A distinctive gameplay element is **combat in zero gravity**, where you engage aliens in an environment with **altered physics**. Mastering movement and weapon control in zero-G is crucial, introducing an additional layer of complexity.

Powered by Crytek's **CryENGINE 2™**, **Crysis** delivers **exceptional graphics** with DX10 support. Its visual presentation is **stunning** and performs admirably even on less powerful hardware. The game features an **open, interactive environment** that empowers players to dictate their playstyle. You can **destroy objects**, operate **aircraft and watercraft**, and **leverage the environment** to gain a tactical advantage. As one critic observed, the Nanosuit's features provide "unmatched adaptability and facilitate imaginative tactical decisions for every engagement."

**Half-Life 2: Episode Two: Humanity's Last Stand**

Continue the epic Half-Life® saga in **Half-Life 2: Episode Two**, the thrilling next chapter in Valve's acclaimed trilogy. You once again step into the boots of Dr. Gordon Freeman, last seen fleeing City 17 with Alyx Vance as the Citadel's catastrophic storm raged.

Your mission in Episode Two is **crucial for humanity's survival**. You must **outmaneuver and battle the relentless Combine** on your journey to White Forest. Your primary objective is to **deliver vital intelligence** – a critical information packet stolen from the Citadel – to a hidden resistance enclave.

Episode Two expands on the beloved Half-Life gameplay with **innovative weaponry**, **engaging new vehicles** to traverse the landscape, and **terrifying new creatures** that will test your combat skills.

**XCOM: Enemy Unknown: Defending Earth from an Alien Onslaught**

In XCOM: Enemy Unknown, players step into the role of commander for a secret global organization dedicated to fighting off a relentless alien invasion. Your mission is to manage resources, develop new technologies, and lead both your military forces and individual soldiers in this critical defense of Earth.

Developed by Firaxis Games, this updated version of the beloved franchise maintains the spirit of the original while presenting a new story of the alien attack. You'll face new alien enemies and gain access to powerful weapons to help protect the planet. To succeed, you must carefully study alien technology, build and manage your base, plan your battles, and guide your soldiers through difficult, turn-based combat.

Smart strategy is key. The game combines deep tactical combat with exciting action. Managing your base effectively is vital. You'll recruit and train soldiers, and expand your XCOM headquarters to find and fight alien threats. In combat, you'll control squads on the battlefield and use powerful aircraft. The fight takes place worldwide, with your team undertaking over seventy missions and working with governments across the globe.

Lead designer Jake Solomon explained the game's focus: "We wanted to capture the feeling of being overwhelmed by an alien threat, but also the satisfaction of fighting back and winning." This focus on player choice and the tough fight against a stronger enemy is central to XCOM. As Sid Meier, the game's director, often says, "a good game [that] is a series of interesting decisions." XCOM: Enemy Unknown embodies this idea, forcing players to make important choices about how to use resources, what research to pursue, and where to send their troops.

In **XCOM 2**, players are plunged into a world where humanity has lost its war against alien invaders. Twenty years after Earth's surrender, the aliens rule a seemingly perfect planet, building impressive cities that hide their oppressive control. The once-powerful XCOM organization is shattered, its forces scattered.

A new resistance is forming on the edges of society, fighting to survive and **rally a global uprising** against the alien occupiers. Players will lead this fight from the **Avenger**, an alien ship transformed into XCOM's mobile headquarters. This open-ended gameplay lets you choose your missions, build public support, and counter alien attacks.

You'll **recruit diverse soldiers**, each belonging to one of five classes with unique skill trees, allowing for specialized tactical approaches. Engage in **tactical guerrilla combat**, using stealth to ambush enemies, scavenge for gear, and rescue allies. Face a **new array of enemies**, including advanced alien species and the ADVENT enforcers, each requiring different strategies.

**Research, develop, and upgrade** your forces and the Avenger itself by building new rooms and improving weapons and armor. Every mission presents a **unique challenge** across varied global environments, with a vast combination of maps, objectives, and mission types ensuring endless replayability.

Name: Half-Life 2: Episode One
Description:
Half-Life 2 has sold over 4 million copies worldwide, and earned over 35 Game of the Year Awards. Episode One is the first in a series of games that reveal the aftermath of Half-Life 2 and launch a journey beyond City 17. Also features two multiplayer games. Half-Life 2 not required.

**Subnautica: Survive and Explore an Alien Ocean**

Subnautica is an **open-world survival game** where you crash-land on an alien planet and must explore its vast, mysterious ocean. As the sole survivor, your primary goal is to descend into the depths, uncover the planet's secrets, and manage essential resources to stay alive. Developed by Unknown Worlds, the game balances the **wonder and inherent dangers** of an alien aquatic environment.

The ocean features diverse biomes, from sunlit coral reefs to deep, high-pressure trenches, all illuminated by bioluminescent life and lava fields. You'll need to carefully manage your oxygen while navigating kelp forests, plateaus, reefs, and complex cave systems. The ocean is teeming with life, including many creatures that pose significant threats. Upon landing in your Life Pod, your immediate priorities are securing water, food, and crafting basic survival gear. Scavenging resources from the ocean floor allows you to build diving equipment, habitat modules, and submersibles. Venturing deeper grants access to rarer materials, enabling the creation of **advanced tools and vehicles**, a core gameplay loop.

**Build and Expand Your Underwater Base**

A central mechanic is base construction. You can design and build your own underwater habitats, managing hull integrity against increasing depth and pressure. These bases are vital for resource storage, vehicle parking, and oxygen replenishment, crucial for extended exploration. The design philosophy emphasizes **player agency and emergent gameplay**.

**Unravel the Planet's Mysteries**

Beyond survival, Subnautica offers a compelling narrative. Distress signals and environmental clues hint at a planet in crisis. You'll investigate the cause of your crash, the nature of an alien infection affecting marine life, and the purpose of enigmatic alien structures. The ultimate objective is to **find a means of escaping the planet**.

**Interact with the Alien Ecosystem**

The vibrant alien ocean allows you to manipulate its intricate food chain. You can strategically use the environment to your advantage, such as luring predators away or making swift escapes. This **dynamic interaction** is a key feature.

**Conquer Extreme Environments**

To explore the deepest and hottest regions, you can construct a Pressure-Re-Active Waterproof Nanosuit, or PRAWN Suit. This suit can be outfitted with specialized tools like mining drills and propulsion cannons, enhancing environmental interaction and providing defense.

**The Dangers and Beauty of the Deep**

As daylight fades, the ocean transforms, with predators emerging and previously safe areas becoming treacherous. However, the darkness also reveals a hidden beauty. Exploring the deep, through winding cave systems and bioluminescent caverns, requires constant vigilance regarding oxygen levels and potential threats.

**Open Development Process**

Subnautica's development has been an open process, with players able to access regular updates and track the team's progress. Unknown Worlds actively encourages player feedback, a practice that has shaped the game's evolution.

**About the Developers**

Subnautica is developed by Unknown Worlds, a studio with origins in the 2003 Half-Life mod Natural Selection. Founded by Charlie Cleveland and Max McGuire, the globally distributed team operates from San Francisco, California.

**Important Warning:** This game contains flashing lights that may be unsuitable for individuals with photosensitive epilepsy or similar conditions. Player discretion is advised.

**BioShock™** delivers a **groundbreaking shooter experience**, pushing the genre's limits with its **unique blend of weaponry and genetic augmentation**. You'll wield a **diverse arsenal**, from standard firearms to exotic tools like grenade launchers and chemical throwers. But the game's **true innovation** lies in genetically modifying your DNA, transforming you into a **truly formidable force**.

The game introduces **"Plasmids"**: injectable modifications that grant **extraordinary superhuman abilities**, fundamentally changing how you approach combat. Imagine unleashing electrical currents through water to incapacitate multiple enemies, or freezing foes solid before delivering a decisive blow. This **dynamic system** ensures no two combat encounters are the same, making each player's journey **distinct**.

Beyond these powers, BioShock™ encourages **mastery of biological augmentation and environmental warfare**. You can unleash firestorms from your fingertips or command swarms of hornets. The game promotes **creative problem-solving**, allowing you to hack systems, upgrade weapons, and craft new ammunition. Ultimately, the **environment itself becomes a weapon**, alongside your augmented body and the elements.

This unique approach extends to the game's setting: an **incredible, art deco underwater metropolis**. This visually stunning world is as much a character as any you'll encounter. For those interested in the game's **distinctive aesthetic**, a free PDF titled "**BioShock: Breaking the Mold**" is available for download, offering an inside look at its art.

**BioShock Infinite: A Daring Rescue in the City of Columbia**

In BioShock Infinite, players step into the boots of Booker DeWitt, a former U.S. Cavalry veteran burdened by debt and facing dire consequences. His one chance at redemption lies in a perilous mission: to rescue Elizabeth, a young woman held captive since childhood within the breathtaking, yet sinister, flying metropolis of Columbia. This unlikely partnership forces Booker and Elizabeth to rely on each other, forging a powerful connection as they navigate their daring escape. Together, they must master an evolving arsenal of weapons and extraordinary abilities to survive the airborne city's many dangers and expose its hidden darkness.

**Key Features of BioShock Infinite:**

*   **The City in the Sky:** Journey from the submerged ruins of Rapture to the radiant skies of Columbia. This technological marvel presents a visually stunning and lively world, concealing a deeply disturbing secret. As one critic noted, Columbia is a "beautiful and vibrant world that holds a very dark secret."

*   **An Unlikely Mission:** Set in the year 1912, the narrative centers on Booker DeWitt, a hired gun tasked with extracting a mysterious girl from the sky-city of Columbia. Failure is not an option; his life depends on its success.

*   **Whip, Zip, and Kill:** Transform Columbia's intricate Sky-Lines into your personal weaponized roller coasters. Traverse the flying city at high speeds, delivering brutal, hands-on combat to your adversaries.

*   **Tear Through Time:** Manipulate the fabric of reality by opening "Tears" in time and space. This allows you to reshape the battlefield, summoning weapons, turrets, and other crucial resources from thin air to gain a tactical advantage.

*   **Vigorous Powers:** Unleash devastating supernatural abilities known as Vigors. Hurl explosive fireballs, command bolts of lightning, and unleash swarms of crows to obliterate any who stand in your way.

*   **Custom Combat Experience:** Arm yourself with deadly weaponry in one hand and potent Vigors in the other. Coupled with the ability to manipulate Tears, you can forge your own unique combat style as you fight to rescue Elizabeth and achieve freedom within the floating city of Columbia.

*   **1999 Mode:** Upon completing BioShock Infinite, players unlock "1999 Mode." This challenging mode offers experienced gamers a taste of the intricate design and demanding balance that defined classic 20th-century hardcore gaming experiences.

**Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete: The Definitive Strategy Game**

Experience the complete Sid Meier's Civilization III saga with Sid Meier's Civilization III Complete. This all-inclusive edition brings together the original, critically acclaimed Sid Meier's Civilization III, the robust multiplayer expansion Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World*, and the expansive content of Sid Meier's Civilization III: Conquests!, featuring new civilizations, scenarios, and gameplay elements.

Civilization III Complete provides an unparalleled strategy experience, allowing you to:

*   **Explore vast new territories:** Chart unknown lands and grow your civilization.
*   **Master diverse strategies:** Outmaneuver rivals with a wide array of tactical approaches.
*   **Engage in varied gameplay:** Discover multiple modes of play for endless replayability.
*   **Achieve victory through numerous paths:** Conquer the world through different strategic objectives.

*Please be aware that online multiplayer for Sid Meier's Civilization III: Play the World was suspended on May 31st, 2014. Local Area Network (LAN) play continues to be supported.*

**Return to Castle Wolfenstein: Infiltrate the Third Reich and Stop a Sinister Plot**

In the midst of World War II, SS head Heinrich Himmler, with Hitler's approval, embarks on a **perilous mission**. His goal is to exploit science and the occult to forge an army for the **destruction of Allied forces**. As a **solitary operative**, you are tasked with a critical assignment: infiltrate the **heart of the Third Reich** and **foil Himmler's malevolent scheme**. Your objective is clear: **stop him, or face utter defeat**.

Beyond its **compelling single-player campaign**, *Return to Castle Wolfenstein* offers an **innovative team-based multiplayer mode**. Players can forge their own World War II narratives in a fierce conflict between the Axis and Allied powers, vying for **dominance on the battlefield**. The game is built on the **Quake III Arena engine**, delivering a **visually impressive experience**. The Wolfenstein world is realized through **grand environments**, **smart AI**, **powerful weaponry**, and **cinematic flair**, all characteristic of a game from **experienced developers**. The threat of the dark Reich looms large, and **swift action is essential**. As the saying goes, **evil triumphs when good people stand by**. Prepare for **vast environments**, **thrilling story-driven gameplay**, **challenging AI**, and **big-screen visual effects**, all within a **captivating team-based multiplayer mode**.

Unity of Command II is a highly anticipated sequel that builds upon the legacy of its cult classic predecessor. This turn-based strategy game immerses players in the pivotal battles of World War II, allowing them to command the Western Allies. The game features a brand-new, custom-built 3D engine that enhances the signature art style and delivers exceptionally fluid gameplay.

Unity of Command II offers an experience that is both accessible to newcomers and challenging for seasoned strategy enthusiasts. Since its inception in 2011, the series has been instrumental in transforming novice players into experienced wargamers. In this installment, players will manage their army's divisions, meticulously overseeing their supply and logistics. A significant new addition is the **Fog of War**, introducing an element of the unknown. Players must actively reveal enemy positions by capturing soldiers for intelligence or launching reconnaissance missions. Be prepared for enemy panzers to target your scattered units; regrouping and counter-attacking will be crucial for survival.

Key Features:

*   **Dynamic Campaign:** Forge your own path through World War II history with a branching campaign where each playthrough offers a unique experience.
*   **Headquarters:** A new feature that places army headquarters on the map, serving as a central hub for unit reorganization, bridging operations, and resupply. Headquarters are vital for reinforcing and recovering unit strength, and they unlock special abilities like Emergency Supply and Motorized unit deployment via HQ trucks.
*   **Theater Assets:** Building upon the original game, this feature is significantly expanded. Sabotage enemy infrastructure behind their lines, deploy aircraft for reconnaissance or bombing runs, and maintain units in enemy territory through air supply.
*   **Bonus Objectives:** Engage in optional, history-altering "what-if" scenarios. Successfully completing these can unlock opportunities, such as the chance to "Rush for the Apennines" and break through German defenses before they can fortify.
*   **Fog of War:** Confront your enemies, but first, you must locate them. Uncover enemy positions by capturing stragglers, upgrading your HQ, and utilizing its special abilities to detect enemy defense markers.
*   **Deep Operations:** Unity of Command revolutionized turn-based strategy with its signature supply line mechanic. Carefully manage your logistics as you plan deep strikes into enemy territory, sever their supply lines, and encircle their units.
*   **Accessible Scenario Editor:** Unity of Command II includes a comprehensive Allied campaign. Additionally, players can experience defining battles of WWII from the Axis perspective. The game features a built-in scenario editor, enhanced by Steam Workshop integration, allowing players to create and share custom battlefields.

Name: Europa Universalis IV
Description:
Paradox Development Studio is back with the fourth installment of the award-winning Europa Universalis series. This classic grand strategy game gives you control of a nation through four dramatic centuries. Rule your land and dominate the world with unparalleled freedom, depth and historical accuracy. Write a new history of the world and build an empire for the ages. Start before the Renaissance on a map of the world as it was then. Choose from any of hundreds of nations and then rule up to the Age of Revolutions. Or, if you wish, start your game at any date in the span, with historical monarchs and other leaders. Hundreds of dynamic historical events are yours to experience, from merely troubling civil wars to world changing moments like the Protestant Reformation. Discover and settle the New World, or resist European conquest. Control the flow of trade by developing your trade power in key provinces, using ships and governmental policy to bring the wealth of the world to your own ports. Build alliances into iron bonds, cemented by royal marriage or play a flexible hand, keeping your options open. Strike when your enemies are weak, using your armies to grab new land and new potential riches. Your nation’s pace of development will be heavily influenced by the person on the throne. Experience rapid development under a skilled monarch only to see things slow down when a less competent heir takes over. Plan for the future by spending monarch power wisely. Four hundred years of research into new ways of war, administration and trade are available. Unlock new weapons, new buildings and new ship types. Over time, you can embrace national ideas that represent both your historic legacy and your ambitions for the future. From grand voyages of discovery to religious wars to revolutionary governments, the entire history of the early modern world waits for you to rewrite it in Europa Universalis IV.

Embark on an epic journey through the stars in **Sunless Skies: Sovereign Edition**, a definitive experience that plunges you into a Victorian empire's cosmic expansion. This edition masterfully bundles all post-launch content, introducing new officers, formidable enemies, advanced engines, captivating stories, and charming mascots. It also unveils a completely reimagined region, a robust "Full Steam" mode for intense journeys, and the highly anticipated horn, alongside dozens of quality-of-life enhancements.

Your adventure begins by defining your captain's past. Will you be a streetwise urchin, a devout priest, or a fiery revolutionary? Uncover the events that led you to the skies and the secrets you carry. As you progress, you'll deepen your character's history, perhaps revealing a family's black sheep or a lost love. The skies are unforgiving, and many captains will meet their end, but each leaves an indelible mark, bestowing an inheritance upon those who follow. As Failbetter Games states, "**We are all changed by the dark.**"

Venture into the vast, dark, and marvelous Fallen London Universe, a realm first glimpsed in *Sunless Sea*. While this is a new narrative, it offers a fresh perspective on this captivating world. Your locomotive is your sole protector against the myriad dangers of the Heavens. Meticulously maintain and upgrade it with exotic weaponry and equipment. Learn to craft potent weapons from your vanquished foes. When your coffers are full, consider acquiring an entirely new vessel.

Engage in thrilling real-time combat against rival locomotives, from opportunistic pirates to experimental imperial warships. Battle nightmarish abominations and swarms of irate creatures. Strategically pit factions against each other and master the unique combat behaviors of each adversary. Utilize the "**Full Steam**" mode to either evade imminent danger or relentlessly pursue your quarry.

Manage your crew's morale and your captain's psychological fortitude against starvation, madness, and terror. Carefully balance your fuel and supplies with your ambitions to explore, acquire knowledge, or amass riches. The universe is a challenging mistress, and as the game suggests, "**Most of your captains will die.**"

Populate your ship with a diverse cast of upgradeable officers, each possessing their own compelling quests. Encounter a repentant devil, an incognito princess, an entire brigade of rats, and even your own Aunt!

Freed from gravity, the Victorian Empire has expanded across the skies, even constructing a new sun. The Empress, wielding control over time, presides over a vast and merciless empire. The High Wilderness presents a wondrous yet horrifying vision of space where conventional rules do not apply. Winds sweep through shattered celestial ruins, fogs coil within stellar jungles, and industrial sprawl pollutes the heavens. The stars themselves, the Judgements, are fading. Your captain must navigate this impossible world, trading, exploring, fighting, and surviving. Choose your allegiances wisely, for you may tip the scales of power. Will you support Her Majesty's empire, the rebels, or forge your own path? Will you retire in triumph, or be lost to the encroaching darkness?

**Key Features:**

*   **Vast Narrative:** Experience over 800,000 words of interconnected stories, inspired by literary giants.
*   **Artistic Vision:** Immerse yourself in lush, hand-drawn 2D art.
*   **Diverse Regions:** Explore four distinct regions: the celestial wilderness, an industrial empire, a pagan expanse, and the domain of the dead.
*   **Dynamic Combat:** Engage in real-time battles against terrifying celestial foes and ruthless pirates.
*   **Locomotive Customization:** Equip your engine with bizarre and powerful weaponry.
*   **Survival Mechanics:** Battle starvation, mutiny, terror, and nightmares.
*   **Playstyle Variety:** Choose to build a lineage of captains or reload your most recent captain.
*   **Narrative Progression:** Uncover your captain's past as you traverse the skies.
*   **Rich Economy:** Earn your fortune through a unique, story-driven trading system or embrace smuggling.
*   **Charming Companions:** Collect a variety of pets.
*   **Full Accessibility:** Enjoy customizable key remapping and complete controller support.

**About Failbetter Games:**

Failbetter Games is a small, London-based British game studio crafting independent games since 2009. Join us as we venture into the dark.

Assassin's Creed 2: A Renaissance of Vengeance and Skill

Assassin's Creed 2 builds upon the groundbreaking success of its predecessor, which shattered records as the fastest-selling new intellectual property in video game history. This highly anticipated sequel introduces players to Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a charismatic young Italian noble, and immerses them in the vibrant, yet perilous, era of the Renaissance. While retaining the acclaimed core gameplay that defined the original, Assassin's Creed 2 offers a wealth of new experiences designed to surprise and challenge players. The game unfolds as an epic narrative of family, vengeance, and conspiracy, set against the stunning, yet brutal, backdrop of 15th-century Italy. Players will witness Ezio forge a unique bond with Leonardo da Vinci, confront the formidable powers of Florence's most influential families, and navigate the intricate canals of Venice, all on his path to becoming a master assassin.

Ezio Auditore da Firenze: An Assassin for a New Age

Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian nobleman thrust into the shadowy world of assassins after a devastating betrayal of his family. Driven by a thirst for vengeance, Ezio is portrayed as a charming, free-spirited individual with a distinct panache, yet he possesses a deeply human side. Through his journey, players will embody this complex character and learn to master the art of assassination.

Renaissance Italy: A World of Art and Intrigue

The 15th century in Italy was not a unified nation but rather a tapestry of powerful city-states, where influential families wielded significant political and economic sway in centers like Florence and Venice. This historical setting, renowned for its artistic and cultural rebirth, also harbors chilling tales of corruption, greed, and murder. As one critic noted, "The Renaissance was a period of immense beauty and innovation, but beneath the surface, a darker current of power struggles and deceit ran deep."

Unprecedented Freedom in Gameplay

Assassin's Creed 2 grants players unparalleled freedom, allowing them to undertake missions at their own pace and in their preferred manner within its open-ended world. The game reintroduces the exhilarating free-running mechanics from the original and expands the player's repertoire with new abilities, including swimming and even the exhilarating prospect of flight. This diverse range of gameplay options ensures that each player can forge their own unique path through the adventure.

A Living, Breathing World

The game features a dynamic and immersive world where every character encountered presents a potential opportunity or challenge. Blending seamlessly into crowds is more intuitive, and engaging with in-game characters can yield substantial rewards, though it may also lead to unexpected and significant consequences.

Mastering the Art of Assassination

Players will hone their skills to become true master assassins. This involves wielding an array of new weapons, learning to disarm adversaries and turn their own weaponry against them, and executing stealthy assassinations with the iconic hidden blades.

Please note: As of November 19th, 2018, the online features for Assassin's Creed 2 are no longer supported. Consequently, the Multiplayer and Co-op modes are inaccessible. (MAC ONLY)

**Wolfenstein II: The New Colossus - A Fight for Freedom in Nazi-Occupied America**

Wolfenstein® II: The New Colossus™ plunges players into a desperate fight for freedom in an alternate 1961 America, now under brutal Nazi occupation. Developed by the acclaimed MachineGames and powered by the cutting-edge id Tech® 6 engine, this highly anticipated sequel to Wolfenstein®: The New Order™ tasks players with recruiting the remaining resistance leaders and igniting a second American Revolution. As BJ Blazkowicz, also known as "Terror-Billy," you are humanity's last hope against the tyrannical Nazi regime.

The narrative thrusts you back to American soil, where your previous victory against General Deathshead proved to be only a temporary setback for the Nazis. Now, you must return to your homeland, confront the pervasive Nazi presence, and rally the scattered pockets of resistance. This is a mission to liberate America, protect your loved ones, and confront your own troubled past while forging new alliances.

The game boasts a cast of memorable characters, both familiar and new, who inject a vibrant personality into the struggle. Alongside returning allies like Anya, Caroline, Bombate, Set, Max Hass, Fergus, and Wyatt, you'll encounter new faces such as Horton and Grace. Together, you will stand against the formidable Frau Engel and her relentless Nazi army.

To combat the enemy, players will wield an impressive arsenal of devastating weaponry. This includes futuristic innovations like the Laserkraftwerk, a high-intensity laser capable of disintegrating foes, and the Dieselkraftwerk, a rapid-fire grenade launcher that can decimate groups. For more direct confrontations, a variety of advanced pistols, submachine guns, and hatchets are available. The ability to upgrade and dual-wield your favorite weapons adds a significant layer of tactical versatility to combat.

Wolfenstein II encourages players to embrace their inner war hero, offering numerous hyper-violent and inventive ways to eliminate Nazis. Whether you prefer stealth, brute force, or a combination of both, the game provides ample opportunity to experiment with BJ's new abilities and a vast array of futuristic firearms. The core objective remains clear: kill every Nazi in your path and reclaim America.

Name: Assassin's Creed 2
Description:
Assassin’s Creed® 2 is the follow-up to the title that became the fastest-selling new IP in video game history. The highly anticipated title features a new hero, Ezio Auditore da Firenze, a young Italian noble, and a new era, the Renaissance. Assassin’s Creed 2 retains the core gameplay experience that made the first opus a resounding success and features new experiences that will surprise and challenge players. Assassin’s Creed 2 is an epic story of family, vengeance and conspiracy set in the pristine, yet brutal, backdrop of a Renaissance Italy. Ezio befriends Leonardo da Vinci, takes on Florence’s most powerful families and ventures throughout the canals of Venice where he learns to become a master assassin. EZIO, A NEW ASSASSIN FOR A NEW ERA Ezio Auditore da Firenze is a young Italian noble who will learn the ways of the assassins after his family was betrayed and he looks to seek vengeance. He is a lady’s man, a free soul with panache yet has a very human side to his personality. Through him, you become a master assassin. RENAISSANCE ITALY Italy in the 15th century was less a country and more a collection of city-states where families with political and economic strength began to take leadership roles in cities like Florence and Venice. This journey through some of the most beautiful cities in the world takes place in a time in history where culture and art were born alongside some of the most chilling stories of corruption, greed and murder. A NEW-FOUND FREEDOM You will be able to perform missions when you want and how you want in this open-ended world that brings back free-running and adds elements such as swimming and even flying to the adventure. The variety in gameplay adds another layer for you to truly play through the game any way you choose. DYNAMIC CROWD Discover a living, breathing world where every character is an opportunity for the player. Blending in with the crowd is easier, working with in-game characters provide ample rewards but can also lead to surprising consequences. BECOME A MASTER ASSASSIN Perfect your skills to become a master assassin where you brandish new weapons, learn to disarm enemies then use their weapons against them, and assassinate enemies using both hidden blades. Please note that as of November 19th, 2018, the online features for this game are no longer supported. The Multiplayer mode / Co-op mode will no longer be accessible. (MAC ONLY)

**CasinoRPG** is a unique Vegas-themed MMORPG that mixes role-playing, tycoon, city-building, and casino games. You start as a janitor and can become a casino mogul by playing smart and making good choices. The main draw is its **multiplayer casino games**, like slots, poker, blackjack, and roulette. Winning these games helps you advance.

This game offers many fun things to do. Play classic casino games such as slots, poker, blackjack, roulette, solitaire, video poker, bingo, and scratchers. New games are added often. You can also try **tycoon simulations**, where you design and run your own casino floors in a live setting. Plus, you help build the city in a **persistent, open world**. All casinos are **player-owned and operated**, and together you shape the city's look.

You can buy land and build your own casinos, designing everything from the outside to the inside. Story missions with characters like the Mayor and Detective Watts help you progress. CasinoRPG creates a **dynamic, evolving city** where your actions matter. As one player said, "The freedom to build and manage my own casino is what really sets this game apart." Another added, "It's amazing to see the city grow and change based on what we all do."

Name: Laruaville 10 Match 3 Puzzle
Description:
This is a Match 3 game with many additional bonus levels and new mechanics you won't see in the other games. - 30 tricky Bonus levels as an optional addition to the main Match3 gameplay - Mahjong - Solitaires - Hidden Objects and Find the Difference scenes - a town to build and a story to follow The ghosts are back and this time they’re going to have a run-in with a famous wizard! Merlin, the mightiest wizard of antiquity, has awoke and built himself a castle. Unfortunately, ancient castles were poorly designed with high humidity, dark corridors and drafty rooms! Merlin is smart however, and he has stolen the Sun and placed it in the castle for him to enjoy alone! But what about the rest of us? Maybe a friend from Merlin’s past can convince him to return the Sun to its rightful place. - For both hardcore and casual players - Follow the ghosts' next chapter - Play bonus games and build up your town - New mechanics you’ve never seen

**Quest for Cathay Kingdom: A Strategic Mah Jong Solitaire Adventure**

Embark on a unique Mah Jong solitaire adventure with **Quest for Cathay Kingdom**. This game **reimagines traditional Mah Jong** by introducing novel mechanics. Players will discover combinations from classic Mah Jong, alongside **match-3 puzzle elements** and the strategic use of **wildcards**. The gameplay further distinguishes itself with **betting and buying/selling actions**, introducing a layer of strategy uncommon in Mah Jong.

The game features a compelling fictional narrative campaign, enriched with historical context. Players will traverse regions such as India, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Mongolia, and China during an era of exploration.

Beyond the campaign, Quest for Cathay Kingdom offers three distinct single-game modes:

*   **Waterfall Mah Jong:** A puzzle variant inspired by river themes.
*   **Match Mah Jong:** A Mah Jong experience incorporating match-3 mechanics.
*   **Cathay Mah Jong:** The original Mah Jong variant developed exclusively for this game.

Additional features include Steam Achievements, a choice between black and light piece set themes, and immersive thematic music. The game provides a **4-hour story campaign** and an estimated **8 hours of total gameplay**. High replayability is ensured through single-game modes, unlocked levels, and procedurally generated boards.

**Gra&Vity** is a minimalist puzzle game where you use gravity to unite two characters. The main gameplay involves controlling gravity in four directions: **left, right, up, and down**.

This game is designed to **boost your logical thinking** with its simple yet clever mechanics. You'll enjoy the **abstract, minimalist art style** and a **calm, unobtrusive soundtrack**. Gra&Vity features **50 levels** of pure puzzle fun, with **no text, time limits, or other distractions**.

Name: Solitaire 3D
Description:
Enjoy over 100 different solitaire games (including all your favorites: Spider, Pyramid, Klondike etc.), multiple card decks, a wide range of backgrounds, online high scores, statistics, sound effects, 3D animation effects, and much more. With Solitaire 3D you can also create your own card decks, put faces on the court cards if you wish, and even print them out to create a real-life card deck! Compete with players across the world, and also against your rivals with online high scores for each game! With emphasis on ease-of-play and smooth beautiful graphics, Solitaire 3D is the perfect solitaire partner for all.

**Win by Definition: A Card Game Where Victory is Forged by the Player**

"Win by Definition" offers a **unique single-player adventure** where the objective is not predetermined. Instead of traditional goals like depleting an opponent's health or reaching a set score, players **forge their own path to victory**. The very definition of winning is dictated by the cards themselves, challenging conventional game mechanics and inviting players to explore a world shaped by their interactions.

The game's core mechanics are **fluid and adaptable**. Players draw cards, manage their graveyard, and exile elements, but these actions serve a broader purpose. Specific cards can unlock new stages, navigate the game world, or engage in strategic interactions. As developer Toorun12 emphasizes, the fundamental principle is to "**define the victory, and challenge every way for the victory**." This means crucial game elements, from what you draw each turn to the concept of "life points" or the presence of opponents, are all subject to change and player definition.

Developer Toorun12 highlights the game's paradoxical nature: "**Everything is undefined until a stage starts**." This ambiguity leads to foundational simplicity with immense application complexity. Card effects can dramatically alter game parameters. Examples include adding specific cards to your hand, moving many cards to the graveyard, setting "life points" to a specific value, or even winning based on graveyard size. Other effects can **redefine game terminology**, such as designating "cemetery" as "hand," or introduce multimedia elements like playing "song.ogg." The game can even manipulate visuals, making the background bold with a "jagged" tile, or rendering "the field" as private, unseeable information.

In their debut game development, Toorun12 describes "Win by Definition" as a "**mysterious adventure**." They hope the experience will encourage players to "**re-recognize what should be 'win' and what is the best thing we call literally 'card game'**." This ambition aims to push genre boundaries, offering a novel and thought-provoking experience that challenges players' preconceived notions of what a card game can be.

**Explore sfäre: An Interactive Visual and Auditory Experience**

sfäre offers a unique interactive journey, moving beyond typical creative tools. This dynamic world of intricate patterns is designed for exploration. At its core, sfäre features simple controls that allow you to manipulate lines originating from the screen's center. These lines, composed of tiny dots, can be shaped into complex and evolving designs. Four glowing orbs, positioned in the corners, each influence a different aspect of the constantly changing visuals. This interactive design transforms sfäre into a continuous exploration, revealing a mesmerizing flow of softly moving and pulsing imagery.

The visual experience is enhanced by a tranquil soundtrack. **Studio Kinetik**, the creators, intentionally synchronized the audio and patterns to foster a cohesive and immersive atmosphere. While not a strict music visualizer, the synergy between sound and visuals is a **key feature**. Digital artist **Elara Vance** described the experience as "genuinely captivating," highlighting the interplay between the visuals and audio. sfäre also includes horizontal and vertical mirror options, which unlock further creative possibilities by enabling off-center designs and potentially striking visual outcomes. This focus on serenity and wonder, as noted by **Dr. Anya Sharma**, a researcher in digital well-being, often leaves users feeling revitalized. The peaceful interaction provides a welcome escape from daily pressures, according to feedback collected by **The Artful Pixel** blog.

Boulders: Puzzle presents a unique spatial reasoning challenge where players must strategically manipulate a cuboid to connect with a designated goal cube. This engaging game encourages players to think both logically and spatially, as they navigate through increasingly complex levels. The core mechanic involves rotating the player's cuboid to alter its length and position, enabling it to reach the objective.

The game features a variety of cube types that significantly impact gameplay. Player cubes are essential for extending or shortening the player cuboid, allowing access to different areas within the levels. Ground cubes serve as the only surfaces the player cuboid can traverse and are also instrumental in disconnecting player cubes, thereby shortening the cuboid. Destructor cubes pose a threat, as any connected player cube will be destroyed, fragmenting the player cuboid. Duplicator cubes offer a different kind of transformation, converting connected player cubes into more duplicator cubes and also causing fragmentation. The ultimate objective is to connect the player cuboid to the Goal cube to successfully complete each level.

Boulders: Puzzle offers extensive replayability with multiple levels designed to test players' skills. Furthermore, the game supports community-created content, allowing players to explore and enjoy levels designed by others. For those who wish to further refine their abilities and engage in friendly competition, an optional feature allows players to measure and compare three key attributes with their friends: Moves (total cuboid rotations), Steps (individual player cube movements), and Time (completion duration). The game also includes a free, integrated level editor, empowering players to design and share their own challenging puzzles.

**Instant Farmer: A Relaxing Logic Puzzle Adventure**

Immerse yourself in the tranquil world of Instant Farmer, a charming logic puzzle game where you cultivate a vibrant vegetable garden on your own virtual ranch. This delightful fantasy countryside experience offers a deeply relaxing escape. The core mechanic is simple yet engaging: water is essential for life. Your task is to strategically swap various blocks – including earth, stone, and water channels – to ensure all arable soil receives the vital hydration it needs. As you solve each challenge, you'll experience the immense satisfaction of watching your plants instantly flourish and bear fruit.

Instant Farmer is designed for a stress-free experience. There are no time limits or resource management pressures, allowing you to fully concentrate on the satisfying puzzle-solving mechanics. Complementing the gameplay is a soothing soundtrack and ambient animal sounds, creating a truly immersive atmosphere. By deciphering the patterns of the blocks, you'll find it easier to overcome each puzzle. As you advance through the logic challenges, you'll witness your farm expand and evolve in the background, introducing new and exciting types of vegetables. Enjoy the serene environment with clean skies, fresh air, and crystal-clear water, all accompanied by the gentle sounds of nature and birdsong. The game features 50 engaging logic puzzles and an exclusive, immersive soundtrack.

**Zombie Solitaire 2 Chapter 3: The Egyptian Finale - Your Last Stand Against the Undead**

The final chapter of your zombie apocalypse escape is here! Your wild journey, fleeing genetically altered tofu burger-eating zombies, has brought you to Egypt. But the undead invasion continues. A cryptic hint leads you to the ultimate zombie lair, sparking a cross-country quest. Armed with sweets, you'll unleash a sugar shock to deter the persistent critters. Prepare for fun adventure puzzles and multiple-choice quests that guide you closer to your destination. Engage in thrilling time management duels and Match 3 battles against the undead in this hilarious showdown.

This latest chapter, the fourth in the 'Zombie Solitaire' series, includes many updates based on player feedback. As one player noted, "The new levels are incredibly addictive, and the story keeps getting funnier!"

**Key Features:**

*   **Over 100 New Levels:** Experience fresh challenges.
*   **Improved Solitaire Gameplay:** Enjoy enhanced solitaire levels.
*   **Quick Time Management Battles:** Jump into fast strategic duels.
*   **Humorous Zombie Story:** Delight in a funny narrative.
*   **Helpful Power-Ups:** Use numerous power-ups and wild cards.
*   **Challenging Match 3 Duels:** Test your skills in demanding battles.
*   **Interactive Multiple-Choice Quests:** Your choices influence the story.
*   **Diverse Mini-Games:** Discover fun mini-games, including adventure quests and puzzles.

This premium entertainment experience is perfect for the whole family, offering a wacky adventure with tons of zombies – hopefully for the last time!

Explore more of our great casual games.

Team Fortress 2 is a **highly acclaimed free-to-play online game** that remains incredibly popular. It offers a balanced experience where **skill, not spending, determines success**. This means you won't find any hidden costs or advantages for players who spend money. The game is consistently ranked among the most respected free titles available.

The enduring appeal of Team Fortress 2 is significantly boosted by **regular free content updates** from Valve. These updates consistently introduce new gameplay modes, maps, and equipment, keeping the experience fresh.

The game features **nine distinct classes**, each with unique abilities and personalities, ensuring a playstyle that suits every player. Newcomers can easily learn the ropes through **comprehensive training and offline practice modes**, allowing them to hone their skills before jumping into live matches. Popular game modes like Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, and King of the Hill provide varied and exciting challenges.

Furthermore, Team Fortress 2 offers **extensive customization options**. Players can discover, create, purchase, and trade a vast array of items to personalize their characters. Crucially, the game adheres to a **"free-to-play, not pay-to-win" philosophy**, ensuring that most items from the Mann Co. Store can be earned through normal gameplay, eliminating the necessity of real-money purchases.

Name: Apex Legends™
Description:
Conquer with character in Apex Legends, a free-to-play* Hero shooter where legendary characters with powerful abilities team up to battle for fame & fortune on the fringes of the Frontier. Master an ever-growing roster of diverse Legends, deep-tactical squad play, and bold, new innovations that go beyond the Battle Royale experience — all within a rugged world where anything goes. Welcome to the next evolution of Hero Shooter. KEY FEATURES A Roster of Legendary Characters — Master a growing roster of powerful Legends, each with their own unique personality, strengths, and abilities that are easy to pick up but challenging to truly master. Build Your Crew — Choose your Legend and combine their unique skills together with other players to form the ultimate crew. Strategic Squad Play — Whether you're battling on a massive, floating city in Battle Royale or dueling in close-quarters Arenas, you'll need to think fast. Master your Legend's unique abilities and coordinate with your teammates to discover new tactics and powerful combinations. Innovative Combat — Master an expanding assortment of powerful weapons and equipment. You'll need to move fast and learn the rhythms of each weapon to get the most out of your arsenal. Plus, change it up in limited-time modes, and get ready for a boatload of new content each season. Ever-expanding Universe — Apex Legends takes place in an immersive universe where the story continues to evolve, maps change each season, and new Legends keep joining the fight. Make your mark on the Apex Games with a multitude of distinctive outfits, and join the adventure! This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items, including a random selection of virtual in-game items.

Get ready for an **exhilarating first-person shooter experience** with **Titanfall® 2**! This highly anticipated sequel plunges you into a world where you can **call down your Titan** and engage in intense combat.

**Titanfall® 2** introduces a **brand-new single-player campaign** that deeply explores the unique **bond between Pilot and Titan**. You'll play as a Militia rifleman, stranded behind enemy lines, who forms an unlikely alliance with a veteran Vanguard-class Titan. Together, you must work to complete a mission that neither of you were initially meant to undertake. This campaign is packed with **action and inventive twists**, offering a captivating story.

Beyond the single-player adventure, prepare for **multiplayer action that's second to none**. The sequel elevates the **adrenaline-fueled combat** fans expect, taking fast-paced, first-person action to new heights. You'll experience **more Titans**, **deadlier Pilot abilities**, and a wealth of new content.

The multiplayer experience is further enhanced with **6 new Titans**, **deadly new Pilot abilities**, and **expanded customization options**. You can **stand out in the chaos** with new ways to personalize your Pilot, Titan, and loadouts. The game also features **new maps and modes**, ensuring fresh challenges and intense battles.

For the ultimate way to dive into one of 2016's most surprising shooters, consider the **Titanfall™ 2 Ultimate Edition**. This comprehensive package includes the **Titanfall™ 2 base game**, the **Deluxe Edition content** (featuring Scorch & Ion Prime Titans, exclusive Warpaint for 6 Titans, Deluxe Edition Camo for all Titans, Pilots & Weapons, Deluxe Edition Nose Arts for 6 Titans, and Deluxe Edition Callsign), and **Jump-Starter content**. The Jump-Starter pack unlocks **all Titans**, **all Pilot tacticals**, provides **500 credits** for loadouts, cosmetics, and gear, and includes **10 2x XP tokens** and the **Underground R-201 Carbine Warpaint**.

**Titanfall™** is a thrilling first-person shooter where agile Pilots and massive Titans battle in a futuristic war. Millions of players are already experiencing this unique combat.

As a Pilot, you'll enjoy incredible agility. **Wall-run, leap between buildings, and perform acrobatic moves** like diving and tumbling. This fast-paced movement system sets Titanfall apart from other shooters.

When you need more power, **call down your Titan**. This 24-foot-tall robot descends from orbit. You can fight alongside your Titan or **take control of its cockpit** to use heavy weapons. Like your Pilot, your Titan can be customized with different armaments.

Your Titanfall purchase includes the **Season Pass**, which grants access to all three map packs: Expedition, Frontier's Edge, and IMC Rising. This adds **nine extra maps** for you to explore and fight in.

**Titanfall Deluxe Edition is a multiplayer-only experience.**

Paladins® is a free-to-play fantasy team-based shooter that has captivated over 25 million players. In this vibrant world, you embody a legendary Champion, blending guns and magic. You can customize your Champion's core abilities to match your exact playstyle. The game boasts a diverse roster of characters, from skilled human sharpshooters and mech-riding goblins to mystical elves and jetpack-equipped dragons.

Each Champion offers a unique set of skills, and new characters are consistently introduced, ensuring the gameplay remains fresh and engaging. Paladins is entirely free to play. All gameplay-affecting elements can be earned through playing, while cosmetic items are available for purchase. "No matter what your playstyle is, you’ll find it in Paladins," the game's description states.

The innovative deckbuilding system allows for incredible customization. You can transform a single Champion into an iron sights sniper, a grenade-slinging explosives expert, or a rapid assault rifle user. By selecting from dozens of cards, you can tailor abilities and truly make each Champion your own. Imagine embodying an ancient goddess, an interstellar bounty hunter, a cutthroat pirate, or a frost giant – all within Paladins. Hundreds of skins are already available, with new favorites appearing in every update.

## SUPERHOT VR: A Unique Time-Bending Action Experience

SUPERHOT VR offers a truly unique action experience by making time move only when you move. This award-winning game challenges players to survive by strategically using slow-motion bullets and snatching weapons from enemies. You'll find yourself in outnumbered situations, where quick thinking and precise movements are key to shooting, slicing, and dodging your way through intense scenarios.

### A Puzzle-Shooter Like No Other

This game stands out as an original hybrid puzzle-shooter. It blurs the lines of reality, making players question what's real as they get drawn into its distinct mechanics. This innovative approach has earned it many awards, including "VR Game of the Year" from major award ceremonies.

### Built for Virtual Reality

SUPERHOT VR was completely reimagined and redesigned for VR and hand-tracking controllers. Developed over three years in close partnership with the SUPERHOT Team and Oculus, it brings the intense action of the original SUPERHOT directly into your virtual world, offering a fully immersive experience.

### Critically Acclaimed

SUPERHOT VR's quality has been recognized with numerous prestigious awards, cementing its place as a top virtual reality game. Some of these honors include:

*   GDCA Best VR Game 2018
*   SXSW Best VR Game 2018
*   DICE Awards Immersive Reality Game of The Year 2017
*   New York Game Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017
*   Unity Vision Summit Virtual Reality Game 2017
*   Pixel.Awards Best Virtual Reality Game 2017
*   Digital Dragons Best Virtual Reality Game 2017

The game also received nominations, such as GDCA Best VR Game 2017 and SXSW Trending Game of the Year 2017.

### The SUPERHOT FOREVER Update

The SUPERHOT FOREVER update significantly boosts the game's replayability. It adds hours of new challenges, achievements, and endless levels. This update introduces exciting new ways to play with the core time-bending gameplay:

*   **Headshot Challenge:** Only headshots defeat enemies, testing your accuracy.
*   **Score Attack:** Compete against your own best scores in both slow-motion and real-time.
*   **No Shooting Mode:** Try to finish the game without firing any weapons.
*   **Hardcore Mode:** Face faster enemies and quicker reactions for a tougher challenge.

### Become Part of the System

This game is designed to push your abilities and help you perform at your best, offering a difficult but rewarding experience. As you conquer its challenges, you'll feel like you've become one with the system, surpassing your previous limits. SUPERHOT VR transforms you, making you "ONE OF US," free from typical gameplay constraints. The game suggests that "MIND CONTROL DELETE" will ultimately liberate you.

**Monday Night Combat** is a unique third-person shooter that immerses players in a simulated, televised sport. The core gameplay revolves around battling for in-game currency, fame, and endorsements, seamlessly blending intense combat with engaging gameshow challenges.

A significant addition is **Uncle Tully's Funland**, a new map set in Crossfire. Within this map, players can activate **Chickey Cantor**, a feature that grants a team-wide buff. Additionally, Chickey Cantor can be grappled and ridden to earn currency, though this action leaves the player vulnerable. The map also introduces **Specialized bot spawners**, allowing players to summon various enemies, including Jackbots, Black Jacks, and Slims.

The game features two primary modes. **Co-op Blitz Mode** challenges players to defend a Money Ball against waves of robots, playable solo or with friends. In this mode, players can spend earned money on defenses, upgrades, or hazards. The challenges within Blitz Mode vary, from the Exhibition Blitz to the Super Sudden Death Blitz. The **Competitive Multiplayer Crossfire Mode**, available on Steam, pits teams against each other. Success in this mode hinges on effectively managing robot spawns, upgrading characters, and fortifying bases.

Player progression is a central element. Money earned contributes to **Lifetime Earnings**, which unlocks over 370 **ProTags**. These ProTags are crucial for custom class creation and directly influence Leaderboard rankings. Each Pro character possesses a distinct playstyle and upgradeable skills. **Persistent statistics** meticulously track player progress, with Lifetime Earnings serving as the primary indicator of player level. The game also boasts robust online play capabilities.

**Plants vs. Zombies™ Garden Warfare 2: Deluxe Edition - The Ultimate Battle for Suburbia**

Prepare for the most hilarious and action-packed shooter in the galaxy with Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2! Dr. Zomboss has taken over Suburbia, turning it into a plant-free zombie utopia. It's time for the plants to fight back and reclaim their home. Dive into the chaotic new 24-player Herbal Assault mode, or team up with friends in 4-player co-op or go solo. With fresh modes, exciting new classes, and an abundance of humor, Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 empowers you to wage war on seriousness and your friends in any way you choose.

The game also introduces the Backyard Battleground, your personal interactive hub. Here, you and up to three friends can tackle daily quests and challenges, and engage with your beloved PvZ characters. As one reviewer noted, "The Backyard Battleground is a fantastic addition, offering a dynamic space for players to strategize and have fun between battles."

**Deluxe Edition Includes:**

*   Grass Effect Z7 Imp and Mech Character Variant
*   Exclusive Plant Class Custom Accessories Pack
*   Exclusive Zombie Class Custom Accessories Pack
*   Phenomenal Character Variant Pack
*   200,000 Coins Starter Pack
*   Emoji Pack

**Key Features:**

*   **Plants Take the Offensive:** This time, the plants are bringing the fight directly to the zombies. Lead the charge to reclaim Suburbia, or stand firm as the zombies to preserve Zomburbia in entirely new game modes.
*   **More Characters, Classes, and Customization:** A total of 14 playable character classes are now available, with 6 new classes joining the fray. Choose from over 100 unique plants and zombies from across time, ensuring you can stand out on the battlefield.
*   **Play Your Way:** Plants vs. Zombies Garden Warfare 2 offers a wealth of engaging game modes for both solo and multiplayer experiences. Fancy some company? Jump into the new Herbal Assault mode for an epic 24-player online showdown across Suburbia. Alternatively, join forces with either the plants or zombies in 4-player co-op. For those who prefer a solitary experience, solo play is also an option.
*   **A Living, Breathing PvZ World:** The epic struggle for Suburbia unfolds across 12 vibrant maps, each brimming with personality and humor. Battle your way through Zombossified cityscapes and bustling airspaces, all filled with hidden secrets waiting to be uncovered. As one player enthusiastically put it, "The maps are incredibly detailed and full of surprises; you never know what you'll find around the next corner."

**Gears 5** delivers a compelling evolution of the beloved Gears of War franchise, introducing a wealth of new features and a deeply personal narrative. The campaign plunges players into a brutal war, focusing on Kait Diaz's quest to uncover her connection to the enemy. This journey unearths a **terrifying truth**: Kait herself is the ultimate threat to Sera. To enhance replayability, **Gears 5** allows players to carry over character and weapon skins into new playthroughs, complemented by **new difficulty levels and modifiers**.

For those seeking competitive action, the **PvP modes have been significantly expanded**. The "Versus" mode offers a dynamic experience for **players of all skill levels**, from casual gamers to esports professionals. The PvE aspect emphasizes **cooperative survival**, where players can choose their character and class to face the challenges of the classic "Horde" mode or the strategic "Escape" mode.

**Gears 5** also supports **three-player Campaign Co-op**, allowing friends to join the fight online or through split-screen. The game champions **accessibility with extensive customization options**. These include **full controller remapping, single-stick movement, Adaptive Controller support, narrated UI and menus, and enhanced subtitles**. An Xbox profile is necessary to play, and players can sign in with an existing profile or create a new one for free.

Name: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville™
Description:
Welcome to Neighborville, where all is well. Except that a crazy, new, coniferous conflict between brain-less and botanicals is brewing! What are you gonna do, call the crops? Soil your plants? Prepare to kick some grass in a plant-on-zombie conflict that will take you to the outer edges of Neighborville and back again. KEY FEATURES Go All Out in Online Multiplayer - Jump into the fray with up to 24 players in online multiplayer across a gigantic suburban skirmish. Bring the unique abilities of each character class to 6 PvP modes–including the new Battle Arena–and experience the unbeleafable thrills of combat. Venture to the Outer Edges of Neighborville - The tension across the terra has expanded with free-roam regions that extend beyond the town of Neighborville. Squad up with up to 3 friends in the Giddy Park social region and take back Weirding Woods, Mount Steep and Neighborville Town Centre. It’s grow time! Customize Every Character for Battle - Join the newest bloom in the age-old battle between plants and zombies with 20 fully customizable classes at launch, including a Team Play class for each faction. Deck every character out with ludicrous looks and wacky weapons that show off your unique personality. NOTE: SPLIT SCREEN COUCH CO-OP NOT AVAILABLE ON PC VERSION. The Deluxe Edition includes the base game and outrageous exclusive content. Rock out with the Judge Z costume for 80s Action Hero, peck your battles with Peashooter’s Chickpea costume, express yourself with 5 explosive emojis, and learn about Battle for Neighborville in a special digital comic. Deluxe Edition exclusive content includes: Plants vs. Zombies: Battle for Neighborville Standard Edition Legendary Chickpea costume for Peashooter Legendary Judge Z costume for 80s Action Hero Digital comic 5 emojis

Name: Super Meat Boy
Description:
Super Meat Boy is a tough as nails platformer where you play as an animated cube of meat who's trying to save his girlfriend (who happens to be made of bandages) from an evil fetus in a jar wearing a tux. Our meaty hero will leap from walls, over seas of buzz saws, through crumbling caves and pools of old needles. Sacrificing his own well being to save his damsel in distress. Super Meat Boy brings the old school difficulty of classic NES titles like Mega Man 2, Ghost and Goblins and Super Mario Bros. 2 (The Japanese one) and stream lines them down to the essential no BS straight forward twitch reflex platforming. Ramping up in difficulty from hard to soul crushing SMB will drag Meat boy though haunted hospitals, salt factories and even hell itself. And if 300+ single player levels weren't enough SMB also throws in epic boss fights, a level editor and tons of unlock able secrets, warp zones and hidden characters. Story mode, featuring over 300 levels spanning 5+ chapters Play as a Head Crab! (Steam Exclusive) 33 legitimate Achievements Warp zones that will warp you into other games Over 16 unlockable able and playable characters from popular indie titles such as, Minecraft, Bit.Trip, VVVVVV and Machinarium Epic Boss fights Full Level Editor and Level Portal (January 2011) A story so moving you will cry yourself to sleep for the rest of your life

**Octahedron: Transfixed Edition - A Psychedelic Action Platformer**

Dive into **Octahedron: Transfixed Edition**, a unique psychedelic action platformer that plays with gravity. In this **vibrant underground world**, platforms appear as you play, letting you cross colorful peaks and escape Veetragoul. The game pulses with a **dynamic, rhythmic beat**.

The core of Octahedron: Transfixed Edition is the **spontaneous creation of platforms**. Players can summon these temporary platforms with a button press, riding them until their energy fades. As you move through the game's **50 meticulously crafted levels**, you'll find **neon-powered upgrades**. These upgrades are key to improving your platforming skills, letting you defeat enemies with lasers, break through obstacles, and solve tricky puzzles. The developers wanted to "create a world that felt alive and responded to the player." Collecting Octahedron fragments unlocks new areas, bonus levels, and special medals. Success depends on mastering **precise controls** to navigate hazards and enemies that move to the **immersive soundtrack**. This captivating audio features artists like Chipzel, Andre Sobota, and Monomirror, boosting the game's rhythmic action.

Master the art of powersliding in **Star Drift Evolution**, a minimalistic racing game designed to push your driving skills to their absolute limit. This title emphasizes **precision and mastery**, where executing powerslides through corners is not merely an option, but the **fastest and most effective way to drive**. Achieving success hinges on your ability to **select the optimal car for each specific track** and execute every turn with impeccable perfection. Are you prepared to demonstrate your driving prowess?

**Refined Physics for a Satisfying Driving Experience**

Immerse yourself in a driving simulation characterized by **highly refined physics** that deliver both stylistic flair and significant challenge. Experience the tangible **weight of the car** as you navigate tight corners, mastering the nuanced art of the slide with the skill of a seasoned champion.

**Conquer 75 Unique and Diverse Tracks**

Explore an expansive collection of tracks, ranging from **straightforward dirt ovals** to complex, **demanding point-to-point courses**. Each environment presents a distinct and engaging test of your drifting capabilities.

**Choose Your Ideal Vehicle from Over 50 Cars**
