*   **Top-Down Stages:** Relive the classic top-down scrolling gameplay from the original's 'Enemy Encounter' stages, complete with remixed music.
*   **Multiplayer Mayhem:** Up to four players can compete in a chaotic melee of shooting and swinging.
*   **Artistic Direction:** Features in-game art designed by Shinkiro, a renowned artist from Capcom.

Persona 5 Royal: Your Ultimate Phantom Thief Journey

Dive into Persona 5 Royal, the definitive edition of the celebrated role-playing game. This enhanced version offers an unparalleled adventure, packed with all previously released downloadable content.

A New Life in Tokyo

The story begins with the protagonist transferring to a high school in Tokyo. Soon after arriving, he has a vivid dream where a mysterious voice declares, "You are truly a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you." Facing the looming threat of "rehabilitation," he must embrace the identity of a Phantom Thief. His vital mission is to liberate others from their corrupt desires.

Key Features of Persona 5 Royal

*   **Explore Tokyo:** Discover the vibrant streets and hidden corners of this bustling metropolis.
*   **Collect Personas:** Gather powerful allies to aid you in your quest.
*   **Customize Your Thieves Den:** Personalize your secret hideout and showcase your achievements.
*   **Shape Your Destiny:** Make choices that significantly impact the narrative and lead to multiple endings.

Embrace Your Phantom Thief Potential

Challenge societal norms and unlock your true capabilities. Fight for justice in this ultimate version of Persona 5 Royal, which includes over 40 previously released downloadable content items. Enhance your experience further by choosing between Japanese and English voice-overs.

Name: Divinity: Original Sin - Enhanced Edition
Description:
Gather your party and get back to the roots of great RPG gameplay. Discuss your decisions with companions; fight foes in turn-based combat; explore an open world and interact with everything and everyone you see. You take on the role of a young Source Hunter: your job is to rid the world of those who use the foulest of magics. Embarking on what should have been a routine murder investigation, you find yourself in the middle of a plot that threatens to destroy the very fabric of time. A complete revamp : Thousands of enhancements, full voiceovers, new game modes, full controller support, split-screen co-op, hours of new and revised story content, a brand-new ending, new weapon styles, new skills, new puzzles, new enemies, better loot, better balancing and much, much more! New game modes for extra replay . Explorer Mode for story-focused RPG fans. Classic Mode for those who want it just right. Tactician Mode for hardcore players, featuring fully reworked encounters, different traps and new and smarter enemy types. And Honour Mode, for the tactical geniuses among you! Pen-and-paper-like freedom . Explore many different environments, fight all kinds of fantastical creatures, and discover tons of desirable items. You will be amazed at how much freedom the games gives you. Manipulate the environment and use skill & spell combos to overcome your many foes. Warm up ice to create water. Boil the water to create a steam cloud. Electrify the steam cloud to create a static cloud and stun your enemies! Play with a friend in co-op multiplayer , either online or with dynamic split-screen. Unravel a deep and epic story , set in the early days of the Divinity universe. Discuss with your party members how to handle the many decisions you'll need to make. Classless creation lets you design the character of your choice . Endless item interaction and combinations take exploration and experimentation to new levels of freedom.

Name: God of War
Description:
Enter the Norse realm His vengeance against the Gods of Olympus years behind him, Kratos now lives as a man in the realm of Norse Gods and monsters. It is in this harsh, unforgiving world that he must fight to survive… and teach his son to do the same. Grasp a second chance Kratos is a father again. As mentor and protector to Atreus, a son determined to earn his respect, he is forced to deal with and control the rage that has long defined him while out in a very dangerous world with his son. Journey to a dark, elemental world of fearsome creatures From the marble and columns of ornate Olympus to the gritty forests, mountains and caves of pre-Viking Norse lore, this is a distinctly new realm with its own pantheon of creatures, monsters and gods. Engage in visceral, physical combat With an over the shoulder camera that brings the player closer to the action than ever before, fights in God of War™ mirror the pantheon of Norse creatures Kratos will face: grand, gritty and grueling. A new main weapon and new abilities retain the defining spirit of the God of War series while presenting a vision of conflict that forges new ground in the genre. PC FEATURES High Fidelity Graphics Striking visuals enhanced on PC. Enjoy true 4K resolution, on supported devices, [MU1] with unlocked framerates for peak performance. Dial in your settings via a wide range of graphical presets and options including higher resolution shadows, improved screen space reflections, the addition of GTAO and SSDO, and much more. NVIDIA® DLSS and Reflex Support Quality meets performance. Harness the AI power of NVIDIA Deep Learning Super Sampling (DLSS) to boost frame rates and generate beautiful, sharp images on select Nvidia GPUs. Utilize NVIDIA Reflex low latency technology allowing you to react quicker and hit harder combos with the responsive gameplay you crave on GeForce GPUs. Controls Customization Play your way. With support for the DUALSHOCK®4 and DUALSENSE® wireless controllers, a wide range of other gamepads, and fully customizable bindings for mouse and keyboard, you have the power to fine-tune every action to match your playstyle. Ultra-wide Support Immerse yourself like never before. Journey through the Norse realms taking in breathtaking vistas in panoramic widescreen. With 21:9 ultra-widescreen support, God of War™ presents a cinema quality experience that further expands the original seamless theatrical vision.

Prepare for the **deepest, most intricate world simulation** ever created. Dwarf Fortress goes beyond simple geometry, simulating an entire world with **rising and falling civilizations, unique personalities, creatures, and cultures**. This offers **infinite gameplay hours**, now enhanced with **beautiful pixel graphics**!

The legendary Dwarf Fortress is now on Steam! **Build a fortress and strive to help your dwarves survive** threats like starvation, dragons, and madness. This complex construction, management, and roguelike simulation presents a **unique challenge with every generated world**. These challenges arise from dwarves with their own simulated personalities or the ever-present threat of aquifers. Observe your civilization's decline and learn for next time… until something else inevitably goes wrong.

The **combat model is incredibly detailed**, featuring skills, body parts, material properties, aimed attacks, wrestling, pain, nausea, various poison effects, and much more. Hundreds of animals and monsters, many randomly created for each world, populate the game. You'll also find generated poetry, musical forms, instruments, and dances for your dwarves to practice and perform. A dynamic weather model tracks wind, humidity, and air masses to create fronts, clouds, storms, and blizzards. Over two hundred rock and mineral types can appear in their proper geological environments.

Remember the game's famous mantra: "**Losing is fun!**" The core of Dwarf Fortress remains unchanged, but now includes graphics and music by default. The new tileset features brand new pixel art, and the Steam edition boasts a 15-track soundtrack, including tracks in the Dwarvish language!

It's never been easier to start playing! **Improved new player experience with tutorials** will guide you through building your first fort and keeping your dwarves happy. Command your dwarves as they search for wealth in their generated mountain. Your dwarves will need food and beer, but also your guidance in surviving attacks from hostile civilizations, the wilderness, or even the dead.

Craft treasures and furniture, establish a barony, and support the nobility. Read your dwarves’ thoughts to keep them happy. Build floodgates to divert water or prevent magma mishaps. Construct buildings and watch your dwarves discover and build their culture, engaging in activities like running taverns, libraries, and temples, or developing skills in pottery, animal training, bookbinding, and more.

Dwarf Fortress served as the original inspiration for games like RimWorld, Prison Architect, and Minecraft. It was one of the first video games acquired by the Museum of Modern Art in New York. The game has been updated for over 16 years by its creators, brothers Tarn “Toady One” and Zach “Threetoe” Adams. With the ambitious goal of simulating all of existence, Bay 12 Games estimates they are only about 44% done.

Embark on an epic space adventure with **Galactic Civilizations® II: Ultimate Edition**. This comprehensive collection brings together the acclaimed base game, **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, the thrilling expansion **Dark Avatar**, and the concluding chapter, **Twilight of the Arnor**.

In **Galactic Civilizations II: Dread Lords**, you guide your civilization across a sprawling galaxy. Success hinges on mastering your economy, technology, diplomacy, culture, and military. Forge alliances, engage in warfare, and strive for ultimate galactic dominance. The game offers infinite replayability with its procedurally generated maps and a compelling narrative campaign against the formidable Dread Lords.

The **Dark Avatar** expansion introduces new layers of challenge and gameplay. It features new adversaries, advanced units, and an additional campaign. Players can exploit asteroid resources, colonize unique planets, employ espionage for sabotage, and forge new diplomatic agreements. The expansion also boasts a significantly enhanced artificial intelligence.

**Twilight of the Arnor** culminates the saga in 2227, with the galaxy embroiled in a desperate war against the Dread Lords. Humanity and its allies must unite to overcome this existential threat. This expansion introduces devastating Terror Stars, unique technological paths for each civilization, and powerful customization tools. Explore new ship designs and planetary enhancements.

The **Ultimate Edition** provides a complete space strategy experience, featuring:

*   **Visually stunning 3D graphics** for planets, ships, and combat.
*   **Deep ship customization** through the intuitive Shipyard.
*   Play as a variety of **distinct civilizations** or design your own.
*   Achieve victory through multiple paths: **military conquest, cultural influence, political maneuvering, technological superiority, or ascension**.
*   Experience **dynamic, evolving galaxies** and a **highly challenging AI**.
*   Compete with others online and benefit from **extensive modding capabilities**.
*   Engage in **complex and nuanced diplomacy** with alien races.

**Silent Hunter® III: A Deep Dive into WWII Submarine Warfare**

Silent Hunter® III stands as a premier WWII submarine simulation, offering an unparalleled level of realism. This installment introduces a completely new 3D engine, advanced crew management, and more authentic naval action than previous titles. Its visually stunning graphics and accessible, yet suspenseful, gameplay appeal to both hardcore simulation fans and newcomers to the genre.

The game plunges players into a meticulously recreated, lifelike environment. Experience a tense atmosphere enhanced by realistic 3D water effects, dynamic day-night cycles, and historically accurate submarines, vessels, and aircraft. As noted by one critic, the "detailed U-boat interiors, changing weather effects, and engaging audio represent the ultimate in WWII submarine warfare."

Take the helm of a formidable fleet of U-boats and weaponry. Players can command the Type II, VII, IX, and XXI submarines, tasked with intercepting Allied convoys and warships. Recreate the intense submarine duels of World War II by stealthily tracking enemy escorts, unleashing precise torpedo attacks, or engaging foes on the surface with your deck gun.

Craft your own authentic naval war narrative through the dynamic campaign. Your military journey unfolds based on strategic command decisions within an unscripted, non-linear WWII campaign.

Silent Hunter® III is designed for players of all experience levels. Its streamlined learning curve offers a more approachable experience than many traditional simulations. The integrated naval academy tutorial provides essential guidance. Furthermore, players can adjust realism settings to match their preferred style of WWII combat.

You will command a crew that reacts to your orders and evolves based on patrol outcomes. For an even more immersive experience, up to eight players can engage in cooperative multiplayer battles over a LAN connection.

Name: Into the Breach
Description:
The free major update, Into the Breach: Advanced Edition is now available! Nearly every aspect of the game is expanded with new content, including: New Mechs and Weapons: Five new mech squads and nearly forty new weapons. New Challenges: More enemies, more bosses, and more mission objectives. New Pilot Abilities: Four new pilots and triple the amount of pilot skills. “Unfair” Mode: A more challenging difficulty to test the most seasoned tacticians. The remnants of human civilization are threatened by gigantic creatures breeding beneath the earth. You must control powerful mechs from the future to hold off this alien threat. Each attempt to save the world presents a new randomly generated challenge in this turn-based strategy game from the makers of FTL. Key Features: Defend the Cities: Civilian buildings power your mechs. Defend them from the Vek and watch your fire! Perfect Your Strategy: All enemy attacks are telegraphed in minimalistic, turn-based combat. Analyze your opponent's attack and come up with the perfect counter every turn. Build the Ultimate Mech: Find powerful new weapons and unique pilots as you battle the Vek infestation across Corporate-Nation islands. Another Chance: Failure is not an option. When you are defeated, send help back through time to save another timeline!

Guild Wars 2 offers a vast open world focused on **discovery and exploration**. As you embark on your adventures, your **content guide** can offer suggestions, and your **compass** will point you toward interesting landmarks. Alternatively, simply choose a direction and let **adventure find you**.

Tyria is populated by characters with their own unique stories and objectives. You'll be **rewarded for helping them**, whether by completing renown hearts or participating in dynamic events. You can also thwart their plans for rewards.

When you encounter other players in the open world, you don't need to form a party to assist them. You can **lend a helping hand**, investigate a secret jumping puzzle, or team up against a formidable world boss. The game encourages playing your way, so **don't grind**!

Whether you're reviving fallen players, defending soldiers from a Risen onslaught, or gathering herbs, you'll **earn experience points**. As you play, you can **arm your character with an arsenal of new weapons**. Each profession wields these weapons differently, and every weapon type offers a distinct playstyle. You can further refine and customize your character by unlocking and equipping hundreds of skills and traits.

If you prefer immediate action, jump into **structured PvP**. Here, all players compete on an **equal footing**, with access to max-level gear and build options necessary to make your mark.

For those who love fashion, Guild Wars 2 provides ample opportunity to **express yourself through character design**. Equipping new weapons and armor unlocks their skins in your wardrobe. You can personalize your look with thousands of possible combinations and a vast selection of collectible dyes.

**Upgrade your free account** with a Guild Wars 2 expansion to gain access to login rewards, additional character and bag slots, expanded chat features, and more. You can visit the Black Lion Trading Company in-game and use your Steam Wallet for upgrades.

Expansions and Living World seasons introduce unique rewards and new **Masteries** to enhance your character's abilities. In **Guild Wars 2: Heart of Thorns**, you can unlock and upgrade your glider. **Guild Wars 2: Path of Fire** allows you to befriend a stable of mounts with powerful movement skills. **Guild Wars 2: End of Dragons** introduces fishing and skiff piloting. Each expansion also grants access to **nine elite specializations**, unlocking new weapon choices, skills, and abilities for your profession. You can also select the **revenant profession** at character creation, channeling legendary heroes and villains from Tyria's history.

Living World seasons continue the Guild Wars 2 narrative between expansions and must be purchased separately through your Story Journal or in Gem Store bundles. Playing Living World episodes unlocks new explorable zones, rewards, and Masteries. *Living World episodes become playable at level 80. Players may need to relaunch the game for the upgrade to take effect. **Please note that existing Guild Wars 2 player accounts cannot be accessed via Steam.

**The Making of Karateka: An Interactive Documentary**

Discover the fascinating story behind *Karateka*, the groundbreaking 1984 game that captivated players and launched the career of its creator, Jordan Mechner. This new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, part of their acclaimed Gold Master Series, offers an unprecedented look into the creation of a true gaming legend.

**Uncover the Genesis of a Masterpiece**

Step back in time and explore the meticulous process behind *Karateka*'s development. Through an extensive archive, you'll gain access to original design documents, playable prototypes, and exclusive video features. This immersive experience allows you to navigate interactive timelines at your own pace, much like a virtual museum dedicated to gaming history.

**Experience the Classics and Beyond**

Relive the magic with pixel-perfect versions of the original *Karateka* games. The collection also includes a selection of never-before-seen early prototypes, enhanced with modern conveniences like save-anywhere functionality, rewind options, chapter select, and insightful director's commentary.

**Two Remastered Experiences Await**

*Karateka Remastered* breathes new life into the original game, incorporating previously unreleased content, developer commentary, and achievements. Additionally, dive into *Deathbounce: Rebounded*, a thrilling twin-stick shooter inspired by an unpublished prototype from Jordan Mechner.

**A Legacy of Innovation**

Learn how *Karateka* pioneered several key game design elements, including cinematic cutscenes, an original musical score, rotoscoped animation, and a compelling Hollywood-style narrative. These innovations profoundly influenced the landscape of video games for decades to come.

**The Gold Master Series: Interactive Documentaries**

Digital Eclipse, known for titles like *Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection* and *Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration*, presents the Gold Master Series. This innovative format transforms iconic games into comprehensive interactive documentaries, celebrating the rich history of both the games and the brilliant minds behind them.

## Star Control III: Concluding the Saga in the Kessari Quadrant

**Star Control III** serves as the grand finale to the acclaimed Star Control series, thrusting players into the perilous Kessari Quadrant. A **galaxy-threatening danger** has emerged, and only you can prevent universal annihilation. This final installment introduces significant changes compared to its predecessor, **Star Control 2**. While these new ideas were appreciated by some, many long-time fans had **mixed reactions**.

Despite varied opinions on the gameplay changes, **Star Control III**'s story received widespread praise. Critics and players alike commended its **engaging narrative**, which included surprising plot twists, memorable characters, and pivotal moments. The game also features an **advanced diplomacy system**, enabling intricate interactions with diverse alien races, each possessing unique characteristics and goals. This strategic layer significantly enhances the game's depth.

One reviewer highlighted, "The story in **Star Control III** is its true masterpiece, crafting a compelling blend of mystery and feeling that stays with you." This rich narrative, coupled with challenging diplomatic puzzles, offers a distinctive experience. Whether you are a veteran player or new to the series, **Star Control III** provides a **memorable conclusion**. Embark on this final adventure and discover its unique charm.

Age of Empires IV brings the beloved real-time strategy (RTS) genre back to life, letting you dive into key historical battles. This new game combines classic empire-building with fresh ideas, all in stunning 4K.

**Build your empire** across a detailed historical world with eight unique civilizations, like the English, Chinese, and Delhi Sultanate. Success means building strong cities, managing resources wisely, and leading powerful armies on land and sea. The game offers four engaging story campaigns with 35 missions, covering 500 years of history from the Dark Ages to the Renaissance.

**Lead legendary figures** like Joan of Arc or Genghis Khan. Your strategic choices will shape the fate of empires.

A **Mod Editor** (currently in beta) allows for deep customization. Create custom maps, missions, data packs, and entirely new ways to play.

**Compete or cooperate** online with up to seven other players.

Age of Empires IV welcomes new players with a **thorough tutorial** covering RTS basics. The Campaign Story Mode is a great starting point. Experienced players will find **new strategies and combat options**. As one critic put it, "Age of Empires IV perfectly blends classic RTS with modern design."

**Company of Heroes 3 is here, bringing an expanded and enhanced real-time strategy experience to players worldwide.** This latest installment delivers its signature blend of intense action, deep tactics, and grand strategy to a new generation.

**Dive into two compelling campaigns and command four distinct multiplayer and co-op factions across a vibrant new theater of war.** Journey from the arid deserts of North Africa to the picturesque hills of Italy. Company of Heroes 3 introduces innovative features like **Full Tactical Pause** and a **Dynamic Campaign Map**, giving you unprecedented control over every battlefield.

The **Launch Edition**, available until March 2nd, includes the **Devil’s Brigade DLC Pack**. This pack features perks inspired by WWII commando units and legendary cosmetic items for US Snipers, Riflemen, Scouts, the M18 Hellcat, and the M8 Greyhound, plus a Pioneer Profile & Title.

**Company of Heroes 3 returns with the ultimate package of action, tactics, and strategy.** Engage in real-time combat, then step into the role of a General, guiding your campaign with critical decisions. Overwhelm enemies with four unique factions and new international Battlegroups. Command ground, air, and naval forces, and establish vital supply lines on the **Dynamic Campaign Map**, ensuring no two playthroughs are ever the same. Play at your own pace through campaign and skirmish modes before jumping into thrilling multiplayer battles. Discover untold stories within a stunning Mediterranean theater, featuring next-generation destructible environments powered by Relic's proprietary Essence Engine.

Company of Heroes 3 represents the next evolution of acclaimed tactical gameplay. Beloved combat mechanics are combined with authentic new features, creating the **deepest tactical experience to date**. Utilize daring flanking maneuvers, experience new infantry breaching mechanics, and master elevation to gain a crucial advantage.

Welcome to the Mediterranean, a breathtaking new theater filled with untold wartime stories. Confront fierce enemy forces across Italian mountain passes, stunning coastal landscapes, and the vast deserts of North Africa. Authentic and diverse environments, rendered with stunning visuals, will challenge your strategic thinking. Mountainous maps demand different tactics than coastal towns, with verticality significantly impacting unit line of sight. Desert plains require careful reconnaissance and bold armored assaults. On this new frontline, intelligence and clever use of terrain are key to outmaneuvering and defeating your opponents.

Experience the **largest single-player campaign in the franchise's history**. The new **Dynamic Campaign Map** offers 'sandbox-style' gameplay, allowing you to command the overall war effort and make strategic choices like never before. Establish crucial supply lines, launch air and naval strikes, and liberate towns to build a Partisan spy network. Choose your forces and upgrade veteran companies to suit your playstyle. The optional **Full Tactical Pause** feature gives you complete control over the pacing of single-player action, allowing you to plan and execute precise attacks.

Company of Heroes 3 appeals to even the most dedicated WWII enthusiasts with the **largest number of launch factions in the series**. New army customization mechanics let you call upon a variety of specialist units, including the American-Canadian Special Service Forces and the renowned Gurkhas from the Commonwealth. From powerful tank destroyers to stealthy recon vehicles, Company of Heroes 3 boasts the **largest unit roster to date**. Debut units include the super-light Weasel, the armor-piercing Nashorn, and the Chaffee Light Tank. Revamped classics like the M3 Recovery Vehicle Halftrack return, now capable of repairing and even stealing abandoned enemy vehicles.

Experience the visceral impact of every mortar shell and naval bombardment with Relic's advanced Essence Engine. In Company of Heroes 3, every location is a **fully destructible sandbox**, opening up endless tactical possibilities. Demolish fortified buildings onto enemy squads and witness enhanced destruction mechanics as soldiers use fresh ruins for dynamic cover. Stunning new rendering and particle effects bring fire, sand, and smoke to life. Brilliant new soldier animations and improved AI deliver realistic squad reactions to the battlefield. Optimized for DirectX 12 and multi-core CPUs, Relic's new engine technology delivers cinematic action comparable to Hollywood blockbusters.

**Worbital** is a real-time space war game where you command planets. Your objective is to build defenses and unleash devastating weapons to eliminate all rival civilizations within a perilous solar system.

Engage in intense **artillery duels** between planets, where mastering gravity is key to landing accurate shots and inflicting maximum damage. Your arsenal includes the ability to **manipulate asteroids**, create **black holes**, and trigger **solar flares**. Be warned: destroying planets can initiate chain reactions, obliterating nearby worlds.

**Strategic planning and construction** are paramount. Select from a diverse array of unique weapons and structures, such as **Railguns, Lasers, World Rammers, Magnets, Orbit Boosters, Shield Defenses, Attack Ships, and Colonizers**. While the gameplay is action-packed, the game humorously claims "100% pseudo-scientifically accurate" status, prioritizing enjoyment over rigid scientific adherence.

**Worbital** provides thrilling **multiplayer** experiences for friends globally. Execute well-timed attacks and defenses to outmaneuver your opponents. Choose from **Online Multiplayer**, **Split-Screen Multiplayer** (requiring gamepads), **Single Player Skirmish**, or a **Single Player Campaign**. You can also configure **Custom Rules Matches**. The game is available in English, German, French, Spanish, and Finnish.

**The Battle of Polytopia: A Strategic Conquest of Unique Tribes**

In **The Battle of Polytopia**, players embark on a quest to **rule the world** through strategic turn-based gameplay. This engaging title immerses you in a vibrant universe filled with diverse lands, distinct tribes, innovative technologies, and enchanting magic.

The game's setting is **The Square**, an unusual, flat, and square-shaped planet inhabited by the Polytopians. These inhabitants are a spirited and competitive people, organized into **15 unique tribes**. Each tribe is characterized by its own specific traits, objectives, advantages, and disadvantages, offering varied gameplay experiences.

As the leader of one of these tribes, your objective is to **develop your civilization** while outmaneuvering and conquering rival tribes.

Consider leading the **Xin-Xi**, a tribe known for its traditionalism and cautious approach to new developments. Alternatively, you might choose the **Hoodrick**, a tribe celebrated for its archery prowess, deep connection to nature, and fondness for culinary delights. The **Bardur**, who are partial to their local tavern and a distinctive beverage known as Ullefurgh, also present an interesting choice.

However, caution is advised when encountering the **Vengir**. These formidable warriors, who ride purple rhino-pigs, are notorious pillagers. They are often found sharpening their swords or enjoying a respite at the misty Kithkga Boneyards. It is generally advisable to avoid provoking them.

## Nova-111: Master Strategy and Puzzles in a Unique Sci-Fi Adventure

Embark on a **cosmic journey** in Nova-111, a unique sci-fi adventure that masterfully blends **challenging puzzles** with **strategic combat**. This game invites you to explore a surreal world where the lines between turn-based and real-time gameplay blur. To survive, you'll need to collect new abilities and upgrade your starship, remembering that **SCIENCE is your greatest weapon**.

The heart of Nova-111 lies in its **innovative gameplay**, which fuses turn-based and real-time elements. This unique combination forces players to think differently and adapt their strategies on the fly, creating a constantly evolving challenge. You'll encounter **strategic combat scenarios** where intellect triumphs over brute force, and face **mind-warping puzzles** designed to test your cognitive skills. Each planet is a **beautifully crafted world** presenting distinct enemies, environmental hurdles, and specific strategies for achieving victory.

As you advance, you'll unlock **powerful abilities**, including special lasers and the game-changing **TIME-STOP ability**, allowing you to manipulate time itself. The game also emphasizes customization through **ship upgrades and modules**, enabling you to tailor your vessel to overcome any obstacle. A **dynamic soundtrack** enhances the immersive atmosphere by adapting to your actions. Ultimately, Nova-111 celebrates scientific advancement, reinforcing the core message that **SCIENCE is your greatest weapon**. This title is brought to you by former developers of the PixelJunk series and is supported by Indie Fund.

**Medieval Kingdom Wars: A Deep Dive into the Hundred Years' War**

Step into the brutal reality of the Hundred Years' War with **Medieval Kingdom Wars**, a game that plunges you into the heart of 14th-century conflict. Starting in 1336, you'll rise from a minor noble to a powerful leader, commanding over 50 distinct Lords across more than a dozen playable nations. This grand strategy experience seamlessly blends real-time action with deep strategic planning, offering a unique and personal narrative for every player.

The game presents a wealth of gameplay options. Engage in the sprawling **Grand Campaign**, test your skills in classic RTS skirmishes with solo, co-op, or multiplayer modes, or experience a compelling story through nine meticulously crafted scenarios in the introductory campaign. At its core, Medieval Kingdom Wars operates in **real-time**, featuring a rogue-like progression where every decision has immediate consequences. This innovative system merges Fixed Force and RTS gameplay, allowing you to manage armies on the battlefield while simultaneously building siege camps, gathering resources, and training troops. Prepare for **epic and brutal battles**, with up to 120 battalions clashing in bloody sieges, intense field engagements, and visceral naval warfare, all rendered with gritty historical realism. Mechanics like looting corpses and dismantling towns for resources add to the raw survival element.

Beyond the battlefield, you'll experience **granular town management**, entering settlements in RTS mode to directly command peasants, construct buildings, and strategically position your forces. This detailed control complements the broader kingdom management on the world map. The game also boasts a **complex historical tech tree** with over 240 innovations, reflecting the significant advancements of the Late Middle Ages, from religious developments to groundbreaking siege tactics. As your power grows, you'll navigate **feudal diplomacy and rebellion**, maintaining loyalty to your King, fostering relationships with other lords, and ultimately plotting your own path to overthrowing the crown. This involves hiring new Lords, dividing land, and engaging in sophisticated European diplomacy.

Explore a **living, breathing world** featuring nearly 200 hand-crafted towns and hamlets across Western Europe, each a historically accurate reproduction. The game further immerses you with dynamic weather and season changes, a social component for the grand campaign, over 30 unique units and siege weapons per nation, authentic instrumental music, and powerful World Editor and modding tools. This ambitious indie production, developed by just three individuals, also promises free updates and real-time in-game help from volunteer Mods and Developers.

Name: Eximius: Seize the Frontline
Description:
Eximius is a Strategic Action Shooter (FPS/RTS Hybrid) that focuses on squad-based combat. Eximius combines tactical First Person Shooter gameplay with high level strategic decision-making of a Real-time Strategy(RTS) game. The game features a competitive 5v5 team battles where players square off in a post apocalyptic urban environment. Play as a Commander ( RTS ) ; build base, train an army and call down support abilities to help your allies on the ground to gain territory. Play as an Officer ( FPS ) ; lead your infantry squad into combat and crush your enemies with your agile tactics or brute force. Capture resources for your team, upgrade weapons and equip battlesuits suitable for your combat role. Eximius provides a multi-role gameplay experience where each player could choose to play a diversely different role and fight not only with brawns but also with their brains. An expert shooter could be outnumbered, ambushed and overwhelmed if caught in a wrong position. While a scheming officer could be assassinated in the right moment at the frontline. Objectives The objective of the gameplay is to win by holding down the most victory points. Alternatively, if your forces are powerful enough, you can completely destroy your enemy’s base and win the match immediately. The command headquarters cannot be rebuilt and the game will be instantly over. Seamless Transition As a commander , you are also an officer. But you have the extra capability to switch to top down RTS interface to build bases and command units. An aggressive commander can also join the battle in the frontline but they are normally expected to stay in relative safety and manage base development. Commander needs to be nominated by the team. Base Building As the gameplay of Eximius revolves around Team vs Team battles, each team shares a base, resource and technology tree. RTS Commander to support the battle operations by training infantry units and vehicles,building bases and call in airstrikes or support abilities. Train Armies Commander can train AI infantry and assign them to players. Leading them as a frontline officer; your squad will fight with you sensibly , taking cover and help you both offensively and defensively. Tactical Battles Decide your combat roles and purchase weapons suitable to your play style and tactics. Your weapon and equipment determine your roles in the team. Respond to enemy strategy with appropriate firepower and equipments; be it vehicles , massive amount of infantry or sneaky players. Unlock Technologies As your resources and technology grow, you can construct increasingly powerful units such as armored vehicles, gunships and elite soldiers. Your team can also gain powerful team abilities when you tech up to new tiers. Call down artillery, deploy quick-response force or launch EMP strikes. BattleSuits The pinnacle of each team’s firepower is the legendary battle-suit. Equipping battlesuits allow players to use powerful abilities, have increased stats and is able to push the frontline much faster. Officers will have choice of several choice of battlesuits, each with their own play style and set of abilities. Axeron Corporation ( AXR ) AXR is private research organisation that turned into a security contractor out of global needs. Being at the forefront of science, many believes that this wealthy organisation holds key technologies that could bring about global peace. With limited manpower , the Axeron industrial complex produces highly advanced drones for their workforce , both for military and nonmilitary use. This elusive organisation operates in an extremely organised and stealthy manner. Nations that choose to fund AXR do so for their advanced scientific capability and confidence that they will be the solution to the growing mutant threat. Global Security Force ( GSF ) A peacekeeping organisation set up after the first initial great war; the GSF foundation is built upon the principles of securing the walls, recovering human survivors and rebuilding the civilized world. They command the largest military force in the world and operates on a near limitless budget. Nations that choose to fund GSF do so for their vast armies and their global presence.

Name: Line Of Defense Tactics - Tactical Advantage
Description:
A real-time strategy combat game based on the world of the Line Of Defense. Command a team of four Galactic Command marines in highly classified missions in space and on planets. Equip your team with all types of inventory items, including weapons of mass destruction, space and planetary vehicles as they fight hard to accomplish their missions based on issue #0 of the Line Of Defense comic by DC Comics. Line Of Defense Tactics also contains a full database of all assets from Line Of Defense MMO game – making it an excellent companion app Action based storyline based on the Line Of Defense comics Real time tactical combat with a persistent team of characters Fight the enemy in ship to ship combat, inside their bases, and on the ground Command infantry, autonomous androids, and vehicles to complete your missions Call in airstrikes, deploy turrets, and gain access to advanced weaponry as you progress Access the Line Of Defense MMO game's unit and equipment database for intel Line Of Defense is also available for mobile (iOS, Android) devices, PC and Mac OSX.

Name: Eternal Starlight VR
Description:
Activate your Neural Link to gain an omniscient view of the battlefield. Experience the conflict at any scale, as you plot the course that will lead your fleet to victory. Eternal Starlight is a tactical space combat game, built from the ground up for VR. Grabbing toy sized spaceships is so cool, you'll want to make Pew-Pew noises. Meet (and vaporize) colorful alien species, collect technology to upgrade your vessels and plot your next hyperspace jump while defending the remaining colonies of the human race. The game features dozens of vessels and over a hundred unique ship systems for you to acquire and experiment with. Positioning your ships and using their unique abilties will be key to defeating the foes you face. Utilizing an intuitive locomotion system, you can freely move through space by grabbing it. Zoom out to view the entire battlefield or focus in on a single fighter. Play seated, standing or in full room scale. Newly Added: ENDLESS MODE Choose from one of five unlockable factions and head off on a brand new procedurally generated adventure to reach The Center, a powerful alien structure with the potentially to shift the balance of power. Brand new enemies and weapons. Tailor your run to your liking by choosing your own difficulty modifiers. Dozens of updates and improvements. Available now!

Name: Nightmare Survival
Description:
Nightmare Survival is an arcade survival and scoring game. Kill monsters and score as many points as possible! Monsters have started to hunt you, and you need to defend yourself with a toy Kalashnikov assault rifle. The terrain is extremely limited, and the number of monsters is growing every minute, so you shouldn't retreat to avoid being trapped.

**Conquer the World in Sid Meier's Civilization V**

Sid Meier's Civilization V is a strategy game where you lead a civilization from its humble beginnings to a future empire. Your goal is to achieve global dominance through **mastery of warfare, diplomacy, and technological progress**. Interact with famous historical leaders and guide your people to victory.

The game offers a **compelling blend of accessibility and strategic depth**. New players will find the interface easy to learn, while experienced strategists will appreciate the intricate gameplay. Civilization V features **beautifully designed maps** for exploration and conquest, and a **dynamic multiplayer mode** for challenging friends online or locally. The game also boasts **broad PC compatibility**, running well on a wide range of hardware.

Key innovations include a **hexagonal map system** that enhances tactical combat and city management. The introduction of **City-States** adds a new layer to diplomacy, and an **improved diplomacy system** allows for more engaging interactions with other leaders. The **Modding SDK is freely available**, and Civilization V supports Mac, Linux, and SteamOS, with multiple language options.

**World of Goo** is an acclaimed physics-based puzzle and construction game where players manipulate living, squirming, and talking globs of goo. Your objective is to strategically drag and drop these **Goo Balls** to construct a variety of imaginative structures. These creations can range from essential bridges and powerful cannonballs to whimsical zeppelins and even enormous tongues. Millions of these eager Goo Balls inhabit the vibrant World of Goo, driven by an innate desire to explore, entirely unaware of their role in a game or their surprisingly delicious nature.

The game unfolds across **Mysterious Levels**, each presenting a uniquely dangerous yet beautiful environment. These levels introduce novel puzzles, distinct geographical areas, and the peculiar creatures that call them home. As you advance, you'll encounter **undiscovered species of Goo Ball**, each boasting its own special abilities. These diverse goo balls then unite to navigate compelling narratives filled with discovery, love, conspiracy, beauty, the mysteries of electric power, and the intricacies of the third dimension. An **enigmatic figure known as The Sign Painter** observes your progress throughout your journey. Furthermore, the **World of Goo Corporation**, a prominent entity that proudly proclaims itself the Global Leader in Goo and Goo-Related Products, plays a significant role. Their product line includes trademarked soft drinks and luxurious facial exfoliating lotions – truly succulent offerings! Finally, players worldwide can participate in a **Massive Online Competition**, vying for the top spot on a dynamic leaderboard by constructing the tallest goo towers within the mysterious sandbox of the World of Goo Corporation. The corporation is contractually obligated to declare all participants winners and enthusiastically celebrates every tower-building endeavor equally. Congratulations, and good luck!

**Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director's Cut: A Definitive Cyberpunk RPG Experience**

Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director's Cut is the ultimate version of Harebrained Schemes' acclaimed Dragonfall campaign. Originally a major expansion for Shadowrun Returns, this standalone release offers a richer experience with **new content and enhancements**. Players can expect **five new missions**, alternate endings, fresh music, a better interface, expanded team customization, and a revamped combat system. This makes it the definitive edition of this unique cyberpunk RPG. Existing owners of the Dragonfall expansion for Shadowrun Returns will receive the Director's Cut automatically and for free on Steam.

**A World of Magic and Machines**

The year is 2012, when magic returned, awakening mythical creatures. The Great Dragon Feuerschwinge descended from German mountains, causing widespread destruction. It took German forces months to defeat the beast, an event known as "The Dragonfall."

Forty-two years later, in 2054, the world is transformed. Technology has blurred the lines between humans and machines. Elves and trolls are common, corporations exploit global resources, and Feuerschwinge's reign is a distant memory. Germany is fragmented, ruled by anarchy called the "Flux State," with Berlin at its center. Power is unstable, morality is flexible, and connections are vital for survival. This chaotic city offers lucrative opportunities for shadowrunners. However, a new threat emerges, promising widespread chaos and drawing the team into a deadly conspiracy. The only clue: whispers of the Dragonfall and rumors that the Great Dragon Feuerschwinge might still be alive.

**Key Features of Shadowrun: Dragonfall - Director's Cut**

*   **Classic Story-Driven RPG:** Dragonfall offers a novelistic, branching narrative with sharp writing and deep character development, reminiscent of classic computer RPGs. Enjoy a compelling 20+ hour campaign with a diverse cast of characters.

*   **Unique Cyberpunk Setting:** Experience Shadowrun's distinctive "Tech meets Magic" dystopian future. Dragonfall - Director's Cut is a perfect introduction for newcomers to the Shadowrun universe, while also appealing to veteran players.

*   **Command Your Team:** Lead a specialized team of shadowrunners, each with unique perspectives and motivations. These team members fill different roles during missions, bringing distinct skills and abilities. Players can also influence their personal challenges.

*   **Gripping Tactical Combat:** Every decision matters in shadowrunning. Strategic choices are crucial, from finding cover to using powerful spells. With over 200 weapons and spells, each turn offers meaningful tactical decisions.

*   **Skill-Based Character Progression:** Start by choosing a character archetype and then shape their development. Street Samurai and Physical Adepts excel in combat, while Shamans and Mages wield powerful magic. Riggers and Deckers provide technological support. Shadowrun: Dragonfall's flexible, classless skill system allows for any character build.

**New in the Director's Cut**

*   **Standalone Release:** Due to player demand, Dragonfall is now a completely independent title.

*   **Five All-New Missions:** The Director's Cut includes five original missions, three of which explore your team members' personal stories. These missions feature new environments, challenging enemies, and difficult choices.

*   **Revamped Combat System:** Combat mechanics have been significantly updated. A new armor system adds tactical depth, while refined cover and damage mechanics emphasize positioning. The upgraded AI reacts more intelligently to player actions.

*   **Redesigned Interface:** The in-game interface is rebuilt for better usability. Spells, items, and abilities are more accessible, and enhanced combat feedback clarifies the tactical situation.

*   **Customize Your Team:** Guide your team members' progression and customize their loadouts, including spells, items, or weapons for each mission.

*   **Ten New Music Tracks:** Composer Jon Everist adds ten new atmospheric cyberpunk music tracks, inspired by the team members' stories.

*   **Complete Soundtrack:** The Director's Cut includes the full soundtracks from Dragonfall and Shadowrun Returns, plus the new Director's Cut tracks. These offer a modern take on the series' iconic sound.

*   **And More:** The Director's Cut also features Steam Achievements, Trading Cards, new alternate endings, enhanced visual effects (including gore), improved animations, new bioware augmentations, a variety of new items and spells, expanded player customization, deeper character development for side characters, and numerous writing and design refinements.

**Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition: A Strategic Defense Against the Undead**

In Plants vs. Zombies GOTY Edition, players are tasked with defending their homes against a relentless zombie horde. This tower-defense strategy game, developed by PopCap Games, challenges you to deploy a diverse array of plant-based weaponry. From the rapid-fire peashooters to the explosive cherry bombs, each plant offers unique abilities to combat the advancing undead. Success hinges on strategic placement and quick decision-making as you face numerous zombie types, each with their own strengths and weaknesses. The game introduces environmental challenges such as fading daylight, obscuring fog, and the tricky swimming pool, adding layers of complexity to the gameplay. With five distinct game modes, including the popular Adventure mode, players can expect hours of engaging entertainment.

The GOTY Edition expands upon the original experience with a wealth of content. The Adventure mode alone features 50 levels, taking players through various settings like day, night, fog, a swimming pool, and even a rooftop. A total of 26 different zombie types, including the agile pole-vaulter and the formidable Zomboni drivers, stand in your way. To counter these threats, players can unlock and cultivate 49 different plants, earning coins to purchase helpful power-ups and a pet snail. The game's Almanac serves as an in-game encyclopedia, providing detailed information on all plants and zombies, complete with humorous "facts" and quotes, as noted by gaming publications like IGN. Crazy Dave's shop offers a crucial resource for acquiring special plants and essential tools to bolster your defenses. Beyond the core gameplay, the GOTY Edition boasts impressive graphics and a captivating soundtrack, further enhanced by a bonus music video. As highlighted by reviews from GameSpot, the game offers significant replayability, with each playthrough presenting a fresh strategic puzzle. Players can also strive to unlock all available Steam Achievements, adding another layer of challenge and reward.

**Machinarium: A Beloved Robot Adventure Reimagined**

The definitive version of the award-winning adventure game, Machinarium, is now available! Developed by Amanita Design, the creative minds behind Samorost, Botanicula, and CHUCHEL, this beloved title invites players to step into the metal shoes of Josef, a small robot unceremoniously discarded in a junkyard. Driven by a mission to rescue his robot girlfriend, Berta, from the clutches of the nefarious Black Cap Brotherhood, Josef must return to the city and confront the gang.

This enhanced version of Machinarium boasts a full-screen experience, 12 new achievements to unlock, support for additional languages, and full controller compatibility, making it more accessible and immersive than ever before.

**A World of Robots and Intrigue**

Machinarium's unique world is exclusively inhabited by robots of diverse designs and purposes. The game unfolds within the legendary, old, and rusty city of Machinarium itself, a place steeped in history and robotic life.

**Story and Puzzles**

The core narrative revolves around Josef's quest to thwart the wicked robots of the Black Cap Brotherhood. His mission is twofold: to save the city's leader and, more importantly, his beloved robot companion. To achieve this, players will engage with a variety of challenges, including intricate logical puzzles, engaging adventure quests, mind-bending brain teasers, and captivating mini-games.

**Artistry and Sound**

Visually, Machinarium is a feast for the eyes. All backgrounds and characters are meticulously hand-drawn in 2D, featuring over an hour of expertly animated sequences. Complementing the stunning visuals is a beautiful original soundtrack, masterfully composed and recorded by Floex, the artist also known for the Samorost 2 OST.

**Unique Communication Style**

One of Machinarium's distinctive features is its approach to dialogue. Instead of lengthy, uninspired conversations, characters communicate through visual means. Comic bubbles, simple animations, and symbolic representations convey their thoughts and intentions, offering a fresh and engaging way to experience the game's narrative.

**PuzzleQuest: Challenge of the Warlords** is a unique game that blends **engaging match-3 puzzle mechanics** with an epic narrative. Your mission is to liberate the **Kingdom of Etheria** from the tyrannical Lord Bane. Success hinges on your **match-3 skills** as you face off against computer-controlled adversaries.

The fundamental gameplay revolves around matching **different crystal types**. Successfully making these matches fuels your spells, which are crucial for hindering your opponents and reducing their health. Winning these strategic battles allows you to **strengthen your hero**. For those seeking immediate action, a **quick-play mode** is also offered.

Embark on an adventure through the richly detailed **Kingdom of Etheria**. The game boasts an extensive **single-player campaign** featuring over 150 quests. Alternatively, you can dive into **Quick-play mode** for a focused puzzle-solving experience. As you progress, you will **grow your influence** by capturing cities and enlisting new allies. You'll **accumulate gold** to acquire essential equipment such as helms and armor. Special **experience tiles** enhance your character's abilities, while **skull tiles** inflict damage on enemies, introducing a direct offensive element to the puzzle-solving.

Name: SpaceChem
Description:
Zachtronics is back with an ambitious new design-based puzzle game. Take on the role of a Reactor Engineer working for SpaceChem , the leading chemical synthesizer for frontier colonies. Construct elaborate factories to transform raw materials into valuable chemical products! Streamline your designs to meet production quotas and survive encounters with the sinister threats that plague SpaceChem . KEY FEATURES: Over Fifty Mind-bending Puzzles! An original soundtrack by Evan Le Ny, whose music was featured in The Codex of Alchemical Engineering! Twenty challenging achievements!

Superbrothers: Sword & Sworcery EP is a critically acclaimed audiovisual adventure game that invites players into a mythic realm. Developed by Superbrothers Inc. and brought to life by Capy in Toronto, Canada, the game blends exploratory action with unique "sworcery" mechanics to solve mystical musical puzzles. Its distinctive art style and immersive soundtrack, composed by Jim Guthrie, have earned it widespread recognition, including being named Best Videogame Music of 2011 by Kotaku.

The gameplay centers on a relaxed journey through a bronze age wilderness, guiding a warrior monk on a quest to aid The Scythian. Players will encounter enigmatic musical puzzles that are integral to progressing the story. The game's world is a beautifully painted, mythopoetic creation, influenced by real-world moon phases, offering an experience akin to inhabiting a prog rock concept album. The Enhanced Edition boasts sharp, remastered visuals and refined audio, with Capy also re-engineering the game to include two-button mouse support. For those who wish to share the experience, optional Twitter integration allows for cooperative clue-sharing.

Jim Guthrie's "Sword & Sworcery LP: The Ballad of the Space Babies" is a standout element of the game, praised by figures like Double Fine's Tim Schafer, who famously stated, "The music is amazing. I want Jim Guthrie to score my life." The album features a rich tracklist, including "Dark Flute," "Lone Star," and "The Ballad Of The Space Babies," alongside a collection of bonus tracks. The soundtrack can be found within the Steam directory at `...Steam\steamapps\common\superbrothers sword & sworcery ep\soundtrack`.

Name: Puzzle Quest 2
Description:
Escape to a puzzle game fantasy world filled with amazing creatures, powerful weapons, and challenging minigames! Addicting Match 3 gameplay is blended seamlessly with immersive role playing in this sequel to the award-winning Puzzle Quest! Jump right into the action and customize your character with any one of four classes, each with different skills and abilities. Gain experience and earn treasure as you progress through the adventure, unlocking new spells and harder Match 3 challenges! Are you a brave enough hero to reclaim the once peaceful village of Verloren from the evil clutches of the demon Gorgon? Key Features Learn to use new mana gems, spells, weapons and much more. Customize your characters with 4 classes in both genders. Explore an immense and immersive fantasy world in story mode! Play tons of unique minigames to earn treasure and experience. Upgrade and equip your character then battle your friends online!

**Divide By Sheep: A Grim Puzzle Adventure**

"Divide By Sheep" is a unique puzzle adventure game where players guide a flock of sheep to safety through a series of increasingly perilous challenges. The game cleverly integrates fundamental mathematical concepts, such as addition and subtraction, into a darkly humorous narrative. The unusual premise involves the Grim Reaper, who, in his quest for companionship, causes a catastrophic flood to gather sheep. Players are then tasked with helping these stranded sheep escape rapidly sinking islands by solving ingenious math puzzles.

The game's progression is a key feature, beginning with a lighthearted introduction to mathematical concepts that swiftly escalates in complexity and macabre wit. As noted by one reviewer, "The puzzles start off fairly easy and playful, yet quickly escalate in both difficulty and dark humor." "Divide By Sheep" presents 120 mind-bending challenges spread across four distinct worlds. Players will encounter various obstacles and elements, including lasers, wolves, and even the Grim Reaper's pet kraken. The game's own pragmatic advice encourages players to "Do whatever it takes to succeed," which may involve making difficult decisions about the fate of sheep, wolves, or pigs.

The visual style of "Divide By Sheep" is also striking, transitioning from charmingly cute to unsettlingly disturbing. This unique visual evolution was pointed out by an observer who commented, "Fabulous art-work that quickly goes from cute to disturbing." Given the mature themes, parental guidance is strongly advised. To make the game more accessible to younger players, the developers have included an option in the main menu to disable blood effects, offering a more child-friendly experience. It is recommended to utilize parental controls before giving the game to children.

**LEGO® Batman™ 2: DC Super Heroes: Gotham's Greatest Alliance**

In **LEGO® Batman™ 2: DC Super Heroes**, Gotham City faces a new threat. This time, Batman and Robin are joined by an **epic team-up of iconic DC Comics heroes**, including Superman, Wonder Woman, and Green Lantern. Their critical mission is to stop the **villainous Lex Luthor and the Joker** from plunging Gotham into chaos.

This game introduces many **new features** to the LEGO gaming experience. Players can **unlock and play as over 50 DC Comics characters**, each with unique abilities. A major innovation is the introduction of **new Super Abilities**. Imagine **free-roaming flight**, using **Super-Breath** to interact with the environment, or employing **Heat Vision** to clear obstacles. The game also boasts **advanced suits and gadgets**, such as Batman's **Power Suit** and Robin's **Hazard Suit** with its **Pressure Cannon**. You can explore the vast **Gotham City** by foot, air, or by using vehicles like the Batmobile, Batwing, and Batboat.

A significant advancement for the LEGO series is the inclusion of **fully voiced characters**, which greatly enhances player immersion. For cooperative play, the game offers **seamless drop-in/drop-out co-op** and **dynamic split-screen**, making it easy for friends and family to join the adventure together.

**LEGO® Harry Potter: Years 5-7: Relive the Epic Conclusion**

Experience the thrilling conclusion of Harry Potter's saga with **LEGO® Harry Potter: Years 5-7**. This video game faithfully recreates the events from the final three books and four films. You'll guide Harry from his departure from Privet Drive through the grand halls of Hogwarts, encountering **new characters** and overcoming **exciting challenges** on the path to the ultimate confrontation with **Lord Voldemort**.

Immerse yourself in a world brimming with magic and adventure. **Learn powerful spells**, including the forbidden Unforgivable Curses. Engage in **magical duels** against Voldemort's Death Eaters. Unlock a roster of over **100 iconic characters**, such as Fenrir Greyback, Bellatrix Lestrange, and Professor Slughorn. Discover **new and significant locations**, including Grimmauld Place, the Ministry of Magic, and Godric's Hollow. Additionally, enjoy **seamless co-op play** with dynamic split-screen, making it ideal for shared adventures.

**Stop Rex Fury in LEGO® City Undercover as Detective Chase McCain!**

In LEGO® City Undercover, you step into the shoes of Detective Chase McCain. Your mission is to stop the notorious criminal Rex Fury, who has escaped and is causing chaos throughout LEGO City. It's your job to bring him to justice and restore order to the streets.

This action-adventure game invites you to explore a **vast, open-world LEGO City** featuring over **20 distinct districts**. You can also team up with a friend for **two-player cooperative gameplay**. Your tasks involve apprehending car thieves, discovering **hilarious movie references**, and piloting a wide array of vehicles. The city is also packed with **hundreds of hidden collectibles**. The game is celebrated for its **witty, original narrative** and its **distinctive LEGO humor**, ensuring an enjoyable experience for all players. As one developer noted, the game provides a "truly engaging experience" that perfectly embodies the LEGO spirit.

Embark on an **epic adventure** with LEGO® The Lord of the Rings™, a game that faithfully recreates the iconic motion picture trilogy. This immersive experience guides players through the **legendary storylines** of *The Fellowship of the Ring*, *The Two Towers*, and *The Return of the King*, all reimagined with the signature humor and **boundless creativity** of LEGO play.

You'll follow Frodo Baggins on his **perilous quest** to destroy an ancient, malevolent ring that endangers all of Middle-earth. Forced to abandon his tranquil home, Frodo must journey to Mount Doom, the **sole location** where the ring can be unmade. This arduous path is fraught with danger, including relentless Orcs and even **more sinister entities**.

To aid Frodo in this monumental task, a **diverse Fellowship** is assembled. This esteemed group includes Aragorn the Ranger, Gandalf the Wizard, Legolas the Elf, Gimli the Dwarf, Boromir, a noble Man of Gondor, and Frodo's loyal Hobbit companions: Sam, Merry, and Pippin. Players will **relive this timeless legend** through beloved LEGO mini-figures, exploring the vast wonders of Middle-earth, solving **challenging riddles**, and confronting countless adversaries in their ultimate mission to **annihilate the Ring**.

Key features of LEGO The Lord of the Rings include:

*   **Explore the vast open-world** of Middle-earth, engaging in **thrilling battles** against formidable foes such as Orcs, Uruk-hai, the Balrog, the Witch-king, and other terrifying creatures.
*   **Harness the power of the Palantír**, or Seeing-stone, allowing you to **seamlessly switch** between multiple story-lines.
*   Experience the **beloved heroes** of LEGO The Lord of the Rings brought to life like never before, with mini-figure characters delivering **authentic dialogue** directly from the films.
*   **Collect, combine, and forge new items** at the Blacksmith Shop, utilizing the precious metal known as Mithril.
*   **Discover and unlock over 80 playable characters**, including fan favorites like Frodo, Aragorn, and Gandalf, alongside many others.
*   **Wield an array of powerful weaponry and magical items**, such as the Light of Earendil, Elven rope, various swords, and bows.
*   Enjoy **seamless drop-in, drop-out gameplay**, making it easy to play with family and friends.

Name: LEGO® Batman™: The Videogame
Description:
When all the villains in Arkham Asylum team up and break loose, only the dynamic duo is bold enough to take them on to save Gotham City. The fun of LEGO, the drama of Batman and the uniqueness of the combination makes for a comical and exciting adventure in LEGO Batman: The Videogame. Play as Batman and his sidekick Robin as you build, drive, swing and fight your way through Gotham City capturing escaped villains including The Joker, Penguin, Scarecrow and more. Then, jump into the story from the other side and play as Batmans foes! Enjoy the power you wield and battle Batman while spreading chaos throughout the city. There is no rest for the good (or evil!).

**LEGO® Harry Potter™: Years 1-4 - A Magical Adventure Awaits**

Step into the enchanting world of LEGO® Harry Potter™: Years 1-4, a video game that brings the first four Harry Potter books to life with the signature LEGO charm. This game invites you to **rebuild iconic moments** as you experience Harry's early years, from his first steps at Privet Drive to the intense Triwizard Tournament.

You'll have the chance to explore Hogwarts™ School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, learning spells, mixing potions, and reliving memorable scenes with a **charming sense of humor**. The game also offers **creative customization** options to tailor your experience.

**Key features include:**

*   **Build the Magic:** Recreate classic Harry Potter™ moments by assembling LEGO bricks.
*   **Play as Beloved Characters:** Step into the shoes of Harry, Ron, Hermione, and many other fan-favorite characters.
*   **Explore Famous Locations:** Discover the secrets of Hogwarts™ castle, Diagon Alley™, the Forbidden Forest, and Hogsmeade™.
*   **Co-op Gameplay:** Team up with a friend to cast spells and tackle the first four stories together.

Embark on a thrilling LEGO® adventure with LEGO® Indiana Jones™: The Original Adventures. This game invites you to build, battle, and brawl your way through iconic moments from the first three Indiana Jones™ films, all reimagined in the signature humorous LEGO® style.

Explore vibrant LEGO® worlds, engaging in combat with enemies, solving intricate puzzles, and unearthing legendary treasures. The game boasts an impressive roster of over 60 playable characters, allowing you to step into the shoes of Indiana Jones himself, his loyal companions, and even his formidable adversaries. You can team up with a friend for cooperative gameplay, embarking on a shared quest for fortune and glory. Prepare to whip into action, utilizing Indy's signature moves to attack and disarm foes, swing across treacherous gaps, and creatively interact with the environment and puzzles.

Name: LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes
Description:
LEGO® Marvel™ Super Heroes features an original story crossing the entire Marvel Universe. Players take control of Iron Man, Spider-Man, the Hulk, Captain America, Wolverine and many more Marvel characters as they unite to stop Loki and a host of other Marvel villains from assembling a super-weapon capable of destroying the world. Players will chase down Cosmic Bricks as they travel across LEGO Manhattan and visit key locations from the Marvel Universe, such as Stark Tower, Asteroid M, a Hydra base and the X-Mansion. Smash, swing and fly in the first LEGO videogame featuring more than 100 of your favorite Super Heroes and Super Villains from the Marvel Universe, including Iron Man, Wolverine, the Hulk, Spider-Man, Captain America, Black Widow, Loki and Deadpool. Help save Earth as your favorite Marvel character with your super-cool strengths and abilities: Iron Man flies, hovers, shoots missiles and unleashes a powerful unibeam directly from his chest. Spider-Man shoots webs, uses his spider-senses to spot objects invisible to others, crawls up walls and, of course, web-slings. Captain America throws his mighty shield at objects and enemies, embeds it into a wall to create a platform, and protects himself from damage. Hulk smashes! Perform new and powerful moves as “BIG-fig” characters like Hulk and Abomination. Leave a path of destruction as you smash through LEGO walls and throw cars using hyper strength. Discover LEGO Manhattan like never before, and travel to iconic locations from the Marvel Universe, such as the X-Mansion, Asteroid M and Asgard. Create unique Super Heroes with customizable characters. Enjoy an exciting original story, filled with classic LEGO videogame adventure and humor.

**LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga: A Comprehensive Gaming Experience**

Embark on an epic adventure through all six Star Wars films with LEGO® Star Wars™ - The Complete Saga. This comprehensive videogame allows players to relive iconic moments from the beloved movie franchise, now reimagined with the signature LEGO charm. As reported by gaming enthusiasts, the game introduces a wealth of new content, including additional characters, expanded levels, and innovative gameplay mechanics designed to enhance the player experience. For the first time, PC gamers can construct and battle their way through a vibrant LEGO Star Wars galaxy, offering a unique blend of creative building and action-packed combat.

The gameplay has been significantly upgraded, featuring enhanced Force Powers that grant players new abilities and strategic options. New power-ups and Challenge Modes further diversify the experience, encouraging players to utilize creative thinking and teamwork to overcome obstacles. The game boasts an impressive roster of over 120 playable characters, with the addition of fan favorites such as Watto, Zam Wessell, and Boss Nass. A revamped Character Customizer offers millions of unique combinations, allowing players to create cross-trilogy mash-up characters like Han Windu and Lando Amidala by mixing character parts from all six films. Furthermore, redesigned levels, including the thrilling 'Mos Espa Podrace' and 'Gunship Cavalry,' leverage the open vehicle gameplay introduced in LEGO Star Wars II. Bonus content includes ten additional Bounty Hunter missions from Jabba the Hutt, set within the prequel trilogy. The inclusion of Two Player Local Co-Op ensures that friends and families can share in the fun together.

**LEGO® DC Super-Villains: Unleash Your Inner Villain**

Prepare to **embrace your inner bad guy** in LEGO® DC Super-Villains, a thrilling new adventure where the ultimate objective is to become the **universe's most notorious super-villain**. This game allows you to **create and control your own unique antagonist**, unleashing a wave of **mischief and chaos** throughout an action-packed story.

Step into the familiar DC universe, but with a significant twist. The Justice League has disappeared, leaving Earth vulnerable. In their place, a group of less-than-heroic characters has **boldly declared themselves the 'Justice Syndicate'**. It's up to you and a **diverse cast of infamous characters** to uncover the **true intentions** of these questionable protectors.

Join forces with **legendary DC Super-Villains** such as The Joker and Harley Quinn, alongside many other notorious figures from the Injustice League. Together, you'll embark on an **epic quest** to expose the Justice Syndicate and **redefine the meaning of villainy**. This game offers a **fresh and exciting perspective** on the DC universe, inviting players to explore the **darker, more chaotic side** of heroism.

Name: Sid Meier's Pirates!
Description:
Sail the Caribbean, marauding all on the high seas or ally your ship and crew as a privateer in search of riches - the life you choose is up to you. Face dogged enemies, raid unsuspecting villages, woo fair maidens, avoid capture or dig for buried treasure. Discover what it takes to become one of the most famous pirates in history!

Name: Burly Men at Sea
Description:
Burly Men at Sea is a folktale about a trio of large, bearded fishermen who step away from the ordinary to seek adventure. With gameplay halfway between a visual novel and a point-and-click adventure, the branching story carries its ungainly heroes into waters where lurk creatures from Scandinavian folklore and other misadventures. You play as storyteller and wayfinder, shaping a custom tale that begins again where it ends. FEATURES Branching Story : Play through multiple choice-driven adventures, each designed to be completed in a single sitting. Innovative Controls: Shape the narrative through a unique, draggable viewport and your interactions within it. Playful Aesthetic: Colorful art style with handcrafted animation, set to a whimsical original soundtrack inspired by folk music of the far north. ABOUT THE DEVELOPER Burly Men at Sea is the second game from married duo Brain&Brain, developed during their own adventures as nomads and erstwhile farmhands.

**Nantucket: A Whaling Strategy Game**

This seafaring strategy game immerses players in the Golden Age of American whaling, allowing them to hunt the legendary Moby Dick and experience a narrative set years after Herman Melville's classic novel. Players will captain their own ship, manage a crew, and sail the globe, embodying a character inspired by Ishmael, the sole survivor of the Pequod.

The game offers a rich RPG-like experience, enabling players to develop their captain's stats and seafaring skills through choices that influence their character's reactions. Managing the ship and its crew is crucial, involving hiring and directing sailors, assigning them tasks, and upgrading the vessel with new compartments to enhance its capabilities. Players will encounter over a thousand unique events that react to their decisions, shaping their journey through this historical era. The core gameplay loop involves discovering new whaling grounds, hunting whales for valuable blubber, and defending the ship from pirates using a turn-based combat system. An original storyline guides players in pursuing Moby Dick, completing quests, and uncovering the mysteries surrounding the great white whale and Ahab's curse. Players can also boost their prestige by taking on jobs and seeking new adventures in various cities across the world.

Embark on a grand adventure in *Sea Dogs*, an epic role-playing game designed for aspiring pirates. This immersive experience transports you to the golden age of sail, where you'll begin as a young captain striving to carve out your legend.

From modest origins, you'll cultivate your character, aiming to dominate the islands for your chosen nation or for your own personal gain. You have the freedom to pledge your loyalty to one of three powerful countries – the British, French, or Spanish – or to forge your own path as an independent, swashbuckling pirate. As your wealth and reputation grow, you can invest in larger vessels and recruit more skilled crew members. You can even enlist other captains to aid you in daring raids and the capture of enemy ships and fortifications. The world of *Sea Dogs* offers unparalleled freedom; your journey and actions are entirely your own, promising endless possibilities and boundless enjoyment.

The game features a non-linear campaign, allowing players to select quests or approach the game in any manner they desire. Choose from twenty distinct ship types, ranging from nimble small boats to formidable battleships. Experience realistic, location-specific ship damage, where you can set sails ablaze, send masts crashing down, or riddle hulls with cannon fire. The game also boasts dynamic wind and weather effects, alongside a day and night cycle, further enhancing the immersive pirate experience.

Embark on an authentic maritime adventure in **Fishing: Barents Sea**, a simulation game that puts you in command of your own fishing vessel. Navigate the challenging Norwegian waters, seeking out abundant fishing grounds. You'll start with a modest boat inherited from your grandfather, with the ultimate goal of becoming a master fisher, amassing wealth, and upgrading your equipment and fleet. This is your chance to pursue your ambitions in the demanding fishing industry, all within the stunning backdrop of the Barents Sea.

This game provides a **deeply detailed simulation** of the fishing trade. You will learn to catch various fish species using **diverse methods and gear** across multiple boats. While the initial learning curve is gentle, achieving true mastery requires **strategic planning and practical skill**. For enhanced performance, consider using official Scanmar gear, such as advanced door sensors and TrawlEye, to optimize your trawl's effectiveness. Success is contingent upon **meticulous preparation** and adherence to annual fishing quotas, a crucial element of every expedition.

The game's environment is dynamic, influenced by **historical weather patterns**. Fish populations fluctuate with the seasons and water temperatures, compelling you to **continually adapt your approach**. Your central hub is the bustling harbor, where you can recruit crew, accept special assignments, perform ship repairs, secure bank loans, and procure necessary supplies.

**Fishing: Barents Sea** features a **sprawling open-world environment**, faithfully recreating the landscapes of northern Norway. To pinpoint lucrative fishing locations, you'll utilize sonar, radar, and GPS. Key highlights include **stunning graphics powered by the Unreal™ 4 Engine**, an **accurate map of Norway**, realistic day/night and moon cycles, and true-to-life seasonal shifts with **varied weather conditions**. You can command seven distinct ships, employ fishing techniques that are **easy to learn but challenging to master**, and benefit from intelligent fish AI. The game also integrates official technology like Scanmar Catch Control Systems and an officially licensed Hermes trawler, alongside practical inventory management. A lively environment populated by AI ships further **enhances the immersive simulation**. As one developer aptly stated, "We aimed to create an authentic fishing experience, where every decision matters."

"Here Be Dragons" is a satirical turn-based strategy game that offers a fantastical reimagining of the Age of Discovery.
