It boasts animation that rivals feature films, **captivating voice acting**, and a **rich soundscape**, all elevated by an **exceptional musical score**. The game showcases **stunning high-resolution graphics**, vividly bringing its **undead world to life with remarkable detail**. Players can anticipate a **substantial adventure**, with an estimated **30 hours of engaging gameplay**. ***The Curse of Monkey Island*** offers two distinct difficulty settings: the standard "regular" mode and the more challenging "Mega-Monkey" option, which features **intricately designed puzzles**. The game also introduces a **fresh array of witty and original insults**, perfect for engaging in **hilarious sword duels** and other comedic encounters.

**Psychonauts 2** puts you in the shoes of Razputin "Raz" Aquato, a young psychic with acrobatic skills. He's finally joined the **Psychonauts**, a group that uses psychic powers for espionage. However, the organization is facing a major crisis. Reviews praise the game for its exciting missions and a story full of **conspiracy and mystery**.

The Psychonauts' leadership is unstable. Their current leader is acting strangely after a kidnapping. This internal chaos is made worse by a **mole within the group**, creating widespread distrust and danger. Raz must figure out how to fix this dangerous situation.

As game designer Tim Schafer explained, a key part of **Psychonauts 2** is Raz's ability to **enter people's minds**. Inside these strange mental worlds, you'll face inner struggles, **find hidden memories**, and help characters deal with their emotional problems. The game is known for its unique look and many **psychic powers you can upgrade**. These powers let you shoot, create fire, lift things, and even control time. Using these abilities well is key to solving puzzles, beating weird enemies, and stopping a **powerful psychic villain** who threatens everyone. The gameplay offers a **fun, challenging, and diverse platforming adventure**, with quick moves and tricky navigation, a point many game reviews agree on.

Name: Cuphead
Description:
Cuphead is a classic run and gun action game heavily focused on boss battles. Inspired by cartoons of the 1930s, the visuals and audio are painstakingly created with the same techniques of the era, i.e. traditional hand drawn cel animation, watercolor backgrounds, and original jazz recordings. Play as Cuphead or Mugman (in single player or local co-op) as you traverse strange worlds, acquire new weapons, learn powerful super moves, and discover hidden secrets while you try to pay your debt back to the devil!

**Grapple Dog: An Exhilarating 2D Pixel-Art Platformer Adventure**

Embark on an **exhilarating 2D pixel-art platformer adventure** with Grapple Dog! Take on the role of Pablo, a courageous canine equipped with an **awesome grappling hook**, as you navigate a world brimming with **tricky challenges**. Your mission: to sail across **6 colorful worlds** alongside a crew of **fearless adventurers** and thwart the plans of the **robotic overlord Nul** from destroying everything.

**Key Features of Grapple Dog:**

*   **Exhilarating Action:** Experience a dynamic blend of **jumping, swinging, and collecting gems**. You'll encounter **dogs, grapples**, and even the chance to **drive a little boat**. And for the ultimate delight, enjoy **dog petting**!
*   **Vast Worlds to Explore:** Journey through **6 vibrant worlds**, encompassing a total of **33 meticulously designed levels**. Discover **hidden collectibles**, investigate **secret areas**, conquer **spectacular boss battles**, and master challenging **bonus levels**.
*   **A Lighthearted Quest:** Join Pablo, the **Grapple Dog**, on a **lighthearted adventure** filled with **fun characters**. Together with your **merry band of adventurers**, you'll race against time to stop the **robotic overlord Nul**.
*   **Play Your Way:** Refine your **grapple skills** with optional collectibles and a demanding **speedrun Time Trial mode**. Alternatively, utilize the **numerous in-built accessibility options** for a **restriction-free experience**. The game is designed for **maximum fun**, however you choose to play.
*   **Bold & Funky Presentation:** Immerse yourself in a **bold, colorful art style** crafted by a pixel art veteran, making Grapple Dog visually striking. Complementing the visuals is a **funky fresh soundtrack** that's bound to become a favorite, all delivered with **buttery smooth 60fps gameplay**.

## Rogue Legacy 2: A Deeper, More Evolved Genealogical Rogue-LITE Experience

**Rogue Legacy 2** significantly expands upon its predecessor, offering a rich genealogical rogue-lite experience packed with **endless replayability** and **deep player choice**. It retains the beloved core elements like randomized runs and ever-changing characters, while **dramatically enhancing persistent upgrades** and the concept of persistent dead heirs. In this sequel, your lineage isn't just a story; it's the **key to your progress**. You'll leverage your parents' inheritance to fortify the family manor, giving your descendants a **better chance against the game's many challenges**.

Every child you control in Rogue Legacy 2 is **uniquely generated**, possessing their own traits and abilities, ensuring **no two playthroughs are the same**. For instance, your heir might be a Ranger adept at ranged attacks, or a vegan with specific dietary needs that impact gameplay. This variety guarantees a **fresh and engaging experience** every time you play. Rogue Legacy 2 allows players to **set their own pace and playstyle**, whether you prefer a fast-paced approach, rushing into the procedurally generated world, or a more careful strategy, building your character's strength and abilities before facing tougher challenges. This flexibility suits both action-oriented players and those who prefer a more deliberate approach.

Each journey into the Kingdom of Rogue Legacy 2 presents a **new experience**. The landscape constantly shifts with new monsters, clever traps, and unique architectural layouts. This dynamic environment rewards **improvisation and adaptability** over memorization, making each expedition a true test of strategy and reflexes. The sequel introduces **15 new classes**, each offering a distinct playstyle and mechanics. Play as the Ranger, raining down poisoned arrows from above; soar as the Dragon Lancer, a swift aerial fighter; or become the Bard, charming enemies as you dance through them. These distinct classes provide a wide range of combat and exploration options.

Rogue Legacy 2 features a new artistic direction with a captivating **2.5D aesthetic**, combining 3D characters with hand-drawn backgrounds, enhanced by heavy shading and innovative animation techniques that maintain the series' signature look. The developers have greatly improved biome generation, making each area feel **fresh and distinct**. Each biome now uses unique "build strategies," resulting in randomly generated regions with completely unique structures and environmental features, deepening the sense of exploration.

To fully embrace the Metroidvania spirit, Rogue Legacy 2 introduces **Heirlooms**. These are permanent items that grant your heroes new abilities, opening up previously inaccessible areas and revealing the world's secrets. These are not just keys; they are **transformative powers** that change how you interact with and move through the game world. Finding these powerful Heirlooms requires proving your worth and actively searching for them in challenging environments. The traits system in Rogue Legacy 2 is an evolution of the original. Traits are now **directly tied to gold modifiers**, encouraging players to embrace new challenges. The more difficult a trait is, the greater the reward, making the choice of heir a truly strategic decision each generation.

A thrilling new addition is the ability to discover and wield **Relics**. These unique items dramatically alter your run, offering stat boosts, special challenges, or even new abilities. However, this power comes with risk: the more Relics you collect, the more your hero's resolve is tested, and **all collected Relics are lost upon death**. Rogue Legacy 2 prioritizes accessibility with **"House Rules."** This system lets players customize their experience by toggling contact damage, adjusting global damage and health, and even granting flight for difficult platforming sections. This control ensures every player can tailor the game to their preferred difficulty and playstyle. New mechanics like "Off-shore Banking" also provide struggling players with more ways to succeed.

The lore of Rogue Legacy has been greatly expanded in the sequel, offering a narrative that runs exceptionally deep. New lore elements can be discovered across multiple New Game+ cycles, turning beating the game once into just the start of a larger journey. Players will uncover the story of an inevitable kingdom collapse, delve into the dark secrets of those responsible, and form meaningful connections with characters. Your adventure in Rogue Legacy 2 continues long after defeating the final boss. Multiple playthroughs reveal a wealth of additional content. The game's difficulty increases dynamically through player choice, allowing you to select unique biome hazards and special boss encounters, ensuring the experience remains fresh and engaging for near-infinite replayability.

Rogue Legacy 2 naturally delivers more of the elements players loved in the original. Expect an abundance of new traits, spells, classes, biomes, enemies, equipment, rooms, and story content. The sequel is packed with **secrets and surprises**, offering a significantly expanded and enriched experience. Prepare for the delightful absurdity of "Clownanthropy," where punching clowns is just the beginning! This is just a glimpse of the vast content in Rogue Legacy 2. From Scar Challenges and Fairy Rooms to the intriguing Curio Shoppe, the game is full of discoveries. Don't just read about it; **dive into the world of Rogue Legacy 2 and experience its wonders for yourself!**

**Embark on a Psychic Adventure: Exploring the Mind in Psychonauts**

*Psychonauts*, the acclaimed action-adventure game developed by Double Fine Productions, invites players into the fascinating landscape of the human mind, utilizing unique psychic abilities. Players assume the role of Razputin, a gifted young boy with extraordinary psychic powers who dreams of joining the elite ranks of the Psychonauts, a clandestine organization of psychic agents. To achieve his goal, Raz infiltrates their training facility, Whispering Rock.

The narrative takes a dramatic turn when a sinister antagonist abducts the campers and pilfers their minds. Raz is compelled to employ his formidable psychic powers, including Telekinesis and Levitation, to rescue them. His signature ability allows him to delve into the minds of others, a crucial skill for his mission to retrieve the stolen brains before the villain can exploit them for nefarious purposes. As described by the game's creators, players will "Fight mental demons! Uncover hidden memories! Sort emotional baggage! Explore the fantastic realm of the inner mind!" Join the ranks of the Psychonauts and commence this extraordinary journey.

RimWorld is a **captivating science fiction colony simulation game** that stands out for its **intelligent AI Storyteller**, which masterfully crafts **unique and emergent narratives**. Inspired by beloved titles like Dwarf Fortress, Firefly, and Dune, the game plunges players into the **intense challenge of managing a group of survivors** on a hostile alien world.

Your adventure begins with three shipwrecked individuals. You'll be responsible for **meticulously overseeing their well-being**, attending to their moods, physical needs, injuries, illnesses, and even addictions. The game offers a **diverse range of environments** for building and survival, from lush forests and arid deserts to dense jungles and frozen tundras. As your colony expands, you'll witness the **intricate development of relationships** among your colonists, which can blossom into family ties, romantic partnerships, or devolve into bitter rivalries. A **deep medical system** allows for the replacement of wounded limbs and organs with advanced prosthetics, bionics, or harvested biological parts.

Survival in RimWorld is a **constant struggle against numerous threats**. You'll face pirates, hostile indigenous tribes, aggressive wildlife, colossal insects, and ancient automatons. To combat these dangers, you must **craft essential structures, weapons, and apparel** using a variety of materials. Beyond combat and construction, you can **tame and train a wide array of creatures**, from loyal pets to productive farm animals and formidable attack beasts. **Trade is also vital**, with opportunities to interact with passing ships and caravans, or form your own to undertake quests, engage in trade, launch attacks, or even relocate your entire colony. The game dynamically simulates environmental challenges, requiring you to navigate harsh weather and emergent threats like fires. Colonists can be acquired through capturing refugees or prisoners, integrating them, or selling them into slavery.

Each playthrough generates a **unique world**, offering **endless replayability**. The Steam Workshop provides access to hundreds of community-created mods, further expanding possibilities. An intelligent AI tutor is available to help new players. At its core, RimWorld is a **sophisticated story generator**, meticulously designed to co-author narratives that are often tragic, twisted, or triumphant, detailing the struggles of colonists and universal themes of starvation and survival. The AI Storyteller orchestrates "random" events that shape these stories. Players can select from several distinct AI Storytellers, each offering a unique experience: **Randy Random** for unpredictable chaos, **Cassandra Classic** for escalating challenges, and **Phoebe Chillax** for a more relaxed pace.

Your colonists are survivors of a catastrophic disaster, a diverse group that can include individuals from all walks of life. Additional colonists can be recruited through combat, purchase, or by offering sanctuary. Each colonist's background **significantly influences their in-game behavior and capabilities**. For example, a nobleman might excel in social interactions but refuse manual labor, while a farm oaf has extensive agricultural knowledge but lacks research aptitude. A genetically engineered assassin, conversely, is singularly focused on combat. Colonists evolve, and their relationships can flourish or deteriorate, leading to romantic relationships, marriages, infidelity, or conflicts.

The game generates an entire planet, and players can choose their initial landing site, opting for a cold tundra, a parched desert, a temperate forest, or a humid jungle. Each biome presents distinct challenges and opportunities. Players are not confined to a single location; the ability to form caravans allows for extensive exploration and interaction across the planet, involving rescuing allies, participating in negotiations, trading, launching assaults, and completing quests. In extreme circumstances, you can even relocate your entire colony.

The game features a robust animal husbandry system. Taming and training animals provides significant benefits, from boosting morale with pets to utilizing farm animals for labor and production, or unleashing deadly attack beasts on enemies. Colonists constantly assess their surroundings and internal states to determine their emotional responses, reacting to fundamental needs and more complex stimuli. Prolonged stress can lead to emotional outbursts or mental breakdowns.

The game meticulously tracks wounds, infections, and the presence of prosthetics or chronic conditions on each body part, with direct consequences for character abilities. A wide array of body parts can be injured, diseased, or lost, each with logical repercussions. Body parts can be repaired or enhanced with prosthetics, and the game even allows for the extraction, purchase, and transplantation of internal organs. Furthermore, RimWorld is **highly moddable**, supported by a vibrant community, and many non-English translations have been created by dedicated fans.

OlliOlli World is a vibrant skateboarding action-platformer that invites players into the imaginative world of Radlandia. This game emphasizes fluid movement and creative expression, allowing players to "flip and flow" through diverse environments. As you "grind, trick, and air" your way through this colorful landscape, you'll encounter unique characters and embark on a quest to find the mystical skate gods and achieve "Gnarvana." The game offers a delightful and quirky experience, filled with missions, challenges, and opportunities to forge new connections.

Players can personalize their character's appearance, signature tricks, and overall style. The explorable levels are designed with multiple paths, encouraging diverse approaches and player individuality. "OlliOlli World marks the third entry in the critically-acclaimed OlliOlli series from Roll7," a studio recognized for its BAFTA and multiple awards.

The game transports you to a "lush skateboarding utopia" teeming with eccentric characters and visually rich locations ripe for exploration. Discover new routes, side quests, and trick possibilities in areas like Inflatable Alley or Los Vulgas. The experience is further enhanced by a curated soundtrack of IDM and Electronica music. Roll7 has focused on creating "super tight controls" that combine with refined gameplay for an exceptionally smooth experience.

Even if you're new to skateboarding games, OlliOlli World is designed to be accessible. Newcomers can "tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting the curb." For those seeking a challenge, the game offers millions of unique levels in its sandbox mode, allowing for mastery of its "hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine." Players can also compete globally in Leagues, striving for the highest scores.

As you progress through Radlandia, you'll unlock special rewards to customize your character. Whether you want to "skate in your flip flops" or "wear a bumble bee onesie," OlliOlli World embraces all forms of expression. The game champions player freedom, stating, "as long as you’re on board anything goes!" This commitment to accessibility, depth, and player freedom allows everyone to experience the signature "flow state gameplay" that OlliOlli World is known for.

Embark on a **wild, cooperative VR cooking adventure** in **Cook-Out: A Sandwich Tale**, a game from **Resolution Games**. This engaging title, also from the creators of **Angry Birds VR** and **Blaston**, places you in a magical forest kitchen. Up to four players can join forces to serve a variety of fantasy customers, facing increasingly challenging cooking tasks as the game progresses.

Beyond simply preparing meals, you'll also need to manage **tricky customers**. **Resolution Games** highlights that challenges can become quite unpredictable, with jesters hiding orders or thieves stealing ingredients, adding unexpected difficulties to the gameplay.

**Resolution Games** has released new updates to enhance the **Cook-Out** experience. The "Make it Your Way" update allows players to **customize their chef's appearance**. Additionally, the "House Party" update introduces new skins and further character customization options, as announced by **Resolution Games** on their blog. **Cook-Out** can be enjoyed solo or with friends. Even when playing alone, a helper bot is available to assist with difficult orders, ensuring the busy kitchen remains manageable, according to **Resolution Games'** support information.

In the year 2367, thirty-two years after what was believed to be the Great War, a new and far more devastating conflict emerges. The Terran and Vasudan races, still recovering from the immense losses of the past, find themselves facing an unexpected and overwhelming threat.

An endless armada of Shivan capital ships, bombers, and fighters, equipped with super-advanced technology, appears on the horizon. These formidable vessels are not merely an attack; they are a consequence. The Shivans have arrived, seeking answers about their missing scouting party, and their presence signals a new era of interstellar warfare. The disturbance in the Gamma Draconis system is a harbinger of a conflict that will dwarf all previous struggles.

Name: Microsoft Flight Simulator Game of the Year Edition
Description:
The Microsoft Flight Simulator Game of the Year (GOTY) Edition celebrates all the positive feedback, reviews and awards garnered, but it is also a “Thank You” to our fans – new and old – that have made Microsoft Flight Simulator such a phenomenon. Best of all, the Microsoft Flight Simulator Game of the Year Edition will be available as a free update for existing players on PC. Game of the Year Edition • Enjoy 5 new aircraft – the Boeing F/A-18 Super Hornet, the VoloCity, the Pilatus PC-6 Porter, CubCrafters NX-Cub, Aviat Pitts Special S1S. • Experience 8 handcrafted airports in Germany, Switzerland and the US, an updated weather system, early access to DX12 and a dev mode replay system. • Soar high with 6 new Discovery Flights (Helsinki, Freiburg im Breisgau, Mecca, Monument Valley, Singapore, and Mount Cook) and 14 new tutorials. The World is at your Fingertips. • Vivid and Detailed Landscapes – Immerse yourself in the vast and beautiful world that is our planet with over 37 thousand airports, 1.5 billion buildings, 2 trillion trees, mountains, roads, rivers and more. • Living World – Earth is vibrant and ever-changing and so is the world of Microsoft Flight Simulator which includes live traffic, real-time weather and animals. Earn Your Wings. • Aircraft – Hone your pilot skills in a variety of aircraft from light planes to commercial jets with comprehensive flight models. Every aircraft includes highly detailed and accurate cockpits with realistic instrumentation. • New Checklist System - From pro to beginner, scale your level from full manual to full assist with interactive and highlighted instrument guidance and checklist. Test Your Skills. • Live Weather – The new weather engine enables users to switch on the live weather mode to experience real-time weather including accurate wind speed and direction, temperature, humidity, rain and more. • New Day & Night Engine - experience flight at any time of day or year allowing for night VFR, visual flight rules, navigation. • Aerodynamic Modeling - a state-of-the-art physics engine with over 1000 control surfaces per plane allows for a truly realistic experience. The Deluxe Edition includes everything from Microsoft Flight Simulator plus 5 additional highly accurate planes with unique flight models and 5 additional handcrafted international airports. Deluxe Additional Aircraft • Diamond Aircraft DA40-TDI • Diamond Aircraft DV20 • Textron Aviation Beechcraft Baron G58 • Textron Aviation Cessna 152 Aerobat • Textron Aviation Cessna 172 Skyhawk Deluxe Additional Handcrafted Airports • Amsterdam Airport Schiphol (Netherlands) • Cairo International Airport (Egypt) • Cape Town International Airport (South Africa) • O’Hare International Airport (USA) • Adolfo Suárez Madrid–Barajas Airport (Spain) The Premium Deluxe Edition includes everything from the Microsoft Flight Simulator Deluxe edition plus 5 additional highly accurate planes with unique flight models and 5 additional handcrafted international airports. Premium Deluxe Additional Aircraft • Boeing 787-10 Dreamliner • Cirrus Aircraft SR22 • Pipistrel Virus SW 121 • Textron Aviation Cessna Citation Longitude • Zlin Aviation Shock Ultra Premium Deluxe Additional Airports • Denver International Airport (USA) • Dubai International Airport (United Arab Emirates) • Frankfurt Airport (Germany) • Heathrow Airport (United Kingdom) • San Francisco International Airport (USA)

**Owlboy: Soar Through a World of Friendship and Adventure**

**Owlboy** is a captivating story-driven platformer that invites players to **fly through the clouds and explore a beautifully crafted world**. Developed by D-Pad Studio, this highly acclaimed game allows you to soar through open skies alongside friends, engage in combat, and solve intricate puzzles. Critics have lauded its detailed presentation, with IGN describing it as "one of the most intricately detailed adventures of this generation."

The narrative centers on Otus, a young owl burdened by the expectations of his people. His world is upended when sky pirates launch an attack, propelling him on a quest through monster-filled ruins. Throughout this journey, you will forge new friendships, uncover hidden secrets, and confront "burdens that no one should have to bear," as noted by reviewers.

**Owlboy** showcases **stunning pixel art**, meticulously updated for modern audiences. The gameplay seamlessly blends a compelling narrative with unique flying and platforming mechanics. A standout feature is the ability to **carry and throw almost anything**, introducing a strategic layer to exploration. Furthermore, you can **recruit Otus’s companions to aid in battle**, each possessing distinct abilities and personal narratives. Prepare for **large, challenging dungeons culminating in demanding boss encounters**. This game, a decade in the making, promises an unforgettable experience.

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946** is a comprehensive flight simulator that **combines all the original IL-2 series content**. This includes IL-2 Sturmovik™: Forgotten Battles, the Ace Expansion Pack, Pacific Fighters™, and unique alternate history campaigns set in 1946.

What began as a single-aircraft study sim has evolved into an **astonishing anthology**. It boasts an incredible **229 flyable aircraft** and over **300 aircraft in total**. The game has been updated to the latest version, **4.12.2**. This community-driven update introduces **widescreen support with correct FOV**, along with numerous new planes, maps, and scenarios.

**New Content Highlights:**

*   **Aircraft:** **32 new flyable fighters and bombers**, plus four new AI aircraft.
*   **Maps:** Explore large, new historical maps of the **Kiev region** and **Manchuria**. A bonus **Burma map** and an online **Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map** are also included.
*   **Campaigns:** **Nine new campaigns** feature nearly 200 missions, offering exceptional realism. Experience detailed careers for German, Soviet, and Japanese fighter and bomber pilots. Objectives range from flying jet bombers over occupied Europe to intercepting B-29 Superfortresses over Iwo Jima and the Japanese home islands.

**Alternate History:** Three of the nine campaigns delve into alternate history. These focus on **hypothetical battles between the Soviet Union and Germany in 1946**, even as WWII continues.

**Paint Schemes:** Nearly **1,000 new paint schemes** have been added. These historical liveries adorn new and existing aircraft, showcasing individual planes and squadrons that served during WWII.

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946: A Comprehensive Look at a Classic Flight Simulator**

**IL-2 Sturmovik: 1946** is a **highly regarded flight simulator** that consolidates the complete original IL-2 series. This package features **Forgotten Battles**, the **Ace Expansion Pack**, and **Pacific Fighters**. It also includes unique **alternate history scenarios** set in 1946, expanding the original offering of a single aircraft to a vast collection of **229 flyable aircraft** and over 300 aircraft in total.

Through community efforts, the simulation has been updated to version **4.12.2**. This fan-created patch introduces **widescreen support** with an accurate field of view, alongside **new aircraft, maps, and missions**. Specifically, it adds **32 new flyable fighters and bombers**, plus four additional AI planes. Players can engage with **new historical maps** depicting the Kiev region and Manchuria, illustrating a border area between the USSR, China, and Japanese-controlled Korea. The package also includes a bonus Burma map and an online Khalkin Gol / Nomonhan map.

The game provides **remarkable realism**, featuring nine new campaigns and close to 200 missions. Players can assume the roles of fighter or bomber pilots for the German, Soviet, and Japanese air forces. Missions range from piloting jet bombers over Europe to intercepting B-29 Superfortresses above Iwo Jima and Japan.

Three campaigns delve into **alternate history**, envisioning conflicts between the Soviet Union and Germany in 1946, even as World War II continues. The package also incorporates **nearly 1,000 new paint schemes**. These historically accurate liveries, applied to both new and existing aircraft, represent individual planes or squadrons from WWII, significantly enhancing the simulation's **authenticity**.

**Falcon 4.0: Experience the Pinnacle of Flight Simulation**

Prepare for **intense aerial combat** as North Korean forces breach the DMZ. You'll be part of an F-16 squadron on a **critical strike mission**. From the creators of the highly praised Falcon 3.0, Falcon 4.0 ushers in a **new era of flight simulation technology**. This groundbreaking title shatters expectations with its **advanced graphics**, **unparalleled realism**, **dynamic campaigns**, and **engaging multiplayer modes**. MicroProse has once again pushed the boundaries, delivering **accurate topographical terrain**, **sophisticated radar and weapons simulation**, **hyper-realistic flight models**, and **breathtaking visuals**.

The **realism in Falcon 4.0 is palpable**, mirroring the intense forces experienced during high-G maneuvers, evident in the vapor streaming over your leading edge flaps. You'll easily identify your wingmen by their **distinct aircraft markings**, while enemy pilots are equally determined to mark your aircraft for destruction. At its core, Falcon 4.0 features a **real-time campaign engine**, rigorously tested and validated by **actual F-16 pilots**. The game's **detailed and accurate terrain**, combined with its **stunning graphics**, sets a new standard for modern military flight simulators. Explore a vast array of meticulously rendered aircraft and ground units, all presented in chilling detail. Steam Trading Cards are included!

Name: B-17 Flying Fortress: The Mighty 8th
Description:
The missions undertaken by the crews of B-17 bombers during World War II are the stuff of legend. What was it to fly through relentless anti-aircraft fire over Nazi-occupied Europe? What was it to have a thin layer of steel between life and death at 15,000 feet? Furiously fend off enemy fighters zipping around your plane and then precisely deliver your cargo of bombs over enemy targets? Find out for yourself as you lead a 10-men crew to victory... or defeat... against squadrons of Nazi warplanes in the legendary B-17 Flying Fortress! A WWII Campaign to fight and survive through Carry out a realistic 25-missions tour of duty based on historically accurate scenarios and targets, or Take to the skies in 'Quick Start' assignments with available Instant Action mode. Plan real missions, select authentic flying formations, and manage both crews and bombers. Assess your crew's strengths and skills to effectively re-position members and cope with wounded personnel and casualties. It’s a 10-men job Take to the skies in any one of ten B-17 Flying fortress crew positions: Pilot, Co-Pilot, Navigator, Bombadier/Chin Turret Gunner, Radio Operator, Engineer/Top Turret Gunner, Port Waist Gunner, Starboard Waist Gunner, Ball Gunner, and Tail Gunner! Take total control: Take-off, land, shoot from various crew positions, navigate across a realistically mapped Europe, operate the radio, line up the bomb run, release the bombs and bail out if necessary. Choose your plane, choose your allegiance Fly a variety of aircraft from the legendary B-17 to the rugged escort fighters - Choose between the American B-17G bomber, P-38 Lightning, P-51 Mustang, P-47 Thunderbolt, and the German Bf 109, Fw 190, and ME 262 fighters. Yes, you can even fight 'The Mighty Eight' in the role of a German Luftwaffe pilot! Back from 2000! This is the original MicroProse B-17 Flying Fortress: The Mighty 8th, the legendary sequel to B-17 Flying Fortress: World War II Bombers in Action. Fly the B-17 Flying Fortress and become a legend before your own time!

**A Short Hike** offers a tranquil escape, inviting players to explore the **serene beauty of Hawk Peak Provincial Park**. Developed by **Adamgryu**, this indie game is designed for **exploration and relaxation**, allowing you to **hike, climb, and soar** through stunning mountain scenery. The game's core philosophy, as envisioned by **Adamgryu**, is to provide an experience akin to a **vacation**, where players can **unwind and immerse themselves** in nature.

The gameplay champions **complete freedom**, letting you forge your own path across the island. You can stick to the **marked trails** for a straightforward journey or venture into the **backcountry** to uncover its hidden wonders. As you make your way towards the summit, you'll encounter **other hikers**, discover **hidden treasures**, and find countless moments to **enjoy the world around you**. The game encourages a **leisurely pace**, so you can **hike at your own speed**.

Engage in calming activities like **fishing by the river** or **swimming at the lake**. Finding **hidden treasures** can open up new areas, broadening your exploration. For an exhilarating view, **dive off mountain peaks to soar over the forests**. Interacting with **other hikers** can provide helpful advice and create a feeling of shared discovery. Enhancing the peaceful atmosphere is **Mark Sparling's beautiful original soundtrack**, which **dynamically changes as you explore** the wilderness, deepening the game's immersive quality.

**Redout: Enhanced Edition - Experience Next-Generation AG Racing**

Get ready for **next-generation AG racing** with Redout: Enhanced Edition! This game is a thrilling homage to legendary arcade racers like F-Zero, WipeOut, Rollcage, and POD. It delivers an **uncompromising, fast, tough, and satisfying driving experience**, capturing the exhilarating vertigo that defines the genre.

Redout's **physics-based floating and driving models** mean every turn, slope, and maneuver applies unique forces to your ship. The game boasts a striking **sharp low-polygon style**, blending intricate meshes and terrains with the cutting-edge shading and lighting of Unreal Engine 4. This creates a **beautiful and instantly recognizable aesthetic**. Race through diverse environments, from breezy coastlines and eerie frozen landscapes to vast desert plains, all set against the backdrop of a melancholic, semi-abandoned Earth.

**Key Features:**

*   **Online Multiplayer:** Compete against **up to 12 players worldwide** for a truly challenging experience.
*   **Optional VR Support:** Immerse yourself with **Oculus Rift, HTC Vive, or OSVR**, featuring a brand-new cockpit view.
*   **Career Mode:** Embark on over **100 events** to race, gain experience, level up, and upgrade your ship.
*   **A Diverse World:** Explore **25 tracks** across **5 distinct locations** on a post-apocalyptic Earth, including challenging boss circuits.
*   **Endless Variety:** Master **11 event types**, from classic races to innovative Arena Races and Score-Based Endurance challenges.
*   **Create Your Story:** Choose from **6 racing teams**, each demanding a unique driving approach, and progress through **4 increasingly fast racing classes**.
*   **Powerups:** Utilize **over 10 racing-focused, upgradable powerups**, including turbo boosts, shields, repair drones, advanced grip systems, and slipstream enhancers.
*   **Dynamic Soundtrack:** Experience a **full 5.1 surround sound** and a dynamic soundtrack that intensifies with your speed.

**Unrivaled Speed and Immersion**

Redout is engineered to be the **fastest game ever made**. It's not just about the numbers; it's about the **vibrations, the blur of the landscape, the high-speed collisions, the effects, and the sounds** that combine for an intensely immersive sense of speed.

**Challenge the World Online**

Prove your skills against **up to 12 players globally** and claim your title as the ultimate Redout pilot. Do you have what it takes to achieve true glory?

**A Soundtrack That Drives You**

Prepare for one of the most **intense and dynamic soundtracks** you've ever encountered. Redout's audio adapts to your playstyle and performance, enhancing the visual experience and pulling you deeper into the race.

**Experience VR Like Never Before**

Step into your HMD for an unparalleled sense of **3D and distance**. Understand apexes with precision and achieve a new level of control. VR support is entirely optional.

**Master the Handling**

Control is paramount when racing at **800 km/h**. Redout features **believable physics** inspired by quad-copter controllers and magnetic forces, offering next-generation AG handling. Learn to corner without braking, utilizing every tool at your disposal. Steering, strafing, and turbo boosts are just the beginning; upgrades and powerups will grant you even greater command over your ship.

**Join a Thriving Community**

Connect with fellow racers on the **official Discord server**. Whether you're looking for casual matches or just want to chat, our community is a great place to get exclusive development news and insights into the Redout universe.

**A Rich Dystopian Setting**

The year is **2560**. Earth, depleted of its natural resources, faces environmental devastation. While most of humanity has migrated to celestial bodies, Earth remains a hub for entertainment, including the thrilling **Solar Redout Racing League (SRRL)**. Here, humanity's best pilots pilot high-speed anti-gravity ships on magnetic tracks, risking everything for glory.

War Thunder is a free-to-play, cross-platform MMO military game that immerses players in large-scale battles across land, air, and sea. It features a vast array of military vehicles, from early 20th-century machines to cutting-edge modern combat units. Players can engage in intense PvP combat or explore rich PvE content, including dynamic historical campaigns and solo missions.

The game boasts seamless cross-platform gameplay, allowing players on Windows PC, Linux, Mac, PlayStation®4, PlayStation®5, Xbox One, and Xbox Series X|S to compete on the same servers. With over 2,000 meticulously detailed vehicles, each crafted from historical documents and surviving sources, players have an extensive selection to choose from. These vehicles are deployed across 100 maps that recreate major historical battle theaters.

War Thunder offers a variety of combat situations, many of which are unique to the game. Players can experience thrilling moments such as defending teammates from air raids with anti-aircraft guns, unleashing a barrage of rockets from a bomber turret, or launching torpedoes from a fast attack boat to sink enemy warships. The game caters to all play styles and experience levels with various difficulty settings for its intense PvP missions.

Beyond the core gameplay, War Thunder provides regular content updates, introducing new vehicles, maps, missions, and nations. The game's astonishing graphics, authentic sound effects, and captivating music contribute to a deeply immersive atmosphere. Furthermore, players can unleash their creativity by developing custom content for War Thunder and sharing it on War Thunder Live, with the potential to earn real money through the Revenue Share Partner System.

**Rise of the Tomb Raider™: 20 Year Celebration Edition - The Ultimate Lara Croft Experience**

Experience the definitive Lara Croft adventure with Rise of the Tomb Raider: 20 Year Celebration. This comprehensive edition bundles the award-winning base game with a complete Season Pass, offering a wealth of new content and demanding challenges that expand upon Lara's epic journey.

The 20 Year Celebration edition significantly enhances the gameplay experience. Players can delve into the iconic Croft Manor with the new story chapter, "Blood Ties," and then face a terrifying zombie onslaught in "Lara's Nightmare." For a cooperative experience, team up with a friend in the "Co-Op Endurance Mode" to survive extreme conditions. The edition also introduces the "Extreme Survivor Difficulty" for those seeking the ultimate challenge, alongside special gear inspired by Tomb Raider III, including an outfit and weapon. Furthermore, players can embody Lara's legacy with five classic Lara skins.

This complete package also incorporates previously released downloadable content. Explore a new tomb to confront an ancient evil in "Baba Yaga: The Temple of the Witch," and battle waves of infected creatures in the intense "Cold Darkness Awakened" challenge.

At its core, Rise of the Tomb Raider follows Lara Croft as she uncovers a profound ancient mystery, drawing the ire of the formidable Trinity organization. In a race against Trinity, Lara follows clues leading to the legend of the Lost City of Kitezh. Driven to uncover its secrets before her rivals, Lara embarks on her first true tomb-raiding expedition in the harsh Siberian wilderness. Here, she must contend not only with human adversaries but also with the unforgiving natural world. Players will need to hunt wildlife to craft essential weapons and scavenge for rare resources within vibrant, yet hostile, ecosystems. Prepare for treacherous environments and unstable landscapes that will test Lara's limits. Mastering the surroundings is key to combat, with the ability to scale trees and dive underwater to evade or eliminate enemies. Customization is also paramount, allowing players to tailor Lara’s gear, weapons, and ammunition to their preferred playstyle, whether it's stealthy infiltration or direct assault. Craft explosives on the fly to create chaos and wield Lara’s signature combat bows and climbing axe. The legendary tombs return, grander and more perilous than ever, featuring vast, breathtaking ancient spaces filled with deadly traps. Solving intricate environmental puzzles and deciphering ancient texts will reveal hidden crypts, uncovering a world brimming with secrets.

**Tomb Raider: Lara Croft's Gritty Origin Story**

Dive into the **intense and gritty origin story** of Lara Croft in Tomb Raider. Witness her transformation from a young woman into a **hardened survivor**, driven by raw instincts and an incredible capacity to push beyond human limits. Lara must battle to **unravel the dark history of a forgotten island** and escape its relentless grip.

**Experience Lara's Epic Adventure**

Download the **Turning Point trailer** to witness the beginning of Lara's epic journey. This game offers a **turning point** in her life, showcasing her intense origin story.

**Key Features:**

*   **A Turning Point:** Experience Lara Croft’s intense origin story, charting her evolution from a young woman to a hardened survivor.
*   **An All-New Raiding Experience:** Explore a **mysterious island** brimming with environmental puzzles, visceral combat, and hidden tombs.
*   **Fight to Live:** **Salvage resources**, gain experience, and upgrade Lara’s weapons and tools to survive the island’s hostile inhabitants.
*   **Survive as a Team:** Engage in a variety of **multiplayer modes**, playing as either Lara’s Shipmates or Yamatai’s Scavengers.

**Resident Evil 5: Unraveling Africa's Bio-Terror Crisis**

The shadow of the Umbrella Corporation and its devastating viral creations has seemingly receded, yet a new, insidious bio-threat has emerged, demanding global intervention. Following the catastrophic events in Raccoon City, seasoned operative Chris Redfield has committed his career to dismantling the proliferation of bio-organic weapons. His current assignment, as a vital operative for the Bioterrorism Security Assessment Alliance (BSAA), takes him to Africa. Here, he must investigate a mysterious biological agent that is rapidly turning the local populace into terrifyingly aggressive beings.

Working alongside Sheva Alomar, a skilled BSAA agent native to the region, Chris and Sheva must pool their expertise and bravery to uncover the grim reality behind this escalating bio-terror. Their mission will plunge them into perilous landscapes and pit them against horrifying mutations spawned by the agent.

For players diving into this installment, several key details are important. This version is a port of the 2009 Games for Windows - Live release. Acquiring the Untold Stories Bundle on Steam will grant you the full Resident Evil 5 Gold Edition experience. It's important to note that, unlike the original Games for Windows - Live version, this release **does not** include NVIDIA GeForce 3D Vision support. Furthermore, if you previously owned the Games for Windows Live edition, you are entitled to a free Steam copy, with more information available in the Steamworks Migration FAQ.

Name: The Wolf Among Us
Description:
From the makers of the 2012 Game of the Year: The Walking Dead, comes a gritty, violent and mature thriller based on the award-winning Fables comic books (DC Comics/Vertigo). As Bigby Wolf - THE big bad wolf - you will discover that a brutal, bloody murder is just a taste of things to come in a game series where your every decision can have enormous consequences. An evolution of Telltale's ground-breaking choice and consequence game mechanics will ensure the player learns that even as Bigby Wolf, Sheriff of Fabletown, life in the big bad city is bloody, terrifying and dangerous. Over a season of content spanning across 5 episodes: Episode 1: Faith - Available Now Episode 2: Smoke and Mirrors - Available Now Episode 3: A Crooked Mile - Available Now Episode 4: In Sheep's Clothing - Available Now Episode 5: Cry Wolf - Available Now Key Features From the team that brought you 2012 Game of the Year, The Walking Dead Based on the Eisner Award-winning Fables comic book series Now, it’s not only WHAT you choose to do that will affect your story, but WHEN you choose to do it A mature and gritty take on characters from fairytales, legends and folklore who have escaped into our world A perfect place to begin your Fables journey, even if you’ve not read the comics; this game is set before the events seen in the first issue

**The Walking Dead: A Game of Survival and Choice**

Step into the harrowing world of **The Walking Dead**, a gripping five-part game series that expands upon Robert Kirkman’s acclaimed comic book universe. You'll embody **Lee Everett**, a convicted criminal granted a new lease on life amidst a world overrun by the undead.

In this post-apocalyptic landscape, the dead walk, and the living will do anything to survive. Your journey takes a pivotal turn when you become the protector of **Clementine**, an orphaned girl. This responsibility may be your path to redemption in a world that has descended into chaos.

**Experience the True Horror of the Zombie Apocalypse**

Based on Robert Kirkman’s Eisner-Award winning comic book series, The Walking Dead plunges players into the heart of the zombie apocalypse. This isn't just a game; it's an experience that forces you to confront the brutal realities of survival.

**Your Choices Matter**

Prepare for a **tailored game experience** where the decisions you make have profound and lasting consequences. Every choice you face, from the seemingly small to the life-altering, will shape your story across the entire series. You'll be thrust into situations demanding **immediate and difficult choices**, with no time for contemplation as the undead relentlessly pursue you.

**Broken Sword 3: The Sleeping Dragon - Unraveling an Ancient Conspiracy**

Prepare to be drawn into a world of intrigue and peril with *Broken Sword 3: The Sleeping Dragon*, a multi-BAFTA-nominated adventure game. This installment plunges players back into the shoes of George Stobbart and Nico Collard as they embark on a globe-trotting quest to unravel a profound ancient conspiracy. The narrative kicks off with the mysterious death of a computer hacker in Paris, a seemingly isolated incident that quickly escalates into a much larger, more sinister plot.

As George and Nico delve deeper, they discover that powerful seismic events are not mere natural occurrences but are linked to a fiendish source of pure evil. The game's plot weaves together the secrets of the Templars with this emerging threat, creating a compelling mystery that players must piece together. *Broken Sword 3: The Sleeping Dragon* distinguishes itself with breathtaking 3D graphics and a powerful, unique interface, immersing players in its distinctive visual style and the rich universe of Broken Sword.

Rainbow Billy: The Curse of the Leviathan is a vibrant 2.5D adventure game focused on **creature capture** and celebrating **diversity and self-acceptance**. Your mission is to bring color back to a world that has faded. This engaging journey offers more than 30 hours of gameplay, spanning over 85 islands and caves.

The game invites you to explore, find treasures, fish, and build friendships. Rainbow Billy Studios, the developers, emphasize that **kindness and understanding** are powerful tools for positive change.

Key gameplay elements include:

*   **Befriending Creatures:** Collect over 60 unique creatures. You'll help them through **gentle, non-violent encounters** to solve their problems. Building a varied team is key to success, as noted by outlets like IGN.
*   **Solving Puzzles:** Environmental puzzles block your path and unlock new areas.
*   **Restoring Color:** A main goal is to re-color the world, a central part of the story. Lead designer Sarah Chen explains that the game encourages players to **be their true selves**, fostering empathy and personal growth.

**The Walking Dead: Season Two: Clementine's Journey of Survival**

The Walking Dead: Season Two plunges players back into the harrowing world of the undead apocalypse, focusing on the remarkable resilience of Clementine, a young girl orphaned by the cataclysm. Having endured the devastating events of Season One, Clementine finds herself thrust into a relentless struggle for survival, forced to navigate a world where the living can pose as great a threat as the shambling dead. Months have elapsed since the initial outbreak, and her quest for safety is paramount. This installment challenges players to embody Clementine, confronting her with morally complex situations and dire survival dilemmas.

Your choices and actions will profoundly shape the unfolding narrative, making each playthrough a unique experience. As Clementine, you will be tested by circumstances that push the boundaries of your morality and your innate survival instincts. The consequences of decisions made in both Season One and the preceding "400 Days" DLC will ripple through this sequel, influencing the story's trajectory. Based on Robert Kirkman's acclaimed comic book series, The Walking Dead: Season Two offers a deeply personal and impactful continuation of Clementine's story, forcing her to mature rapidly in a world that offers little respite.

**Batman: The Enemy Within - The Telltale Series** plunges players back into the dark heart of Gotham City, where **Bruce Wayne and Batman face unprecedented challenges**. This latest installment from the acclaimed Telltale Games, the studio behind the original **Batman - The Telltale Series**, forces its dual protagonists into **precarious new roles**.

The **notorious Riddler has resurfaced**, unleashing a wave of gruesome puzzles that serve as a chilling prelude to an even more profound crisis. As Batman grapples with this escalating threat, he must also contend with the arrival of a **ruthless federal agent**. Simultaneously, Bruce Wayne finds himself entangled in a **perilous web of deceptions**. The emergence of a **still-nascent Joker** adds another layer of complexity, forcing Batman to forge **uneasy alliances**. Players will be confronted with critical choices: **Who among Batman's new allies can you truly trust?** And **how far into the darkness will Bruce Wayne descend?** This complete season includes access to all five episodes, delivering the signature narrative-driven experience Telltale Games is renowned for.

**Resident Evil 4: A New Era of Horror**

**Resident Evil 4** plunges players into a chilling new chapter of survival horror, casting them as **Special Agent Leon S. Kennedy**. His critical mission: to rescue the U.S. President's daughter, a task that leads him to a secluded European village. This setting marks a significant shift from the zombie-filled environments of earlier games. In this remote locale, Leon encounters **terrifying new creatures** driven by a sinister parasite called **Las Plagas**. He also battles a fanatical cult, **Los Illuminados**, who are manipulating **mind-controlled villagers** to achieve their sinister goals.

The game offers a **stunning HD experience**, running at a **smooth 60 frames per second** for the first time. A **complete visual overhaul** has been implemented, achieving the game's **highest graphical quality ever**. As one critic noted, "The graphical upgrade is truly remarkable, breathing new life into a beloved classic." The game is **fully optimized for widescreen displays**, featuring sharper text and upgraded textures for characters, environments, and in-game items.

Further enhancing the PC version, **Resident Evil 4** includes full **Steam platform support**. This means players can enjoy Achievements, Cloud saves, Trading Cards, and global leaderboards. **Native keyboard and mouse support** is also a key feature, providing customizable key bindings, mouse sensitivity, and acceleration settings. This new PC release contains all content from previous versions. It also offers subtitle support in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish, and includes previously released bonus content such as the **Separate Ways epilogue**.

Name: Ragnarock
Description:
Are you ready to rock? Ragnarock is a solo/multiplayer VR rhythm game in which you play a viking captain competing in a ship race. With your two hammers, crush the incoming runes in sync with epic viking music. Keep hitting the runes perfectly to accumulate combo energy in your hammers, and you will be able to activate a speed boost! Viking music: The tracklist is curated with love and care. Unleash the drummer in you and play to the epic rock and metal tracks of Alestorm, Gloryhammer, Saltatio Mortis, Wind Rose and many more. All have a festive viking/celtic/pirate style, which will make you feel the viking power in you! Simple gameplay: Following the tradition of arcade games, Ragnarock is easy to play, hard to master. To move forward, only your sense of rhythm matters. However, to win the race, you will have to train and use your skills wisely. Multiple difficulty settings will help you improve over time. Only the most experienced players will be able to collect all the gold medals, beat the high scores and sign their name on the leaderboard! Cross-platform multiplayer mode: The multiplayer PvP mode brings real-time competition against your friends or other people. Start a public or private game (up to 6 players) and beat them all to finish in first place! In solo, you can also race against ghost ships (representing your best score or other players from the leaderboard) to add some competition. Mythological environments: Ragnarock transports you to the land of the vikings in stylized environments inspired by nordic mythology. Support for custom songs: Want to play a track from your personal music library? You can create a custom playable song from any song you own, and play it in solo mode. More info in our FAQ (-vr.com/faq) .

**Banner Saga 3: The Epic Viking Saga Concludes**

The Banner Saga trilogy, a celebrated strategic RPG renowned for its captivating narrative and unforgettable characters, culminates with Banner Saga 3. This award-winning series, boasting over 20 accolades and 4 BAFTA nominations, brings its six-year Viking saga to a definitive close. As the encroaching Darkness imperils the world, the fate of your caravan hinges on the critical decisions you make and the bonds of trust you forge with your companions.

In this final chapter, players will lead over 40 heroes through arduous trials. You will reunite with beloved characters from previous installments and forge new allegiances. Notably, Banner Saga 3 introduces potent menders and playable Dredge characters for the first time. However, the developers at Stoic Studio have cautioned that "no character is truly safe." The narrative diverges significantly, with your choices from earlier games seamlessly integrated to ensure a profoundly personal and impactful journey. Every decision and past event carries substantial weight.

Banner Saga 3 refines the series' signature tactical combat with more distinctive and adaptable encounters. Players will confront unsettling new warped adversaries and engage in demanding multi-wave battles. You can also utilize potent heroic titles to bolster allies and alter the tide of conflict. The game's striking art direction and animation achieve new pinnacles, presenting breathtaking landscapes contorted by the Darkness into eerie yet beautiful forms. More story sequences are fully animated in Banner Saga 3 than in the first two games combined. The final, full-length musical score, masterfully composed by Grammy-nominated Austin Wintory and performed by a live orchestra, provides a triumphant auditory conclusion to the trilogy.

To fully immerse yourself in the intended narrative, players are strongly advised to import their save files from previous Banner Saga titles. This action will unlock novel and unforeseen outcomes directly influenced by your past decisions, both significant and subtle. With the Darkness relentlessly advancing, the end is imminent, and the responsibility for survival rests squarely on your shoulders and those of your resilient survivors. Banner Saga 3 delivers a definitive conclusion, revealing the ultimate destiny of this acclaimed saga. Muster your companions, fortify your resolve, and prepare to confront the encroaching storm.

**Banner Saga 2** builds upon the acclaimed, story-driven role-playing experience of its predecessor. This sequel immerses players in an emotional journey across a world teetering on the brink of ruin. The survival of your Viking clans hinges on your leadership, **smart resource management**, and **skilled combat tactics**.

The **epic Viking saga unfolds** with stunning hand-drawn 2D combat and animations, now enhanced with improved special effects. A moving musical score by Grammy-nominated artist Austin Wintory accompanies you through this perilous adventure. Your choices from the first game, alongside new, difficult decisions in Banner Saga 2, **shape the narrative**. As one reviewer observed, "The weight of your choices is palpable, shaping not just your immediate path but the very fate of your people."

**New characters and a new race** are introduced, including the formidable Horseborn. Engage in more strategic battle boards where **each confrontation has lasting consequences**. The permanent loss of characters in combat will directly impact your caravan and quests. The **journey itself is crucial**; successfully building and managing your caravan across a vast landscape is vital for survival and the continuation of your civilization.

**Northgard** invites you to a land of mystery and opportunity, where Viking clans seek to carve out their destiny. After years of exploration, brave Northmen have discovered a new continent, and the most daring among them have set sail to conquer its shores. Your goal is to achieve fame for your Clan through conquest, trade, or devotion to the Gods.

Survival in Northgard is a constant challenge. You'll face fierce Wolves and Undead Warriors, and formidable Giants that must be befriended or defeated. Players must also endure the harshest winters ever witnessed in the North. To establish your settlement, assign your Vikings to crucial jobs like Farmers, Warriors, Sailors, and Loremaster. Careful resource management is key to surviving the brutal winters and vicious foes.

Expand your territory and uncover unique strategic opportunities. Northgard offers multiple paths to victory, including Conquest, Fame, Lore, and Trading. Test your skills against friends or a challenging AI with varying difficulty levels and personalities. Dedicated servers allow you to climb the ranks and achieve ultimate Norse God status.

The story begins with the murder of the Viking High King and the theft of his Regal Horn by Hagen. This event ignites a saga following Rig, the King's son and heir, and his advisor Brand. Their journey across Northgard involves forging new alliances, confronting enemies, and uncovering a threat far greater than Hagen, along with the true motives behind the King's assassination. To complete the 11 campaign chapters, players must master the unique characteristics of the first six clans. Taming the unforgiving wilderness of Northgard is essential for success.

Since the initial colonization, six new clans have joined, introducing fresh playstyles and combat strategies. With each new clan release, Northgard receives free major content updates, offering new ways to play and explore the full potential of the game.

Name: The Banner Saga
Description:
Live through an epic role-playing Viking saga where your strategic choices directly affect your personal journey. Make allies as you travel with your caravan across this stunning yet harsh landscape. Carefully choose those who will help fight a new threat that jeopardizes an entire civilization. Every decision you make in travel, conversation and combat has a meaningful effect on the outcome as your story unfolds. Not everyone will survive, but they will be remembered. Key Features Player choice that drives your own narrative – every decision you make in travel, conversation and combat has a meaningful effect on the outcome as your story unfolds. Over 25 playable characters from 2 different races, human and varl, the horned giants – embark on your epic journey with a variety of characters from 7 different classes, each with unique abilities and upgrade options to fit your play style. Strategic combat with consequences - victory or defeat and even the permanent loss of a character depends on which characters you choose to take into battle and what decisions you make afterwards. The journey is as important as battle – your role in building and managing your caravan as you travel the vast frozen landscape is critical to not only your own survival but the survival of an entire civilization. An epic Viking saga brought to life in 2D glory – beautifully hand drawn combat sequences and animations, accompanied by an evocative score from Grammy-nominated composer Austin Wintory, will immerse you into a fantasy realm inspired by Norse mythology. Multiplayer Combat Enhanced – sharpen your combat skills in the free multiplayer game “Factions”. Compete against other players with many of the character classes you see in The Banner Saga. The Banner Saga is the first part of a planned trilogy. If you complete this game, your unique progress and storyline will carry over to the next part of the story.

**Jotun: Valhalla Edition: Prove Your Worth to the Gods**

*Jotun: Valhalla Edition* invites you on an epic journey through Norse mythology. This stunning action-exploration game features hand-drawn visuals and places you in the role of Thora, a fierce Viking warrior. After an inglorious death, Thora is barred from Valhalla. To earn her place among the gods, she must explore the vast, mystical realms of Norse Purgatory.

Your quest involves finding ancient runes to awaken the **colossal Norse elementals known as jotun**. Armed with your mighty two-handed axe, the **divine blessings of the gods**, and your own combat skills, you will face these formidable foes. For an ultimate test, *Jotun: Valhalla Edition* offers **Valhalla Mode**, which pits you against even more challenging versions of the jotun.

**Key Features:**

*   **Stunning Hand-Drawn Animation:** Immerse yourself in a visually breathtaking world.
*   **Epic Boss Battles:** Confront five colossal jotuns, each presenting a unique challenge.
*   **Vast Exploration:** Discover nine expansive and mysterious levels steeped in Viking lore.
*   **Compelling Narrative:** Uncover the story of Thora's life and death through an overarching narrative.
*   **Divine Powers:** Wield unique abilities granted by the Viking gods.
*   **Authentic Experience:** Enjoy genuine Icelandic voice-overs and an original soundtrack composed by Max LL.

Join the Jotun community by signing up for the Mailing List or following us on Facebook, Twitter, and Twitch.

**Ancestors Legacy: Lead Medieval Armies in a Historically Inspired RTS**

**Ancestors Legacy** is a real-time strategy game that throws you into the harsh world of medieval warfare. You'll command one of four unique factions—**Viking, Anglo-Saxon, German, or Slav**—as you fight to conquer medieval Europe. Victory comes from taking land, but also from **raiding and pillaging** enemy settlements.

To win in Ancestors Legacy, you need to be a master of tactics. Use all your strategic options and the environment to your advantage. **Smart base management** is key, including building temporary bases and settlements. The game smoothly combines managing resources and building with large-scale, squad-based battles. Built with **Unreal Engine 4**, Ancestors Legacy features vast battlefields with stunning detail. A **cinematic action camera** puts you right in the middle of the fight, offering an amazing combat view.

The game offers a rich experience with several key features. A **detailed single-player campaign** lets you experience historical events with each of the four nations. **Strategic depth** comes from using terrain, unit experience, and morale. The impressive visuals, powered by Unreal Engine 4, are enhanced by the cinematic battle camera. For competitive players, Ancestors Legacy provides **intense multiplayer matches**. The game also includes easy resource and village management, **native gamepad support**, and **cross-play**, so you can battle players on Steam and GoG.

**Volgarr the Viking** brings back the **intense challenge** of classic arcade games. This new hardcore action experience is designed to test your skills, just like the games of the Golden Age.

**Key Features:**

*   **Classic Hardcore Arcade Action:** Experience the thrill of a truly difficult game.
*   **Vast Worlds to Explore:** Journey through **seven worlds** with over **30 maps**.
*   **Diverse Enemies and Traps:** Face more than **40 unique traps and enemies**, including massive, **screen-filling bosses**.
*   **Handcrafted Pixel Animation:** Enjoy thousands of frames of **meticulously created pixel art**.
*   **Epic Orchestrated Soundtrack:** Immerse yourself in a **powerful musical score**.
*   **Precise Control Design:** Benefit from **fully customizable controls** for a perfect fit.
*   **Full Controller Support:** Play with your favorite controller, including **legacy DirectInput devices**.
*   **Steam Integration:** Compete with others via **Steam achievements and leaderboards**.
*   **Multiple Paths and Endings:** Discover **different routes** through the game, leading to **various conclusions**.
*   **Retro-Style Game Manual:** Get an **awesome, old-school manual** to guide your adventure.

Prepare yourself for a **demanding yet rewarding** experience. **Volgarr the Viking** is ready to challenge you.

**Zombie Vikings: A Hilariously Gruesome Co-op Adventure**

Get ready for a **hilariously gruesome adventure** in Zombie Vikings, a new co-op game for one to four players. Developed by the creators of the popular indie hit, Stick It to The Man!, this game promises a **dead funny experience**.

You'll control a **putrid posse** of fearsome Vikings resurrected from Norse soil: **Gunborg, Seagurd, Hedgy, and Caw-kaa**. Your critical mission takes you through epic worlds to retrieve Odin’s lost eye. Prepare to **hack through the gingerbread swamps of Molgaga**, **cruise through the intestines of the Midgaard Serpent**, and even **fight giant poultry**!

This co-op story brawler is designed for **1-4 players**, offering both single-player and online/offline multiplayer modes. The game features **over 25 levels across 8 distinct worlds**, plus **5 Versus Arenas** for competitive play. Each of the four playable Zombie Vikings has **unique power moves**, encouraging varied combat strategies.

Discover **over 40 unlockable weapons**, such as the hilariously named **Stinknir** and **Blunt Fish Trauma**! You can also collect **Viking Runes** to unlock new and **cool abilities**. These runes allow you to **mix up your style of play** and adapt to any challenge. For the ultimate cooperative experience, you can even **stitch all your friends together into a giant mega Zombie** – because, as the game suggests, **working together is undeniably fun**! The game's narrative was written by **Zach Weinersmith of SMBC Comics**, known for his acclaimed work.

**Dead In Vinland** plunges players into a challenging survival and management experience, blending RPG and adventure elements as a Viking family stranded on a mysterious, uncharted island. As Eirik, you'll shoulder the immense responsibility of safeguarding your family's physical and mental well-being, uncovering the island's secrets, organizing your burgeoning camp, and navigating relationships with its inhabitants. The island's enigmatic nature is central to your survival.

This title delivers a deep survival simulation. Players must diligently gather vital resources like food and water, all while meticulously monitoring their characters' health. Expect to contend with a host of threats, including diseases, injuries, and harsh weather. Gameplay unfolds through a strategic turn-based system, offering three distinct difficulty settings: easy, extreme, and iron man.

Your settlement can be constructed and upgraded, featuring 18 unique activity stations and over 130 craftable enhancements. You'll manage a community of 14 characters, each with their own distinct traits and personal narratives. Dialogue choices significantly impact relationships, opening avenues for romance, the dismissal of characters, or the recruitment of new allies. The game also incorporates various survival activities such as hunting, fishing, and gardening, with advanced camp stations proving crucial for settlement development.

Embark on 70 non-linear quests that directly influence the game's outcome, with your decisions shaping the destinies of your characters. You will inevitably cross paths with Björn Headcleaver and his band of robbers, forcing a critical choice: pay tribute or stand and fight.

**Dead In Vinland** boasts an expansive RPG system. This includes managing five distinct health states, developing 20 skills, and navigating over 600 character traits. Players will collect more than 100 items and face 30 diseases and 20 potentially fatal wounds. Characters gain five random special traits upon leveling up. Combat involves 3 vs 3 battles against Björn's forces, featuring five playable character classes and five passive classes. The game's mature, humorous narrative, penned by the developers at CCCP, unfolds across more than 150,000 words. As the second installment in the "Dead In…" series, it follows the critically acclaimed *Dead In Bermuda*. While both games can be enjoyed independently, experiencing both offers a richer understanding of the series' lore, as noted by game critics.

Portal 2 builds upon the acclaimed gameplay, narrative, and musical score of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and cultivated a dedicated fanbase. This sequel expands significantly on the original's innovative formula.

The single-player campaign introduces a vibrant cast of new characters and a variety of novel puzzle mechanics within an expanded set of challenging test chambers. Players will venture into previously unexplored sections of Aperture Science Laboratories and reconnect with GLaDOS, the memorable, albeit sometimes homicidal, AI from the first game.

Furthermore, Portal 2 offers a distinct two-player cooperative mode. This mode features its own unique storyline, specialized test chambers, and two new playable characters, requiring players to fundamentally rethink their understanding of portal mechanics. Achieving success in this mode demands not only collaborative action but also cooperative strategic thinking.

**Product Features:**

*   **Extensive Single-Player Experience:** Enjoy next-generation gameplay and a deeply engaging narrative.
*   **Complete Two-Person Co-op:** A dedicated multiplayer campaign with its own story, characters, and gameplay mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics Engine:** Enables the creation of a wide array of inventive challenges, resulting in a larger, yet accessible, game experience.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** Features a compelling and unique musical score.
*   **Monumental Sequel:** The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by more than 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Included Editing Tools:** Portal 2 will come with its own set of editing tools for players to create and share their own content.

**ELDEN RING: Forge Your Legend in the Expansive Lands Between**

Prepare to rise, Tarnished, and embrace your destiny in **ELDEN RING**, a groundbreaking fantasy action RPG developed by FromSoftware. This title invites you to wield the power of the Elden Ring and claim your title as Elden Lord within the vast and mysterious Lands Between. As detailed by FromSoftware, the game offers a world of unrivaled scope, seamlessly connecting open fields brimming with diverse challenges to immense dungeons boasting intricate, three-dimensional designs. Your exploration will be rewarded with the thrill of uncovering unknown threats and achieving a profound sense of accomplishment, a hallmark of FromSoftware's design philosophy.

**ELDEN RING** also emphasizes forging your unique hero with unparalleled freedom, a key design pillar highlighted by Bandai Namco Entertainment. Beyond customizing appearance, players can freely mix and match weapons, armor, and magic to develop their hero to suit their playstyle. Whether you aim to become a mighty warrior by enhancing strength or a master of arcane arts, the choice is yours. Immerse yourself in an epic drama born from myth, where the story unfolds in fragments, weaving a multilayered narrative. The intersecting desires of various characters shape the fate of the Lands Between, as noted in lore discussions by prominent gaming publications like IGN. Furthermore, the game connects players in unique online ways, offering traditional multiplayer for cooperative journeys alongside an innovative asynchronous online system. This system, a feature praised by critics at GameSpot, allows players to feel the presence of fellow adventurers without direct interaction, enhancing the sense of a shared, albeit solitary, journey.

Tetris Effect: Connected provides a **fresh and captivating experience** for the classic puzzle game, combining **engaging challenges** with **beautiful visuals and sound**. This game reimagines the familiar Tetris gameplay, making it more exciting than ever.

The game includes **more than 30 solo levels** and **over 10 different ways to play**, catering to different preferences. It supports **playing with others online and in person**, enabling teamwork or friendly competition. A key feature is its **lively gameplay**, where the music, scenery, and effects **change with your moves**, all set to a **highly praised soundtrack**. Even the Tetris blocks respond to how you play, creating a **reactive world**.

A main addition is the **new "Zone" feature**. This lets you **stop time and the falling blocks**, giving you a strategic edge to get out of difficult situations or score more points by clearing extra lines. For PC players, Tetris Effect: Connected offers **major improvements**, including better performance on Steam with support for **4K visuals**, **unlimited frame rates** (when Vsync is off), **wide screens**, and advanced graphics settings for both **regular and VR play**.

The **"Connected" team mode** lets up to **three players combine their game areas** and cooperate. Also, different **solo modes** are available, designed to create various moods like "Calm," "Concentrate," "Traditional," or "Exciting." For a throwback feel, the game has levels inspired by **earlier Tetris games** and a **traditional score challenge mode** for multiple players that resembles the 8-bit era. The **full range of multiplayer options** is extensive, featuring **play across different platforms**, **competitive matches**, **games with friends**, and a **system for leveling up** with unlockable player icons.

**Team Fortress 2 is now completely free to play**, offering endless online action without any hidden costs. This highly-rated game, celebrated by PC Gamer as "the most fun you can have online," remains one of the most enduringly popular online titles. Its continued success is fueled by consistent **free updates** that introduce new game modes, maps, equipment, and a vast array of cosmetic hats.

The game features **nine distinct classes**, each with unique abilities and personalities, ensuring a perfect fit for every player. Newcomers can easily begin their journey with **comprehensive training modules and offline practice modes**. These resources help players hone their skills before engaging in TF2's dynamic game modes, which include classics like Capture the Flag, Control Point, Payload, Arena, and King of the Hill.

**Players can personalize their gameplay experience** through hundreds of weapons, hats, and other items. These can be collected, crafted, purchased, or traded, allowing for unique character customization. This lets you tailor your favorite class to both your playstyle and aesthetic preferences. Crucially, Team Fortress 2 adheres to a **"free-to-play, not pay-to-win" model**. This means most items available for purchase in the Mann Co. Store can also be acquired through regular in-game activities.

Name: Spelunky 2
Description:
Spelunky returns in this greatly-expanded sequel to the original roguelike platformer! Meet the next generation of explorers as they find themselves on the Moon, searching for treasure and missing family. Spelunky 2 builds upon the unique, randomized challenges that made the original a classic, offering a huge adventure designed to satisfy players old and new. A Bigger and More Dynamic World, with So Much to See and Do Spelunky 2's world is even denser than the one in the original game, offering many more areas, characters, traps, and items, as well as new ways to interact with them (and for them to interact with each other). The world has expanded in other ways, too, with branching paths and multi-layered levels adding a third dimension to the classic 2d platforming. Animals can also be tamed and ridden. And dynamic liquid physics create new challenges and make the world feel extra reactive and alive. Build a Community, Make Friends Back in Base Camp, characters you unlock will mill about and relax between runs, offering encouragement and advice.
