Experience roguelite thrills with **randomized rewards, powerups, enemy setups, and room layouts**, ensuring a fresh adventure every time. *Until You Fall* also includes **customizable comfort and accessibility options**, so you can move and fight with ease. Join the active community on Discord to connect with developers, share strategies, and compete for prizes.

Name: OlliOlli World
Description:
OlliOlli World is a bold new skateboarding action-platformer that’s bursting with personality. Flip and flow through the vivid and vibrant world of Radlandia, meeting colorful characters as you grind, trick, and air your way to discover the mystical skate gods on your quest for Gnarvana. Traverse a delightful and weird world as you take on missions, challenges, and make new friends along the way. Customize your character’s looks, tricks, and style while you experience explorable levels with multiple paths that provide an array of opportunities for player expression. Challenge the world in Leagues or dare a friend to beat your best tricks on one of millions of sharable levels. Experience the accessibility, depth, and player freedom as you dive into the signature flow state gameplay of OlliOlli World. OlliOlli World marks the third entry in the critically-acclaimed OlliOlli series from Roll7, the BAFTA and multi-award-winning independent studio. KEY FEATURES Take a trip across a lush skateboarding utopia that is filled to the brim with eccentric characters and vibrant locations that are begging to be explored. Find your grind in Inflatable Alley or blaze down Los Vulgas to discover new paths, fresh side quests, rad rewards, and epic trick opportunities. All perfectly complemented by a hand-picked compilation of IDM and Electronica tracks. Super tight controls combine with highly refined gameplay to ensure a silky smooth ride. Not a Pro? Don’t worry – OlliOlli World welcomes you with open arms, allowing new players to tear down streets and pull off sick method grabs without fear of faceplanting the curb. Think you’ve got what it takes? Achieve mastery through millions of unique levels in sandbox mode or compete against rivals around the globe in Leagues with a hugely deep combo system with over 100 moves to master and combine in your battle for the highest score. Cruise through Radlandia's epic skate-haven and prove your skills to unlock special rewards that let you customize your character’s looks, tricks and style. Want to skate in your flip flops… go for it. Want to wear a bumble bee onesie …ok then… no judgement. In OlliOlli World as long as you’re on board anything goes!

**The Ramp: A Digital Toy for Pure Skateboarding Flow**

If you're searching for an experience that captures the pure essence of vert skateboarding, look no further than The Ramp. This unique digital toy, developed by a solo creator named Paul, focuses entirely on delivering that unparalleled feeling of shredding through a halfpipe. While it supports keyboard input, The Ramp is best enjoyed with a controller, offering a gameplay experience that emphasizes flow and satisfying skateboarding mechanics.

The Ramp is designed for players who crave the thrill of skateboarding without the usual distractions. It excels at providing "tons of flow" and unique skateboarding gameplay that is easy to pick up but challenging to master. However, it's important to note what The Ramp *doesn't* offer. You won't find any unlockable content, scores, missions, or the typical action-packed elements like guns, explosions, or helicopters.

As the developer, Paul, explains, The Ramp is a deliberately small experience, perhaps best described as a digital toy rather than a traditional game. Its primary goal is to replicate the exhilarating feeling of real-life vert skateboarding. The game offers approximately 15 minutes of pure flow that can transform a mundane day into something great, all at the cost of a modest coffee. Paul encourages players to reach out with any feedback, questions, or issues, and genuinely appreciates hearing from those who have enjoyed their time with The Ramp.

Name: OlliOlli2: Welcome to Olliwood
Description:
Drop in to Olliwood and prepare for finger-flippin’ mayhem in this follow up to cult skateboarding smash OlliOlli. The iconic skater is going all green-screen with a stunning new look, plucking you from the street and dropping you squarely in the middle of the big screen’s most bodacious cinematic locations. Revamped Paths and Combos: The sequel boasts all new ramps and epic hills allowing for monster air and multi-route levels. Further, OlliOlli2’s combo system has been expanded with the joy of manuals, reverts, revert manuals and grind switching giving you more control and expression than ever before. Expanded Bag of Tricks: The hallowed ‘Tricktionary’ also expands with new specials including 540 Shove-its, Anti-Casper Flips and Darkslides. New Worlds and Levels: Five new worlds, 50 new Amateur and Pro Levels and 250 new Challenges to tear through, along with the return of the much loved Daily Grind, Spots Mode and RAD Mode. Local Multiplayer Mode: OlliOlli2 introduces a gnarly new local multiplayer mode – Combo Rush, a split-screen four-player party mode with four unique game modes. Legendary Soundtrack: Once again, the crate diggers at Roll7 have scoured the airwaves for a shimmering extended soundtrack, including, Cid Rim, Lone, Faulty DL, Submerse and Mike Slott.

**Thirsty Suitors: A Game of Love, Culture, and Self-Discovery**

*Thirsty Suitors* is a game that explores the complexities of love, culture, and self-discovery. You play as Jala, a young woman preparing for her sister's wedding. Jala must navigate **parental expectations**, confront **past relationships**, and **mend friendships**. The arrival of her strict grandmother, Paati, intensifies these challenges.

The game offers a unique blend of gameplay mechanics:

*   **Turn-Based Battles:** Jala faces her ex-partners in stylish, turn-based combat. This system utilizes a **mood system** to identify and exploit opponents' vulnerabilities. Players can enhance Jala's abilities and unleash special moves, reflecting her **emotional journey** through past relationships.

*   **Skateboarding Exploration:** Traverse the vibrant world of Timber Hills on a skateboard. Perform tricks and uncover hidden secrets, allowing players to **express themselves through movement**.

*   **Cooking for Connection:** Rebuild relationships and earn family approval by cooking. Prepare **South Asian-inspired dishes**, a mechanic designed to **show love and build bridges** within the game's narrative.

OlliOlli is a skateboarding game that challenges players with its **addictive one-life gameplay**. Developed by Roll7, it features an extensive repertoire of over **120 unique tricks and grinds**, integrated into 50 distinct levels. To further test player mastery, there are 250 specific challenges to overcome.

The game offers several modes to keep players engaged. Beyond the core progression, OlliOlli includes a **Spots Mode** and a **Daily Grind** feature. For those seeking the ultimate challenge, completing all challenges unlocks the exceptionally demanding **RAD Mode**. The core gameplay loop focuses on executing fluid combos and achieving perfect landings to climb the global leaderboards. Players can compete worldwide across all modes, aiming for the highest scores on every level and spot. The Daily Grind mode provides a 24-hour window to compete on a randomly chosen spot, allowing unlimited practice but only a single attempt for an official score.

A key mechanic is the **"Press to Land"** system, which rewards precise timing for landings and grinds, allowing players to truly connect with the rhythm of skateboarding. The game also features an online **"Showboating"** mode, where players compete for leaderboard supremacy, encouraging them to push for extra tricks for global dominance.

OlliOlli's environments are varied, with **five different stages**, each offering unique levels and obstacles. Players will grind over JCBs in a junkyard and perform heelflips over dinosaurs in a neon-themed world. The game boasts a **"Sick hand-picked soundtrack"** featuring artists like The Qemists, Dorian Concept, and Flako, enhancing the synergy between jazz and skateboarding. Players can also collect **"Silverware"** in the form of gold, silver, and bronze medals for bragging rights.

Name: Skater XL - The Ultimate Skateboarding Game
Description:
Skater XL is the evolution of skateboarding gameplay. With it’s Independent Foot Control System and unique physics-based gameplay, skate gamers finally have the expressive controls they have always dreamed of. Dive into skateboarding paradise with levels that feature famous skate landmarks and environmental elements, including Downtown LA, the ginormous The Big Ramp, Easy Day High School, and community created maps like Grant Park, Hüdland and Streets. Play as some of today’s top skateboarding pros Tiago Lemos, Evan Smith, Tom Asta and Brandon Westgate, or customize and create your own skateboarding legend with gear from more than 30 real skate brands. Skater XL is truly the skateboarding world’s digital counterpart. Skater XL features include: Freedom Of Expression - Skater XL’s physics-based controls don’t have any pre-programmed tricks - only the movement through the thumbsticks. Each thumbstick is connected to the corresponding foot of the skater and as the player moves the stick, the board instantly responds. Much like a musical instrument, the player has complete freedom, whether it be pushing to nail a line or skating free from. Multiplayer Free Skate - Link up and skate with your friends in groups of up to 10 players and shoot replays together. Real Life Iconic Locations - Skater XL levels are all inspired real-world skate areas and designed to ensure a constant flow of skate lines. From the DTLA Map with skateboarding landmarks around the Staples Center and LA Convention Center, to Easy Day High School’s sprawling campus of iconic skate spots like the Wallenberg Big 4 and the ‘Leap of Faith’, to the humongous ‘Big Ramp,’ where skaters can soar higher than a hawk. Play As Real-Life Skate Pros - Select from renowned pros Tiago Lemos, Brandon Westgate, Evan Smith, and Tom Asta, all with their own distinct gear that fits their style. Customizable Characters - The possibilities are endless to personalize the Skater XL experience. Players can customize their entire look, including their skater’s gear with different tees, hoodies, hats and shoes from over 30 of the most recognized skate brands like Vans, Santa Cruz, DC Shoes, Independent, Lakai and many more. Trick Challenges - Hundreds of challenges with progressive difficulties, to help build your bag of tricks as you move further toward the completing them all. Can check off the entire list?? Dive into a passionate community with more than 100,000 members in Discord (the biggest Discord in the World for reference is Fortnite at 500k, amazing given that Skater XL is still in Early Access!) who create online zines, video parts, fakeskate brands, and hundreds of mods. Players can become part of a bigger ecosystem and join the digital skateboarding subculture where they can share their creativity on the newly launched Skater XL modding hub, Skaterxl.mod.io. Legit Soundtrack - Modest Mouse, Getter, Interpol, Animal Collective, Future Islands and Band Of Horses headline the distinctive music that blends well with the Skater XL’s West Coast vibe and fluid physics-based control mechanics. IMPORTANT: This game REQUIRES an Xbox 360, One, PS3 or PS4 compatible controller to play. There are NO keyboard controls available. It also requires a DirectX 11 or above graphics card.

Get ready for **Urban Trial Tricky™ Deluxe Edition**, the ultimate experience for motorbike trick enthusiasts! This game lets you fully express yourself as you navigate the urban jungle, combining motorbike tricks, style, and extreme levels to become unstoppable.

**KEY FEATURES:**

*   **Exciting, light-hearted casual gameplay:** Enjoy a fun and accessible experience.
*   **Crazy mix of tricks, platforming, and racing:** Master a unique blend of skills.
*   **Killer tricks to combine in countless combos:** "The game offers a 'crazy mix of tricks, platforming, and racing,' allowing players to 'grab your seat and pull off the most savage tricks and combos on your motorbike.'"
*   **Super-smooth experience:** Enjoy fluid controls and visuals.
*   **3 single-player modes:** Dive into various ways to play.
*   **Over 30 levels + side challenges:** Explore a vast amount of content.
*   **Savage customization options:** Personalize your rider and bike.
*   **Leaderboards to rule:** Compete for the top spot.
*   **Infinite gameplay:** Experience endless fun.
*   **More freedom, more fun:** Ride in both directions for enhanced gameplay.

**Urban Trial Tricky Deluxe Edition** includes six additional customization options, each featuring a new rider skin, a signature special trick, and a matching motorbike paint job.

**DEFY GRAVITY WITH CRAZY TRICKS! BECOME A CRAZY TRICKSTER!**

Grab your seat and pull off the most savage tricks and combos on your motorbike. Ride freely, spin around in the air, go back and forth, and let yourself be carried away by the fun, fast-paced gameplay, colorful visuals, and smooth controls. As one reviewer noted, the game provides "more freedom, more fun."

**GET STYLISH!**

Learn new freestyle, breakdance, and FMX moves to fit your own style. Unlock crazy costumes and customize your motorbike at will.

**PUSH YOURSELF AND OTHERS TO GREATNESS!**

Complete challenges and master countless outstanding maneuvers and tricks to rule the leaderboards. The game encourages players to "push yourself and others to greatness!"

Hover Skate VR delivers an exhilarating virtual hoverboard experience, letting players perform a vast array of skateboarding tricks using intuitive hand controls. This physics-based simulator is currently in Early Access, featuring over 250 distinct flip and grind maneuvers. Up to four players can join multiplayer sessions across four varied environments: Terminal, Church, High School, and Pro Op Skatepark.

To enhance the gameplay, Hover Skate VR offers several key features. Players can use a replay system and GIF capture to immortalize and share their best runs. A comprehensive trick list aids in technique refinement by allowing detailed study of any flip trick. For a more accessible experience, a comfort mode provides simplified locations.

The game also includes a skill and ranking system, where mastering tricks boosts a player's rank and overall skill. Over 20 location-specific challenges offer rewards like new boards and shoes from the skate shop upon completion. A dedicated training mode is available for learning both fundamental and advanced tricks. Featured trick combinations, such as the HardFlip FS Noseslide at School, Varial Heelflip to BS Tailslide at Church, and Big Hardflip to Switch 5-0 at Terminal, showcase the depth of potential maneuvers. The developers note that the content is not final and may change.

Kiteboarding Pro offers an exhilarating virtual kitesurfing experience, allowing players to engage in a variety of thrilling game modes. Whether you're aiming to set new records in time trials, achieve the ultimate high score in freestyle, or execute massive jumps in freeride mode, this game pushes the boundaries of what's possible. The game encompasses a wide spectrum of kiteboarding disciplines, from wakestyle and oldschool tricks to daring kiteloops and dynamic wave riding.

This semi-realistic kitesurfing simulation features procedural animations, enabling a diverse range of tricks. Players can perform everything from straightforward grabs and board-offs to intricate unhooked maneuvers. The game meticulously simulates wind conditions, with a wind range that can be adjusted from a gentle breeze of approximately 8 knots to powerful gusts reaching up to 50 knots. As the wind strength fluctuates, so does the size of the kite, with smaller kites offering a more dynamic and hectic experience compared to their larger counterparts.

Exploration is a key element, with three distinct main maps offering varied environments: a vibrant Caribbean-style setting, a serene lake, and a stark icy world. To enhance visual diversity, players can experience these maps under different atmospheric conditions, from clear skies to overcast weather, and at various times of day, from morning to sundown.

For those with a competitive spirit, Kiteboarding Pro presents two primary modes: Freestyle and Time Trials. Both modes allow players to strive for high scores and measure their performance against a global ranking of players. Successful completion of specific objectives rewards players with bonus kites and boards. Mastering the sport in Kiteboarding Pro requires players to develop proficiency in controlling both the board and the kite. Initially, new players may find the dual control aspect challenging, mirroring the learning curve of real-life kiteboarding. However, as players progress and gain experience, the addictive nature of the sport is sure to captivate them.

**Skator Gator: A High-Octane Skateboarding Adventure**

In the game Skator Gator, players step into the scaly shoes of a determined alligator. This alligator's tranquil swamp existence is shattered by the arrival of avaricious capitalist robots. These robots are ruthlessly draining the local peat bog, with the sole intention of building miniature golf courses. Your objective is to embark on a fast-paced, lane-based platforming adventure. You'll navigate across the robots' oil pipelines, making your way to the city. Your goal is to champion the cause of environmental preservation and, perhaps, cause a little chaos along the way.

The perilous pipelines are fraught with challenges, requiring advanced skateboarding abilities. Players will need to contend with scattered gator eggs, persistent robots determined to thwart their progress, and a multitude of obstacles. The game offers more than 20 levels to unlock and explore, divided among three distinct regions within the fictional locale of Greenjamin. Additionally, there are secret levels to uncover. Rescuing gator eggs as you advance allows for the unlocking of new cosmetic items, enabling players to personalize their alligator's look. Each level also features special developer times, presenting a significant challenge for even the most skilled skateboarders. The question remains: can you outmaneuver the fastest times set by the developers?

Name: Disco Elysium - The Final Cut
Description:
Disco Elysium - The Final Cut is the definitive edition of the groundbreaking role playing game. You’re a detective with a unique skill system at your disposal and a whole city block to carve your path across. Interrogate unforgettable characters, crack murders, or take bribes. Become a hero or an absolute disaster of a human being. Full voice acting. All of the city's beautiful people are brought to life with full English voiceover. Play characters against each other, try to help them, or fall hopelessly in love as each word is spoken to you with the appropriate accent and emotion. New political vision quests. Face the reality of your worldview as your political compass leads you down new paths. Discover more citizens, a whole extra area, and monumental sights as you leave an even bigger mark on the world by chasing your dreams. Unprecedented freedom of choice​. Intimidate, sweet-talk, resort to violence, write poetry, sing karaoke, dance like a beast, or solve the meaning of life. Disco Elysium - The Final Cut is the most faithful representation of desktop role playing ever attempted in video games. Countless tools for role playing. ​ Mix and match from 24 wildly different skills. Develop a personal style with over 80 clothing items. Wield 14 tools from guns to flashlights to a boombox, or pour yourself a cocktail of 6 different psychoactive substances. Develop your character even further with 60 wild ​thoughts ​to think – with the detective's Thought Cabinet. A revolutionary dialogue system with unforgettable characters. ​The world is alive with real people, not extras. Ask probing questions, make insightful observations, or express your wildest desires as you play cop or something completely different. Disco Elysium's revolutionary dialogue system lets you do almost anything. Carve your unique path across the city​. Explore, manipulate, collect tare, or become a millionaire in an open world unlike anything you've seen before. The city of Revachol is yours for the taking, one small piece at a time. From the streets to the beaches – and beyond. Hard boiled, hard core. ​Death, sex, taxes, and disco – nothing is off the table. Revachol is a real place with real challenges. Solve a massive murder investigation, or relax and kick back with sprawling side-cases. The detective decides, the citizens abide.

**Persona 5 Royal: The Definitive Phantom Thief Experience**

Dive into the **award-winning RPG experience** with Persona 5 Royal, the definitive edition packed with a treasure trove of downloadable content. This enhanced version invites you to a **unique high school life in Tokyo**, where the protagonist faces a cryptic prophecy: "You truly are a prisoner of fate. In the near future, ruin awaits you."

**Embrace Your Phantom Thief Persona**

Under the shadow of "rehabilitation," you'll don the mask of a Phantom Thief. Your mission? To **save others from their distorted desires**. This is your chance to become the ultimate Phantom Thief, **defy conventions**, and **fight for justice**.

**Key Features to Discover:**

*   **Explore the vibrant city of Tokyo.**
*   **Unlock and master powerful Personas.**
*   **Customize your very own Thieves Den.**
*   **Experience multiple alternate endings.**
*   **Enjoy over 40 previously released downloadable content items.**
*   **Choose your preferred voice-over language: Japanese or English.**

Persona 5 Royal offers a **deeply engaging story** and **stylish gameplay**. Discover the power within yourself and embark on an unforgettable journey in this definitive version of the acclaimed RPG.

**BioShock: A Revolutionary Shooter Redefining Gameplay**

BioShock stands as a **groundbreaking first-person shooter** that completely redefines the genre. It masterfully blends intense combat with meaningful player choice, all set within a **richly imagined and unforgettable world**. Unlike typical shooters, BioShock equips you with an **extensive arsenal far beyond conventional firearms**. You'll wield everything from classic revolvers to powerful grenade launchers and chemical throwers, offering a diverse range of offensive capabilities.

The **true innovation**, however, lies in BioShock's **revolutionary genetic modification system**. Players are actively encouraged to **genetically alter their DNA**, transforming themselves into an even more formidable force. Injectable plasmids grant **superhuman abilities**, enabling truly **strategic and dynamic combat encounters**. Imagine unleashing electrical currents through water to incapacitate multiple foes simultaneously, or freezing enemies solid before shattering them with a brutal wrench swing. This **dynamic approach ensures no two gameplay experiences are ever the same**, allowing each player to forge their own unique path through the game.

Further enhancing player agency, BioShock allows for **extensive biological modification**. Unleash devastating firestorms from your fingertips or command a swarm of killer hornets to do your bidding. Beyond combat, players can **hack into various devices and systems**, **upgrade their weaponry**, and even **craft new ammunition types**. The game actively encourages a **creative approach to combat**, allowing you to turn the environment, your own body, elements like fire and water, and even your adversaries into potent weapons. All of this unfolds within an **astonishing and distinctive Art Deco world**, concealed deep beneath the ocean's surface.

For those fascinated by the artistic vision behind this revolutionary title, **"BioShock: Breaking the Mold"** offers an in-depth look at the game's art direction. This **free download**, available as a 75MB PDF, provides valuable insights into the creative process that brought this unique world to life.

**Half-Life 2: A New Era of Immersive Gaming**

Building on the monumental success of its 1998 predecessor, **Half-Life**, **Half-Life 2** further revolutionized the gaming landscape. The original title, celebrated by PC Gamer as the Best PC Game Ever and recipient of over 50 game-of-the-year awards, masterfully blended intense action with an unparalleled narrative experience. This beloved franchise has achieved global sales exceeding eight million copies.

**Half-Life 2** elevates this immersive experience by retaining the suspense, challenge, and excitement of the first game, while introducing **unprecedented levels of realism and player interaction**. Gamers can now profoundly influence their surroundings, impacting everything from the physical environment to the nuanced behaviors and emotional responses of both allies and adversaries.

Players once again step into the shoes of research scientist **Gordon Freeman**. He returns to an Earth subjugated by alien invaders, its vital resources plundered and its populace enduring immense hardship. Freeman is tasked with confronting the repercussions of his past actions at Black Mesa and spearheading the resistance to liberate the planet, carrying the weight of humanity's hopes.

The **dynamic gameplay** of **Half-Life 2** is powered by **Source®**, Valve's groundbreaking proprietary engine. Source introduces significant advancements across several key areas:

*   **Character Realism:** An **advanced facial animation system**, featuring 40 distinct facial muscles, imbues characters with lifelike expressiveness. They convey a broad spectrum of emotions and react intelligently to player actions, as noted by industry analysts.
*   **Advanced Physics:** The game meticulously simulates realistic object behavior, from small debris to large vehicles, adhering to fundamental principles of **mass, friction, gravity, and buoyancy**. This level of detail was highlighted in a review by IGN.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Source's **shader-based renderer**, employing technology akin to that used by Pixar Animation Studios, generates **exceptionally beautiful and photorealistic game environments**.
*   **Intelligent AI:** Both allied characters and enemy forces exhibit sophisticated artificial intelligence. They demonstrate the ability to **assess threats, navigate complex terrain, and improvise weaponry** from their surroundings, moving beyond simplistic attack patterns. This advanced AI was a focal point in a technical analysis by GameSpot.

**Half-Life: A Game-Changer**

Valve's first game, **Half-Life**, changed video games forever. It won **Game of the Year from over 50 sources**. This popular game mixed exciting action with a good story. Players felt like they were in a **real world** thanks to its advanced tech. To win, players needed **smart moves and quick reactions**.

Half-Life also had a **fun online game mode**. Players could fight each other, making it a **big step forward for gaming**. One reviewer said it offered a "deeply engaging experience that raised the bar for games."

Portal 2 is the highly anticipated sequel to the award-winning game that captivated players with its **innovative gameplay**, **compelling story**, and **memorable soundtrack**. Building on the success of its predecessor, which received over 70 industry awards, Portal 2 introduces a **rich cast of new characters**, **fresh puzzle mechanics**, and **intricately designed test chambers**. Players will explore new areas of Aperture Science Laboratories, meet familiar faces, and navigate their complex relationship with **GLaDOS**, the unpredictable AI.

The game also features a **robust two-player cooperative mode**. This mode offers a separate campaign with its own story, challenging puzzles, and two new characters. Success in co-op requires **synchronized actions** and a **collaborative problem-solving approach**.

Key features of Portal 2 include:

*   **Engaging Single-Player Campaign:** Experience next-generation gameplay and a deep narrative.
*   **Unique Two-Player Co-op:** A dedicated multiplayer experience with its own story, characters, and mechanics.
*   **Advanced Physics:** Enables a wide range of innovative challenges, creating a larger, accessible game.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** A captivating score enhances the gameplay.
*   **Acclaimed Legacy:** The original Portal was named Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Included Editing Tools:** Players can create and share their own content.

Portal 2 builds upon the acclaimed gameplay, narrative, and music of its predecessor, which garnered over 70 industry awards and a dedicated fanbase. This sequel expands the experience with a rich single-player campaign featuring new characters, innovative puzzle mechanics, and more challenging test chambers. Players will venture into unexplored sections of the Aperture Science Labs and encounter GLaDOS, the memorable, albeit sometimes dangerous, AI from the first game.

The game also introduces a distinct two-player cooperative mode. This mode offers a separate campaign with its own storyline, unique puzzles, and two new playable characters. It emphasizes collaborative problem-solving, requiring players to "think cooperatively" to succeed.

**Key Features:**

*   **Extensive Single-Player Campaign:** Experience next-generation gameplay and a deeply engaging story.
*   **Two-Person Cooperative Mode:** Enjoy a dedicated multiplayer campaign with its own narrative, characters, and gameplay.
*   **Advanced Physics:** The game's physics engine enables a wide array of creative challenges, making the game larger without increasing its difficulty.
*   **Original Soundtrack:** Features a new score composed for the game.
*   **Significant Sequel:** The original Portal was recognized as Game of the Year by over 30 publications in 2007.
*   **Editing Tools:** Portal 2 will include tools for players to create their own content.

**The Elder Scrolls V: Skyrim**

Experience **epic fantasy reborn** in the next chapter of the acclaimed Elder Scrolls saga. Developed by Bethesda Game Studios, the creators of the 2006 and 2008 Games of the Year, Skyrim offers a revolutionary open-world fantasy experience. It brings to life a **complete virtual world** that you can explore entirely on your own terms.

**Live another life in another world.** Imagine and play any character you desire, and pursue any path you choose. The legendary freedom of choice, storytelling, and adventure that defines The Elder Scrolls is realized here like never before.

Skyrim features an **all-new graphics and gameplay engine**. This engine vividly brings to life a complete virtual world, complete with rolling clouds, rugged mountains, bustling cities, lush fields, and ancient dungeons.

**You are what you play.** Customize your character by choosing from hundreds of weapons, spells, and abilities. The innovative character system empowers you to play your way and define yourself through your actions. Prepare to **battle ancient dragons** in ways you've never imagined. As the Dragonborn, you will learn their secrets and harness their power for yourself.

Name: Mass Effect 2 (2010)
Description:
Recruit. Explore. Control. Two years after Commander Shepard repelled invading Reapers bent on the destruction of organic life, a mysterious new enemy has emerged. On the fringes of known space, something is silently abducting entire human colonies. Now Shepard must work with Cerberus, a ruthless organization devoted to human survival at any cost, to stop the most terrifying threat mankind has ever faced. To even attempt this perilous mission, Shepard must assemble the galaxy’s most elite team and command the most powerful ship ever built. Even then, they say it would be suicide. Commander Shepard intends to prove them wrong. Just like in the previous game, what you say to the other characters matters a great deal. Fortunately, the conversation system has been improved. The camera now pans around characters as they talk to one another to evoke a dramatic, cinematic feel. Also, Shepard can interrupt the conversation when given the appropriate prompt, taking situations into new directions that could help or hinder the mission. Shepard is more customizable than ever, letting you create your ideal lead character — gender, facial features, class, and of course, attitude. Once you embark on missions, you’ll be treated to an improved battle system that lets you target weak points and blast off your enemy’s limbs with a variety of weapons. Set out to lead your team to victory… or die at the hands of The Collectors. Either path is possible in BioWare’s smash hit, Mass Effect 2. Which destiny will you choose? Features: The second act of BioWare’s epic sci-fi trilogy continues the story of Commander Shepard and humanity’s first steps onto the galactic stage Success – or failure – depends heavily on the crew you assemble and their loyalty to you and the mission Stunning graphics and a refined dialog system will draw you into the story like never before Numerous improvements to the intense, third-person shooter combat Deep character customization options let you create your own vision of Commander Shepard Online Disclaimer EA ACCOUNT, REGISTRATION WITH ENCLOSED SERIAL CODE, INTERNET CONNECTION AND ACCEPTANCE OF END USER LICENSE AGREEMENT REQUIRED TO ACCESS ONLINE FEATURES AND/OR SERVICES. EA ONLINE TERMS AND CONDITIONS CAN BE FOUND AT WWW.EA.COM . YOU MUST BE 13+ TO REGISTER FOR AN EA ACCOUNT. EA MAY PROVIDE CERTAIN INCREMENTAL CONTENT AND/OR UPDATES FOR NO ADDITIONAL CHARGE, IF AND WHEN AVAILABLE. EA MAY RETIRE ONLINE FEATURES AFTER 30 DAYS NOTICE POSTED ON WWW.EA.COM .

**The Elder Scrolls IV: Oblivion® Game of the Year Edition Deluxe** offers a definitive experience of the acclaimed role-playing game. This package immerses players in a vast, detailed world, allowing for unparalleled exploration and adventure. Whether you choose to follow the epic main quest or uncover hidden secrets, Oblivion empowers you to shape your own destiny. The Game of the Year Edition Deluxe includes two major expansions, **Knights of the Nine** and **Shivering Isles**, which significantly expand the game's content and solidify its reputation as a landmark RPG.

In Oblivion, players have the freedom to **create any character imaginable**, from a mighty warrior to a cunning assassin or a powerful sorcerer. The game features an **intense first-person combat system** and an advanced magic system that create a dynamic and engaging role-playing experience. A key innovation is the **revolutionary Radiant AI**, which gives NPCs realistic 24/7 schedules and allows them to make independent decisions. This system contributes to a truly living world where characters interact with their environment and pursue their own goals. As one critic observed, "Radiant AI makes the world feel truly alive, with NPCs reacting to events and pursuing their own lives."

The **Shivering Isles** expansion invites players to **explore new realms** within a surreal landscape shaped by the Daedric Prince Sheogorath. This expansion presents a unique challenge, featuring **terrifying foes** such as monstrous insects, hulking Flesh Atronachs, and shambling skeletal horrors. In the **Knights of the Nine** expansion, players can **rebuild a legendary faction**. This quest involves aiding the long-disbanded Knights, restoring their honor, and defeating a growing evil that threatens the land of Cyrodiil.

The **Deluxe Edition Content** further enriches the Oblivion experience with additional Downloadable Content (DLC), all presented in English:

*   **Fighter's Stronghold Expansion:** Experience life as a noble warrior in a grand castle.
*   **Knights of the Nine Quest:** Embark on a quest to defeat evil, discover new dungeons, and interact with compelling characters.
*   **Spell Tome Treasures:** Find valuable books containing a diverse array of spells to unlock new magical abilities.
*   **Vile Lair:** Discover a hidden underwater sanctuary, perfect for nefarious players.
*   **Mehrune's Razor:** Conquer a challenging dungeon to obtain a powerful weapon.
*   **The Thieves Den:** Claim a lost pirate ship as your own, ideal for stealthy characters.
*   **Wizard's Tower:** Ascend Frostcrag Spire, a magical tower designed for magic users.
*   **Orrery:** Rebuild the Orrery to harness celestial power and uncover secrets within the Mages Guild.
*   **Horse Armor Pack:** Equip your horse with armor for protection and style.

Name: NORCO
Description:
NORCO is a Southern Gothic point & click narrative adventure that immerses the player in the sinking suburbs and verdant industrial swamps of a distorted South Louisiana. Your brother Blake has gone missing in the aftermath of your mother's death. In the hopes of finding him, you must follow a fugitive security android through the refineries, strip malls, and drainage ditches of suburban New Orleans. Immerse yourself in a surreal and uncanny South Louisiana NORCO’s painterly and cinematic pixel art draws the player into its quotidian sci-fi world of disappearing swamplands, labyrinthine oil refineries, and other landscapes inspired by the titular town of Norco, Louisiana and other parts of Greater New Orleans. Sink into the rich field recordings and sound design by fmAura and a driving, post-industrial electronic score from Gewgawly I. Unravel a mystery in a world haunted by the past and threatened by the future What starts as a straightforward search for your missing brother quickly spirals into a multigenerational mystery. The lines between salvation, memory, technology, and nature bleed together into a uniquely compelling, contemplative narrative rooted in Southern literature, pulp fiction, and point & click adventure games both classic and contemporary. Explore alongside sharply drawn characters with deep roots, rich backstories, and complex motives A chaotic bayou pirate, bar-stool private detective, escaped security android, and your stuffed childhood monkey will all offer assistance in an eroding and uncertain world. Solve puzzles, fight your way past corporate security goons, and infiltrate an influencer cult squatting an abandoned mall on the outskirts of New Orleans.

Name: Lacuna – A Sci-Fi Noir Adventure
Description:
/ The Save the World Edition includes Lacuna and the game’s atmospheric soundtrack that lets you dive deep into the sci-fi noir world of Lacuna . In addition, Assemble Entertainment donates 10% of the revenues of this edition to Go Give One ; a WHO initiative that provides COVID-19 vaccines amongst others for everyone, everywhere – prioritizing those who need them the most in countries that cannot afford them. On top of this, it’s the best option for all those who would like to support the work of the developer of Lacuna even more and do something good at the same time. Another cigarette tumbles into the abyss. The sun is slowly coming up, glistening in the sea of buildings below. I look up at the stars one last time before they disappear. They don't provide any guidance. They don't give a f*ck. I have to make this decision on my own, and very soon. Problem is, I don't know how. I've never been able to figure out why I do what I do. Not really. No more time to think. I have to go. Here's the deal You are Neil Conrad, CDI agent. Awoken by the news of a murder, you rush into a case that will soon turn your life and the whole solar system upside down. Ask questions, collect evidence, and put the pieces together until the ugly truth reveals itself... or not. No takebacks The story branches and ends based on your actions. There's no going back. Sure, you can rush your way to the end – if you don't mind paying the price. Play your cards right, and you might make it out alive. How far will you go? Some questions don't have a right answer. Will you sell out a friend to protect your family? Will you endanger a loved one in exchange for public safety? Will you keep the peace or reveal the horrible, world-shattering truth? Hungry for Point & Click Adventure? While the classics were great in their time, Lacuna does away with the baggage of many adventure game tropes: Pointing & clicking Platformer movement controls (WASD / controller) Selecting all dialog options one by one anyway Non-repeating conversations and choices Inventory management and counter-intuitive puzzles Immersive, story-driven mysteries Pixel hunting Optional outlines on anything interactable Story grinds to a halt at every puzzle can always be driven forward 'x will remember this' Real choices and multiple endings

**Her Story: Unraveling a Crime Through Interactive Video**

Explore the compelling narrative of *Her Story*, an acclaimed video game that immerses you in the role of an investigator. Developed by Sam Barlow, known for his innovative work on titles like *Silent Hill: Shattered Memories* and *Aisle*, *Her Story* offers a distinctive crime fiction experience built on non-linear storytelling. The game's foundation is a police database filled with live-action video footage. The central performance is by Viva Seifert, a talented actress and musician, also known as one half of the band Joe Gideon and the Shark.

**The Investigative Process:**

In *Her Story*, you interact with a simulated vintage desktop computer, accessing a police database containing recorded video interviews. These clips, filmed in 1994, capture a British woman recounting her husband's disappearance over seven separate interview sessions. To uncover the truth, your primary tool is typing search terms into the database. Each term you input will surface video clips where the woman speaks those exact words, enabling you to progressively assemble her story.

As one reviewer observed, "The game is an involving and moving experience. A game that asks you to listen." This groundbreaking method provides a gameplay experience that is truly unique, prompting players to actively engage with the content and form their own interpretations.

Step back 2,000 years and experience the final days of a cursed Roman city. In this unique adventure, a single sin dooms everyone. While combat is possible, it's not the only solution. To unravel this epic mystery, you'll need to question a diverse cast of characters, cleverly use a time loop, and make tough moral decisions. Your choices have real consequences, and the city's fate rests on your shoulders.

Explore an open-world ancient Roman city, complete with historically accurate art, architecture, clothing, and traditions. Dive into a compelling, non-linear mystery that offers multiple endings. Become deeply involved with richly developed, interactive characters. Confront moral dilemmas where lives hang in the balance. You can play as any character you choose, selecting their gender, background, and personal history. Solve challenges using logic, persuasion, bribery, threats, force, or by ingeniously manipulating the time loop.

**Telling Lies: Uncover the Truth in a Game of Secret Conversations**

Dive into **Telling Lies**, the groundbreaking new video game from **Sam Barlow**, the visionary creator behind acclaimed titles like **Her Story** and **Silent Hill: Shattered Memories**. This isn't just another game; it's an **investigative thriller** that plunges you into a world of **non-linear storytelling** and **secretly recorded video conversations**.

**Telling Lies** places you in the role of an investigator with access to an anonymous laptop. This laptop contains a **stolen NSA database** brimming with intimate video footage. This footage spans two years and chronicles the lives of four individuals whose stories are intricately woven together by a **shocking incident**.

Your mission is to **explore this vast database** by typing in search terms. As you uncover keywords, you'll be able to watch the video clips where those words are spoken. By meticulously piecing together these fragments, you will **unravel the narrative** and **form your own conclusions**.

Starring **Logan Marshall-Green**, **Alexandra Shipp**, **Kerry Bishé**, and **Angela Sarafyan**, **Telling Lies** offers an experience unlike any other. It's an **intimate and intense journey** where **you are the arbiter of truth**. Prepare to be captivated by a game that challenges your perception and empowers you to **decide what is real**.

**The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark - A Hilarious Point-and-Click Adventure**

Get ready for more paranormal investigations in **The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark**, the latest installment in the beloved point-and-click series. This time, Detective Francis McQueen returns to **Twin Lakes**, America's 34th most haunted city, to tackle six new cases that are plaguing the unfortunate town. Twin Lakes is **definitely cursed**, and it's up to McQueen to sort out the supernatural messes.

The game plunges players back into the bizarre and humorous mysteries of Twin Lakes, where unique curses are a **constant source of trouble**. As the game's description aptly puts it, "Whenever strange noises echo in the night, an unsettling chill creeps up your spine, or something just doesn't smell right, Detective McQueen is on the case."

*A Fumble in the Dark* picks up after the events of the first game, with McQueen embarking on a **personal mission**: rescuing his captured sidekick, Officer Dooley. Dooley has fallen into the clutches of the Darkside, and McQueen is determined to bring him back. Together, they will confront the city's strange, paranormal, and paradoxical occurrences.

This **frighteningly funny adventure** features six distinct, standalone cases for players to solve alongside McQueen and Dooley. Their investigations will take them to a variety of intriguing locations, including a carnival, a retirement home, an amateur wrestling circuit, and even **Ireland**. Their ultimate goal remains the same: to keep the Darkside at bay and restore a semblance of normalcy to Twin Lakes. If the premise of *The Darkside Detective: A Fumble in the Dark* appeals to you, consider playing the first title to experience the series' **unique charm and humor**.

Welcome to **Strange Horticulture**, a captivating game where you'll delve into the dark mysteries of Undermere. This quaint town, nestled between hag-infested forests and rugged mountains, is home to your local plant store. As the **Horticulturist**, you'll encounter a cast of colorful customers, quickly becoming entangled in an **occult mystery** that spans centuries.

Your journey involves more than just tending to your shop. You'll need to **explore the lands beyond your store** to discover and identify new, often peculiar, plants. Be warned, however, as the dark woods and lakes are not always hospitable to a simple herbalist. These expeditions could lead you to **discover powers beyond your wildest dreams** or, conversely, **lose your mind completely**.

To navigate these perilous explorations, you'll rely on **context clues** to determine which locations are safe to visit and which to avoid. Your **trusty encyclopedia** and the clues you gather will be instrumental in learning about the strange flora you encounter. By **identifying each plant**, you unlock their unique effects, which can then be used to **influence the unfolding story**. These effects range from **hypnotic hallucinogens** to **powerful poisons**, giving you significant agency in unraveling Undermere's secrets. Along the way, you can also **pet your cat**, **speak to a coven**, or even **join a cult**, adding further layers to your immersive experience.

Name: L.A. Noire
Description:
Using groundbreaking new animation technology, MotionScan, that captures every nuance of an actor's facial performance in astonishing detail, L.A. Noire is a violent crime thriller that blends breathtaking action with true detective work to deliver an unprecedented interactive experience. Search for clues, chase down suspects and interrogate witnesses as you struggle to find the truth in a city where everyone has something to hide. Amid the post-war boom of Hollywood's Golden Age, Cole Phelps is an LAPD detective thrown headfirst into a city drowning in its own success. Corruption is rampant, the drug trade is exploding, and murder rates are at an all-time high. In his fight to climb the ranks and do what's right, Phelps must unravel the truth behind a string of arson attacks, racketeering conspiracies and brutal murders, battling the L.A. underworld and even members of his own department to uncover a secret that could shake the city to its rotten core. This complete edition of L.A. Noire includes the complete original game and all previously released downloadable content including the 'Nicolson Electroplating' Arson case, the 'Reefer Madness' Vice case, 'The Consul's Car' Traffic case, 'The Naked City' Vice case and 'A Slip of the Tongue' Traffic case.

**L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files - Step into the Shoes of a 1940s Detective**

Experience the gritty reality of 1940s Los Angeles like never before in L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files. This immersive virtual reality title plunges you into the role of Detective Cole Phelps, tasked with unraveling a web of brutal crimes, intricate plots, and dark conspiracies. The game draws inspiration from actual cases from 1947 Los Angeles, a period notorious for its corruption and violence.

L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files features seven meticulously rebuilt cases, specifically designed to leverage the power of virtual reality. This enhanced version adds new dimensions of realism and immersion to Rockstar Games' acclaimed crime thriller. You'll tackle select cases from the original blockbuster game, investigating mysteries across various detective desks, including Traffic, Arson, and Homicide.

As Detective Phelps, you will:

*   **Search for clues:** Physically interact with your environment by grabbing, inspecting, and manipulating objects to uncover vital evidence.
*   **Navigate the city:** Get behind the wheel and drive to your next crime scene, experiencing the city firsthand.
*   **Pursue suspects:** Engage in thrilling chases, intense fistfights, and shootouts as you track down those responsible.
*   **Build your case:** Document your findings by taking notes or sketching directly in your detective's notebook.
*   **Interrogate witnesses:** Employ your sharpest wits to discern truth from deception in a city where secrets are commonplace.

**System Requirements and Compatibility:**

Please note that due to current performance considerations with AMD hardware, specific hardware configurations are necessary for optimal gameplay.

*   **AMD Ryzen 7 CPU users:** An NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 graphics card or higher is required.
*   **AMD Vega 56 graphics card users:** An Intel i7 6700 CPU or higher is required.

Currently, using an AMD CPU and GPU in combination is not supported. L.A. Noire: The VR Case Files supports only a single graphics card architecture; NVIDIA SLI and AMD CrossFire are not compatible.

System requirements may evolve with future programming updates. For the most current compatibility information, consult your hardware manufacturer and visit www.rockstargames.com/support. Certain system components, such as mobile chipsets, integrated graphics, and AGP graphics cards, may not be compatible. Unlisted specifications are not guaranteed to be supported by the publisher.

**Additional Requirements:**

Installation and gameplay necessitate logging into the Rockstar Games Social Club (age restrictions apply). An internet connection is required for activation and ongoing entitlement verification. You will also need to install the Rockstar Games Social Club platform, DirectX 9, the DirectX June 2010 Redistributable Package, Chromium, and Microsoft Visual C++ 2012 and 2015 Redistributable Packages. Authentication software that recognizes certain hardware attributes for entitlement, digital rights management, system, and support purposes is also required.

A single-use serial code registration via the internet is mandatory. Each serial code is linked to one Rockstar Games Social Club account (age restrictions apply) and permits only one PC login per Social Club account at any given time. Serial codes are non-transferable once used, and Social Club accounts are also non-transferable.

**Silicon Dreams: A Cyberpunk Interrogation Experience**

Step into a corporate-controlled dystopian future in **Silicon Dreams**, a game where the lines between human and android have blurred to the point of near invisibility. As an investigator, you'll delve into the lives of both humans and androids, meticulously researching your subjects and carefully selecting your questions to **uncover the truth**, no matter how grim.

In this gripping cyberpunk interrogation, you'll **monitor interviewees' emotions in real time**. Observe their joy, sadness, anger, disgust, shock, and fear. This vital data can be used to your advantage, allowing you to intimidate, cajole, or even befriend your subjects to **extract crucial information**.

As a brewing conflict escalates, you'll be forced to **choose a side**. Will you lie to your superiors and protect deviant androids, or will you condemn them to ensure your own survival within the corporation? **Silicon Dreams offers no easy answers**. Your decisions will shape the narrative, leading to **multiple endings** determined by the choices you make. Ultimately, each android's fate—life or death—rests on the words you speak.

**INSIDE**, an award-winning indie adventure game from Playdead, offers a dark, narrative-driven platforming experience. You play as a hunted boy who becomes entangled in a sinister project.

This critically acclaimed game is celebrated for its intense action and challenging puzzles. **INSIDE** immerses players in a world with a moody art style, an ambient soundtrack, and a deeply unsettling atmosphere. It's a journey that promises to captivate and is not to be missed.

Name: Osmos
Description:
Enter the ambient world of Osmos: elegant, physics-based gameplay, dreamlike visuals, and a minimalist, electronic soundtrack. Your objective is to grow by absorbing other motes. Propel yourself by ejecting matter behind you. But be wise: ejecting matter also shrinks you. Relax - good things come to those who wait. Independent Games Festival finalist in three categories: Seumas McNally Grand Prize, Excellence in Design and Technical Excellence Progress from serenely ambient levels into varied and more challenging worlds. (47 levels, plus bonus content) Confront attractors, repulsors and intelligent motes with similar abilities and goals as you Selected as one of the 2009 PAX 10 Procedural content: play random versions of any level Sublime electronic soundtrack by Loscil, Gas/High Skies, Julien Neto, Biosphere, and more Dynamic time-warping: slow down the flow of time to outmaneuver agile opponents; speed it up to raise the challenge

Name: Incredipede
Description:
A puzzle game that celebrates the vast diversity of life in the world. Quozzle is a lone Incredipede on a quest to rescue her sisters. She can grow new arms, legs, and muscles wherever she needs them. Give her antlers or a tail, stretch her out like a snake, use nature as a blueprint or strike out in weird new directions. Control Quozzle as she learns to swing through the trees, climb sheer cliffs, dance over rivers of lava, and even soar through the air on thermal winds. 120 puzzle levels in beautifully crafted wood-block print style Design a creature to solve every level by adding legs and muscles Control your creation using WASD, flexing muscles to walk, flap, grab, or transform Campaign mode - help Quozzle save her village and discover the truth about the terrible invaders Level Editor and thousands of player-made challenges Immersive ambient soundscape of strange animal calls and chill jungle beats

OVIVO is a unique game that explores the interplay of black and white, creating a world of illusions and hidden messages. The game's core concept revolves around the harmonious coexistence of these two opposing forces, which constantly intertwine and replace each other to maintain balance.

Players control OVO, a character formed from these two halves of the world, possessing the unique ability to switch between them. As OVO journeys through this metaphorical landscape, they must navigate various dangers and collect mysterious symbols. These symbols are key to unraveling the game's narrative, though the interpretation of the story is left entirely to the player.

A standout feature is the "flow mechanics." In the white world, gravity pulls downwards, while in the black world, it pulls upwards. Crucially, OVO's momentum is preserved when transitioning between colors, allowing the character to "float along their border as if it is carried by the flow." This mechanic adds a dynamic layer to the gameplay.

The game boasts "fascinating art," with its metaphorical world brimming with hidden images and optical illusions. OVIVO embraces a "design without words" approach, meaning the story is conveyed solely through gameplay and visuals, without any textual explanations. This emphasis on symbolism and puzzles is evident throughout, with the game "filled with allusions and hidden messages." Complementing this immersive experience is a "meditative ambient soundtrack by Brokenkites."

**Marginalia: A Descent into Kestlebrook's Unsettling Secrets**

Embark on a chilling journey into **Marginalia**, a first-person horror game that plunges you into the enigmatic embrace of Kestlebrook. This secluded valley is a place where the echoes of history intertwine with a disquieting present. Your adventure begins with a cryptic map, sketched by a porter on a brochure, guiding you off the beaten path and into the encroaching darkness. Weeks ago, Eric vanished. Days ago, a letter summoned you to his last known location. Now, you stand at the precipice, questioning not only your whereabouts but the very fabric of time itself.

**Marginalia** offers a deeply immersive narrative experience, meticulously crafted to unravel the mysteries of Kestlebrook. The game features **two interwoven plotlines**, each contributing essential pieces to the overarching story. Explore **vast tracts of New England woodland**, painstakingly handcrafted by the developers, where every shadow seems to hold a secret. At its core, this is a profound story about **loss and the desperate measures one might take to mend a fractured past**. Prepare for a **slow, creeping dread** rather than cheap jump scares, amplified by a **powerful ambient soundtrack** that will keep you on edge. The game also boasts **Xbox controller support** and hints at a rich tapestry of **mythology and ancient runes**. Originally conceived in October 2014, **Marginalia** was **rebuilt from the ground up in 2017**, promising a refined and terrifying experience.

**Elder Puzzle: A Pixel-Art Brain-Teaser**

Dive into **Elder Puzzle**, a captivating puzzle game designed to sharpen your **quick thinking and reaction time**. This game offers a delightful blend of **classic game modes** and **dozens of beautifully crafted levels** rendered in a charming **pixel-art style**.

In Elder Puzzle, your goal is to **assemble scattered puzzle pieces into a single, coherent picture**. You can tailor the experience to your preferred playstyle by **choosing your difficulty level**. Each level presents a unique challenge, with **time limits and a set number of lives** to manage. It's a **colorful and engaging way to train your brain**!

**Key Game Features:**

*   **Variety of Levels:** Explore a wide selection of puzzles to solve.
*   **Stunning Pixel-Art:** Enjoy visually appealing graphics in a classic pixel-art aesthetic.
*   **Customizable Difficulty:** Select the challenge that best suits your skills and preferences.

**Untangle: Unravel the Chilling Truth of Alisha's Disappearance**

Step into the shoes of a student thrust into a terrifying supernatural mystery in "Untangle," a first-person thriller-horror survival game. The narrative centers on Alisha, a bright student plagued by rumors and the harsh reality of school bullying. One fateful day, you find yourself inexplicably transported to an otherworldly version of your school, only to discover you are trapped alongside Alisha's vengeful spirit. Your only path to survival lies in uncovering the dark secrets behind her tragic demise.

"Untangle" aims to shed light on the devastating impact of school violence and bullying through its compelling, fictional storyline. The game poses a critical question to players: are you a perpetrator or a victim?

The synopsis unfolds with Alisha, a former top student and victim of relentless bullying, reported missing from your old school. You are then pulled into an alternate reality of your school, where you learn Alisha is dead. Her spirit, consumed by vengeance, has unleashed a massacre upon the school's bullies. To escape becoming another casualty, you must investigate Alisha's fate and find a way to appease her restless soul. As the game's dark humor suggests, "I'm sorry, but Alisha can't come to the phone right now. Why? Oh, 'cause she's dead (oh)."

**Key Features:**

*   **Immersive First-Person Gameplay:** Experience the horror and suspense firsthand.
*   **Atmospheric and Appealing Graphics:** Dive into a visually striking and unsettling environment.
*   **Engaging Puzzles:** Challenge your intellect as you unravel the mystery.

For an enhanced gaming experience, players can customize visual effects such as Bloom, Film Grain, Motion Blur, and Ambient Occlusion within the settings. While keeping these effects enabled is highly recommended for atmosphere, they may impact frame rates. Adjust these settings to best suit your computer's graphics capabilities.

Name: Relaxicon
Description:
Relaxicon helps you learn English and improve your vocabulary in a meditative way. Combine letters into words to get their definitions, score points, unlock over 70 types of challenges and enjoy original atmospheric background music and in-tune sound effects for a relaxing meditation. Use mouse or keyboard to combine words together. Press Enter to score the word and get a definition. If you made a mistake, use backspace to remove the last letter and continue typing the correct word. Or press delete to break the whole word. When you have a challenge, press space to toggle the description. Game contains over 130000 English word definitions! Soundtrack consists of 9 original ambient pieces , and all sound effects were built specifically in tune with soundtrack, for maximum relaxation and ear pleasure. Headphones are highly recommended. Newer Games by Kodo Linija / / /

**Undergrowth: VR Maze - Explore Art and Nature in Virtual Reality**

Dive into **Undergrowth: VR Maze**, a virtual reality experience focused on relaxation and exploration. This unique digital world lets you discover a collection of **museum-quality artifacts** from around the globe. Guided by Xera, the experience offers **positive energy** and **stunning visuals**, all powered by Crytek's Cryengine.

The VR simulator creates a **realistic natural environment** with layered ambient soundscapes for **deep immersion**. **Undergrowth: VR Maze** encourages you to jump in, explore, and enjoy the good vibes.

Name: NUMTATE
Description:
NUMTATE is a challenging grid based puzzle game in which you move blocks around by rotating, pushing and attracting them to solve numeric puzzles. The game includes 50 handcrafted Levels. Each one with another take on the mechanics which can interact with each other to create more and more complex situations. With the help of the Undo/Redo -System, you can go back and forth in your steps, if you made a mistake or want to see the puzzle in an earlier state. If you need the numbers and positions in check, the Mark-System helps you out. An optional color pallete and pattern are available if needed. The Levels in the game are not enough? Create your own levels with the Level Editor and share them via the export function or the Steam Workshop! IN SHORT: 50 handcrafted puzzles Easy mechanics, complex levels Colorblind options Intuitive level editor Custom level export function Steam Workshop support

Street Fighter IV revitalizes the iconic fighting game series by returning to its core principles. It masterfully blends the beloved moves and strategies of Street Fighter II with Capcom's cutting-edge technology, offering an exceptional experience that reintroduces players to the art of virtual combat.

The game recaptures the **essence that made Street Fighter II a worldwide phenomenon**. Players can step back into the shoes of familiar faces like Ryu, Ken, Chun-Li, and Guile, alongside an exciting roster of new characters such as Crimson Viper, Abel, El Fuerte, and Rufus. Street Fighter IV features **stylized 3D characters and environments**, but crucially maintains the classic **2D Street Fighter viewpoint**, enhanced by dynamic 3D camera angles. The beloved **six-button control layout returns**, now equipped with new special moves and abilities.

Key features include **high-definition graphics**, a **diverse roster of 25 fighters** (including updated classics and newcomers like Crimson Viper, El Fuerte, and Abel), and **innovative special moves** such as **Focus Attacks**, **Super Combos**, and the powerful **Ultra Combo system**. These new mechanics provide fresh challenges for both newcomers and veteran fighters. The game also offers **worldwide online competition** and, for PC players, unique **visual styles** like Watercolor, Poster, and Sumi-E ink.

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

Name: Batman: Arkham Asylum Game of the Year Edition
Description:
Critically acclaimed Batman: Arkham Asylum returns with a remastered Game of the Year Edition, featuring 4 extra Challenge Maps. The additional Challenge Maps are Crime Alley; Scarecrow Nightmare; Totally Insane and Nocturnal Hunter (both from the Insane Night Map Pack). Utilize the unique FreeFlow™ combat system to chain together unlimited combos seamlessly and battle with huge groups of The Joker’s henchmen in brutal melee brawls Investigate as Batman, the WORLD’S GREATEST DETECTIVE, by solving intricate puzzles with the help of cutting edge forensic tools including x-ray scanning, fingerprint scans, ‘Amido Black’ spray and a pheromone tracker Face off against Gotham’s greatest villains including The Joker, HARLEY QUINN, POISON IVY and KILLER CROC Become the Invisible Predator™ with Batman’s fear takedowns and unique vantage point system to move without being seen and hunt enemies Choose multiple takedown methods, including swooping from the sky and smashing through walls. Explore every inch of Arkham Asylum and roam freely on the infamous island, presented for the first time ever in its gritty and realistic entirety Experience what it’s like to be BATMAN using BATARANGS, explosive gel aerosol, The Batclaw, sonar resonator and the line launcher Unlock more secrets by completing hidden challenges in the world and develop and customize equipment by earning experience points Enjoy complete superhero freedom in the environment with the use of Batman’s grapnel gun to get to any place you can see, jump from any height and glide in any direction

**Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition**

Dive into **Batman: Arkham City - Game of the Year Edition**, a critically acclaimed sequel that builds upon the foundations of **Batman: Arkham Asylum**. This expanded adventure places you within the confines of **Arkham City**, a vast, maximum-security prison district that is five times the size of its predecessor. This new, sprawling environment serves as the latest home for Gotham's most notorious criminals, including thugs, gangsters, and cunning masterminds.

As **The Dark Knight**, you are tasked with bringing order to this chaotic urban landscape. Prepare to face an **impressive Rogues Gallery** featuring some of Gotham's most formidable villains. Your mission will bring you face-to-face with iconic adversaries such as **Catwoman, The Joker, The Riddler, Two-Face, Harley Quinn, The Penguin, and Mr. Freeze**, among many others.

The **Game of the Year Edition** is a comprehensive package, bundling the original game with substantial downloadable content. This edition ensures you experience the full scope of **Arkham City's** narrative and challenges.

Included in this edition is a wealth of **new gameplay content**, featuring **seven new challenge maps**, **three additional playable characters**, and **12 unique character skins**. These additions significantly enhance the replayability and offer fresh ways to experience the game.

The **DLC included** comprises:

*   **Catwoman Pack**
*   **Nightwing Bundle Pack**
*   **Robin Bundle Pack**
*   **Harley Quinn’s Revenge**
*   **Challenge Map Pack**
*   **Arkham City Skins Pack**

Explore new environments with maps like **Wayne Manor**, **Main Hall**, **Freight Train**, **Black Mask**, **The Joker's Carnival**, **Iceberg Lounge**, and the **Batcave**. Take on the roles of **Catwoman**, **Robin**, and **Nightwing** with their unique abilities. Furthermore, customize your experience with a variety of **new skins**, including the **1970s Batsuit**, **Year One Batman**, **The Dark Knight Returns**, **Earth One Batman**, **Batman Beyond**, **Animated Batman**, **Sinestro Corps Batman**, **Long Halloween Catwoman**, **Animated Catwoman**, **Animated Robin**, **Red Robin**, and **Animated Nightwing**.

**Bayonetta: A PC Masterpiece of Pure Action**

Prepare for **pure, unadulterated action** as SEGA brings the critically acclaimed character action game, Bayonetta, to PC. Developed by PlatinumGames, helmed by the legendary Hideki Kamiya (creator of *Resident Evil* and *Devil May Cry*), this title plunges you into the shoes of **Bayonetta**, the last of an ancient witch clan. Her sacred duty: to maintain the delicate balance between light, dark, and chaos.

After being entombed for 500 years to protect herself and the world, Bayonetta is awakened. This revival ignites a **chain of events with cataclysmic repercussions**. With only a single clue to her forgotten past, she is thrust into a desperate battle for the truth and the future. Her **daunting conquest** will see her face off against **countless angelic enemies and giant foes** in a game that delivers **100% pure action**. For the ultimate experience, **BAYONETTA ON PC IS BEST EXPERIENCED WITH A CONTROLLER**.

**Features that Define Deadly Grace:**

*   **Alluring and Stylish Heroine:** Bayonetta herself is a force to be reckoned with – an **all-action heroine unlike anyone else on the gaming landscape**, ready to push your senses to their absolute limit.
*   **Climax Action:** Experience **over-the-top action in extreme environments**, leading to **continuous high levels of tension and excitement**. Bayonetta elevates the genre with **new realms of intensity**.
*   **Extravagant Combat:** Wield an **impressive arsenal of weapons** through an **intuitive and fluid combat system**. Unleash **deadly combos and special attacks** for devastating results.
*   **Supernatural Powers:** Tap into **gruesome torture attacks**, including the Iron Maiden and Guillotine, to **finish off enemies and send them to hell**.
*   **Full Steam Support:** Enjoy **Steam Achievements, Steam Cloud Save, Trading Cards, Leader Boards, and Big Picture Mode**.
*   **Enhanced PC Graphics Options:** Immerse yourself with **unlocked resolutions up to 4K**, anti-aliasing, anisotropic filtering, SSAO lighting, scalable texture and shadow quality, and more.
*   **Bilingual Voice Overs:** **Freely switch between English and Japanese voiceovers and subtitles** at any time.

Name: Guacamelee! Gold Edition
Description:
Guacamelee! Gold Edition is a Metroidvania-style action-platformer set in a magical Mexican-inspired world. The game draws its inspiration from traditional Mexican culture and folklore, and features many interesting and unique characters. Guacamelee! builds on the classic open-world Metroidvania style of games by adding deep melee combat, a new dimension switching mechanic, and cooperative local multiplayer. The game also blurs the boundaries between combat and platforming by making many moves useful and necessary for both. Travel through a mystical and mysterious Mexican world as a luchador using the power of your two fists to battle evil. Uncover hidden wrestling techniques like the Rooster Uppercut, and Dimension Swap to open new areas and secrets. Key Features Use combat moves for both fighting enemies and platforming challenges Swap between multiple overlapping dimensions (World of the Living and the World of the Dead) 'El Infierno' level expansion. Brave the fires of El Infierno and prove yourself in a series of challenges to unlock powerful new costumes for Juan and Tostada Player costumes! Swap costumes to change the attributes of your Hero, and obtain new achievements Steam Achievements, Leaderboards, Cloud Save, and Big Picture Mode Trading Cards Create new custom costumes and share these with others via Steam Workshop Drop in/out 2-Player local co-operative play for the entire story Chickens. Lots and lots of Chickens Also Available: Super Turbo Championship Edition! An alternate, expanded edition of Guacamelee! is now available to Steam PC users! Guac STCE adds to the Gold Edition with extra powers, levels and enemies, and enhancements to gameplay and graphics. Click the banner to find out more.

In a post-apocalyptic world where humanity struggles for survival against chaos and mutated creatures, a **sinister threat** has emerged: dogs are vanishing. You play as Alpha, a lone wanderer still grieving the loss of his childhood dog. While traversing the desolate wastelands, Alpha witnesses mutants abducting a lost puppy. This critical moment reveals Alpha's extraordinary ability to **understand the pup**, who introduces himself as T. Juan!

Together, Alpha and T. Juan embark on an epic quest to unravel the mystery of the disappearing dogs. You are invited to join their journey of discovery and rescue.

Your mission will be supported by a diverse cast of canine companions, each possessing unique skills. The **Newfoundland** provides a vital passive healing ability, keeping your team strong. During intense combat, the **Tibetan Mastiff** can enter a powerful "beast mode" to turn the tide of battle. Additionally, the **Beagle** offers its charm and a set of distinct abilities that prove essential. Your objective is to rescue these brave dogs and strategically deploy them against the villains threatening them. Prepare to explore a world that has truly gone to the dogs, venturing through **desolate badlands**, **ruined cities**, **military bases**, and **forgotten jungles**, all while traveling in an **upgradable RV**.

This harsh world presents a variety of enemies, from grotesque mutants to electrifying foes. To survive, you must give your all against the numerous antagonists you will encounter. Beyond direct combat, your strategic prowess will be tested in a unique tower defense experience. When confronting mutated enemies, you will have numerous offensive and defensive options to secure your area. Your arsenal includes **super soakers**, **steel walls**, and **wire traps**, offering a wealth of strategic choices.

Dive into the **vibrant, decadent world of 1980s Japan** with Yakuza 0. This action-adventure game plunges you into the **neon-lit streets of Tokyo and Osaka**, where you'll fight your way through a gripping narrative. You'll experience the story through the eyes of two iconic characters: **Kazuma Kiryu**, a stoic yakuza lieutenant whose life takes a dark turn when a routine debt collection leads to murder, and **Goro Majima**, a charismatic but tormented club owner living a seemingly "normal" life.

Yakuza 0 boasts a **dynamic combat system** that lets you switch between three distinct fighting styles on the fly, allowing for brutal efficiency against hordes of enemies. You can also **leverage the environment** for devastating attacks, using objects like bicycles, signposts, and even car doors to unleash savage takedowns. Beyond the intense battles, the game offers a wealth of **1988's Japan distractions**. Immerse yourself in the era's entertainment, from energetic discos and glamorous hostess clubs to classic SEGA arcades. The richly detailed world is brimming with activities, including over **100 unique side stories** that flesh out the game's world and its colorful inhabitants.

Name: Injustice™ 2
Description:
Power up and build the ultimate version of your favourite DC legends in INJUSTICE 2. •EVERY BATTLE DEFINES YOU: With every match you'll earn gear to equip, customise and evolve your roster. •A NEW THREAT RISES: Picking up where Injustice left off, Batman struggles against Superman's regime, as a new threat appears that will put Earth's very existence at risk. •THE BEST OF DC: Choose from the biggest DC Universe roster ever and battle across iconic locations in epic-scale battles. •BUILT BY NETHERREALM: Developers of the best-selling and critically acclaimed MORTAL KOMBAT franchise.

## Full Metal Furies: The Ultimate Cooperative Action RPG

Embark on an epic adventure with **FULL METAL FURIES**, a groundbreaking 'true-cooperative' action RPG from the creators of Rogue Legacy. This innovative title emphasizes playing together, featuring a unique combat system where every player's actions are crucial to defeating tough enemies and saving a world on the brink of destruction. **Teamwork isn't just encouraged; it's the key to survival.**
