### Unite to Win: The Power of Cooperative Combat

**FULL METAL FURIES** redefines the action RPG genre by demanding real coordination to overcome enemies. Foes will appear with colored shields, and only allies of the same color can break through. This necessitates constant communication and strategic positioning. The game also highlights the importance of aiding fallen teammates. While revive bars refill over time, a swift assist can be a lifesaver. This cooperative focus eliminates common frustrations like fighting over the last hit, battling for loot, or scrambling for health drops. **All resources are shared**, allowing players to concentrate fully on working together. As the developers stated, "seamless teamwork is not just encouraged, it's absolutely essential for survival."

### Master Your Role: Four Unique Classes

Choose from four distinct classes, each offering a unique playstyle and special skills that benefit the team:

*   **Alex the Friendly Fighter:** Excels in close combat, utilizing quick counters and powerful combos to defeat enemies.
*   **Meg the Near-sighted Sniper:** Controls the battlefield from a distance by deploying mines and executing aerial attacks on foes.
*   **Triss the Boxy Tank:** Protects allies with her formidable shield and can repel enemies with forceful attacks.
*   **Erin the Ovally Engineer:** Dominates the area with deployable turrets and wields a powerful gun for offensive maneuvers.

### Evolving Abilities: A Deep Skill Tree System

Each class boasts an extensive skill tree, providing numerous abilities to customize and experiment with. This allows players to adapt their playstyle on the fly. Instead of changing gear, players can alter their character's abilities by swapping them. For instance, the Tank could gain a **FREEZING SHOUT**, the Fighter's Leap could become a **POWER DIVE**, or the Engineer could be equipped with a rapid-fire machine gun. This demonstrates the depth and flexibility of the combat system.

### A World of Foes: Challenging Enemy Encounters

Prepare for over 70 different enemy types, each featuring unique attack patterns and specific counter-strategies. No fight will feel like a simple grind. Enemies attack relentlessly, offering no respite. New threats emerge in every stage, keeping players on their toes. The game culminates in epic, multi-stage battles against colossal Titans, demanding peak skill and teamwork to achieve victory.

### An Intriguing World: Explore and Discover

Embark on an adventure filled with mystery, surprising plot twists, and memorable dialogue as you explore a world scarred by conflict. Journey through the snowy town of Thessaly, brave the perilous Folky Forest, delve into the ancient tombs of the Stygian Well, and uncover many other fascinating locations. However, proceed with caution, as the world harbors more secrets than it initially reveals. **Hidden clues, secret areas, and even entire hidden dimensions are scattered throughout**, awaiting discovery. Uncover a rich narrative spanning over 20,000 words, translated into 8 languages, and enjoy discovering 20,000 unique one-liners.

### Play Your Way: Solo or With Friends

**FULL METAL FURIES** offers remarkable flexibility in how you approach its cooperative missions. Up to four players can join the adventure, supporting both **ONLINE** and **OFFLINE** play. You can team up on the couch, connect online, or combine both. For those who prefer to play alone, the innovative **Pick 2** system allows you to control two party members simultaneously. A quick-switch mechanic preserves all the strategic depth of multiplayer combat. **Every action and combo achievable in multiplayer can be executed in single-player**, ensuring a full and engaging experience regardless of your chosen playstyle.

### Addendum: An Allegorical Journey

This complex allegorical action adventure delves into themes of atonement, allusions, and alliteration. It promises an unforgettable experience set in an alternate age, amidst the ruins of ancient Athens.

PAYDAY 2 plunges players into the roles of the original masked crew – Dallas, Hoxton, Wolf, and Chains – for an action-packed, four-player co-op shooter experience. This time, the crew descends upon Washington D.C. to orchestrate an epic crime spree, offering a dynamic range of contracts through the **CRIMENET network**. Players can select from a variety of heists, from small-scale convenience store robberies and kidnappings to high-stakes cyber-crime operations and daring bank vault extractions, all culminating in that signature **PAYDAY**. The game also allows for unique interactions within D.C., including participating in local community events and handling political errands. As players progress through these increasingly challenging and rewarding jobs, they can also delve into a robust **character customization and crafting system**, enabling them to build and personalize their own weapons and gear.

The core gameplay loop of PAYDAY 2 revolves around strategic planning and execution. According to the game's design, players must carefully select their crew, ensuring the right mix of skills is available when a job goes live. The **CRIMENET** acts as a dynamic contract database, connecting players with local contacts such as Vlad the Ukrainian, the enigmatic politician 'The Elephant,' and the South American drug trafficker Hector, each with their own distinct agendas. The game emphasizes that no two heists are ever the same, thanks to dynamic scenarios featuring randomized geometry and rare events. Furthermore, players can invest in one of five distinct Skill Trees – Mastermind, Enforcer, Ghost, Technician, and Fugitive – allowing for deep customization of skills and equipment to create the ultimate heister. The game also boasts an extensive weapon and modification system, offering a wide array of firearms that can be enhanced with various attachments affecting performance, alongside purely aesthetic customizations. A key design principle highlighted is the freedom to "Play It Your Way," with each job supporting multiple approaches, from stealthy ambushes to direct assaults, each yielding a different experience. The game's longevity is further supported by a significant history of additional content, with over 70 updates introducing new heists, characters, weapons, and gameplay features.

In **Atomicrops**, you'll dive into a post-apocalyptic world where **farming, fighting, and survival** are paramount. The core gameplay loop centers on **cultivating fast-growing crops** to maximize profits before the day ends. This farming simulation is uniquely blended with roguelike elements, pushing you to explore diverse biomes for **valuable relics from forgotten farms**.

These unearthed treasures are **crucial**, as powerful loot directly enhances your farming capabilities and bolsters your combat effectiveness against the game's numerous threats. Protecting your harvest is **paramount**, with nightly assaults from mutated creatures intent on devouring your crops. You must fend off these relentless attackers, with the challenge escalating through formidable bosses each season, culminating in the ultimate trial of the Nuclear Winter. Between these intense encounters, you can visit the town to purchase essential weapons and items. The conclusion of each season brings special shops and rewarding bonuses, offering a brief respite and opportunity for advancement. To further streamline operations, you can enlist the help of **animal companions**, including pig pals, chicken chums, and cow colleagues, who automate various farming tasks.

Beyond the practical, Atomicrops also introduces a **social element**. You can pursue and marry a kindred spirit from the local town, who will then join you in both farming and combat. This partnership, along with permanent upgrades to both farming and fighting abilities, is **key to long-term success**. A special currency earned during each run can be invested in these permanent improvements and unlocks.

The game does not shy away from its difficulty; even the easiest setting poses a significant challenge. Victory is hard-won and deeply rewarding. Unlocking new characters, spouses, difficulty levels, and permanent upgrades provides significant replayability. Perhaps one of the most charming unlocks is the ability to acquire and **pet numerous cats** that will permanently roam your homestead. Atomicrops is meticulously designed for **high replayability**, promising new surprises and synergistic item combinations to discover in every playthrough. The premise is a stark contrast to modern life: you inherit your late uncle's farm, seeking a peaceful escape to the countryside. However, this idyllic vision is shattered by a nuclear apocalypse, transforming the landscape into a hellscape wasteland. You are now tasked with defending the last remaining source of sustenance – your crops – from a horde of mutants eager to claim them. As any resourceful survivor would do, your mission is clear: **Farm. Marry. Kill.**

Experience futuristic firefights in Blacklight: Retribution, a free-to-play first-person shooter. This game elevates combat with unique mechanics like the Hyper Reality Visor (HRV), allowing you to see through walls and anticipate enemy movements. You can also deploy powerful mechanized Hardsuits and extensively customize your weapons to gain a decisive edge.

Mastering the advanced technology is crucial for victory in Blacklight. This involves carefully balancing your loadout, from the vast customization options for your firearms to the equipment you carry and the in-match bonuses you can unlock. The HRV is a key tool, enabling you to spot enemies through walls and launch surprise attacks. However, remember that you are vulnerable while using it. The other essential element for success? Pure skill, just as it has always been. Happy hunting, Agent.

**Key Features:**

*   **Hardsuits:** Deploy these hulking mechs during matches, equipped with a devastating railgun for one-shot kills and a high-velocity minigun for rapid room clearing. These powerful suits offer significant advantages but are slower to maneuver.

*   **Hyper Reality Vision (HRV):** This technology allows Agents to scout enemies through walls, identify critical mission objectives, or pinpoint weaknesses in enemy Hardsuits.

*   **Weapon Depots:** Find these scattered across the battlefield to resupply your team with ammo, acquire heavier weapons like rocket launchers, or call in airstrikes and Hardsuits.

*   **Free to Play:** Blacklight: Retribution is a completely free-to-play shooter. Earn Game Points (GP) after each match to unlock a wide array of armor and weaponry for your Agent within the game.

*   **Extensive Loadout Customization:** Your weapon is your lifeline. Create over 1000 unique gun combinations by modifying receivers with customizable stocks, muzzles, barrels, magazines, scopes, camos, and weapon tags.

*   **Personalized Protection:** Whether your preferred playstyle is aggressive run-and-gun, survivability-focused, or long-range sniping, you can fully customize your armor loadout to suit your needs.

*   **Level Progression:** Gain experience and level up through combat to unlock access to additional weapons, armor, and equipment.

*   **Diverse Game Modes and Maps:** Engage in combat across numerous maps, featuring 7 distinct game modes. These include classic favorites like Team Deathmatch, Domination, Capture the Flag, and Kill Confirmed, alongside newer modes like Netwar.

*   **Private Servers:** Organize clan scrimmages or challenge friends to 1v1 duels by setting up your own password-protected private servers, free from disruptive players.

*   **Spectator Mode:** Learn advanced tactics from top players or simply enjoy the action from the best vantage point in Spectator mode.

**Killsquad** is an **exhilarating co-op action game** that masterfully blends the **frantic pace of a twin-stick shooter** with the **visceral satisfaction of hack and slash combat**. This **adrenaline-fueled experience** is further enhanced by **deep character customization and progression**, allowing you to forge your **unique bounty hunter**.

Embark on an epic journey across **five distinct planets**, each teeming with a **relentless onslaught of enemies** eager for annihilation. Your mission is to select your hero, meticulously choose their skills, arm yourself with **powerful weapons**, equip essential gears, and attune potent talismans. Then, unleash unbridled fury through waves of adversaries and **formidable bosses**. **Killsquad delivers frantic, direct, and skill-oriented control**, whether you're wielding a keyboard or a gamepad. The mantra is simple: **shoot fast, dodge faster, or face swift demise**. The heart of Killsquad lies in its **short, adrenaline-pumping contracts**, designed to be completed in **10-20 minute bursts**. These can be tackled solo or enjoyed with **up to four friends in cooperative play**. The gameplay evokes elements of a twin-stick shooter, a hack and slash adventure, a top-down dungeon crawler, and even a sci-fi bullet hell. Ultimately, it feels **uniquely like Killsquad**, offering immense fun whether you're playing alone or with companions.

**Killsquad boasts five distinct hero classes**, each offering unique weapons and skills that cater to a variety of playstyles, seamlessly integrating both melee and ranged combat. As you progress through your adventures, you'll acquire and equip **powerful upgrades for each of your skills**, which dynamically activate during your contracts. Upon successfully completing a contract, you'll claim your bounty, which can be spent on a vast array of new equipment, including weapons, power-ups, gear, and cosmetic items to personalize your hero. Navigate through **over 30 contracts on the Campaign Map**, traversing five diverse planets. You can jump into the fray with friends or join any other bounty hunter. The game allows you to **join another squad mid-mission in real time**, offering a dynamic cooperative experience. You can either cooperate to achieve contract objectives or compete against each other to secure the highest scores. Discover weapons and gears possessing unique characteristics that significantly impact your hero's skills. Earn the trust of the enigmatic Unseen by unearthing their Talismans – **potent and intricate artifacts** that grant exciting passive effects. Be warned: these abilities may initially prove detrimental, but through persistent effort and by vanquishing numerous monsters, they can be leveled up to transform into **incredibly powerful items**. Combine these with your skills and upgrades to engineer **game-breaking builds** and truly make your heroes your own. However, no bounty hunter's party would be complete without the main event: the enemies. Hordes and waves of disturbing foes will relentlessly advance, clawing and biting until nothing remains. But fear not, for you are more than capable of handling them. It is the bosses, however, that will truly test your mettle. **More than 15 unique bosses await**, each featuring distinct mechanics and requiring specific strategies to overcome.

**MOTHERGUNSHIP: A Bullet-Hell FPS Revolution**

Prepare for an unparalleled gaming experience with **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, a title that masterfully fuses the relentless intensity of bullet-hell shooters with the dynamic action of first-person shooters. This game distinguishes itself by offering **one of the most extensive gun customization options ever witnessed in the video game landscape**. Your mission is clear: equip yourself with an arsenal of truly over-the-top weaponry and embark on a desperate mission to defeat the robotic alien armada that has brutally conquered Earth.

**Forge Your Ultimate Weaponry**

In **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, you are empowered to craft gun monstrosities that defy logic and gravity, weapons no ordinary person could ever hope to wield. Prepare to confront **gigantic bosses** and immerse yourself in a world of **randomized mayhem** as you fight your way to the very core of the alien fleet, with the ultimate objective of destroying the formidable **MOTHERGUNSHIP** itself!

**Engage in Unrelenting Combat**

Face overwhelming odds in **brutal, non-stop combat** where your ability to think on your feet is paramount for survival. Master the art of dodging hundreds of bullets through a unique FPS/Bullet-hell hybrid gameplay system. Each alien vessel you encounter is teeming with hordes of robotic enemies, treacherous traps, and intimidating bosses, all determined to prevent you from saving humanity. It's time to go get them!

**Unleash Your Creativity with Crafting**

To stand any chance against the **MOTHERGUNSHIP**, you will absolutely need your own **personalized arsenal of destruction**. Fortunately, **MOTHERGUNSHIP** provides one of the most **modular gun-crafting systems** ever conceived for a video game. Imagine wielding a twelve-barrel gun that fires homing rockets, or perhaps a devastating lightning shotgun. Even adding a fishtank to the top of your weapon is an option! The design of your destructive arsenal is entirely in your hands.

**Join the Resistance and Fight Together**

Become a vital part of the resistance movement against the relentless robotic alien invasion. Annihilate hordes of metallic fiends and earn your path to the **Mothergunship**. Furthermore, you can experience the thrill of the fight alongside a friend in a **full co-op experience**. Work together to carve a path through the alien fleet and achieve that ultimate, glorious goal: bringing down the **MOTHERGUNSHIP**!

Name: Sniper Ghost Warrior Contracts
Description:
Fulfill contracts that offer clear objectives with a fixed monetary reward and options to complete bonus challenges for payouts. With hundreds of ways to take down a wide range of targets, Contracts offers precise, strategic sniping gameplay at its absolute best. Play as a paid assassin; a hit man for hire, and beware of rival snipers who won’t hesitate to disrupt your best-laid plans. Open-ended contracts Bounties and challenges deliver strong replayability options to eliminate targets and collect cash to redeem for upgrades. An all-new Dynamic Reticle System Offers the most realistic and intense sniping experience. Upgradeable AR Mask With the ability to scan the environment and highlight weakness or objects of interest. An arsenal of new gadgets Including drones, remote sniper turrets and gas grenades. Show off your stealth skills, execute silent takedowns and be rewarded for a strategic play style. Battle the brutal wilderness of Siberia Fight to survive the intensity of snow-covered mountains, lush forests and secret bases hidden deep in the mountainside.

**Mastering Asymmetric Warfare in Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon: Future Soldier™**

In the unforgiving world of combat, fairness is irrelevant. Victory and survival are the only outcomes. The Ghosts, an elite special-operations unit, don't seek even odds. Their objective is to overwhelm and obliterate the enemy, leveraging **cutting-edge future technology** to dominate in asymmetric battles. As the game's premise states, "Future technology is the key to winning an asymmetric battle." Players step into the boots of highly trained special-ops soldiers, equipped with unparalleled combat technology and advanced military hardware. Deployed to the world's most dangerous warzones, their mission is to neutralize high-value targets. The game's tagline perfectly captures this philosophy: **"When you’re outnumbered…Only the dead fight fair."**

*Ghost Recon: Future Soldier* offers a suite of **advanced combat technologies** designed to give players a decisive edge. The **Cross Com system** projects real-time intelligence onto your goggles, featuring a Heads-Up Display (HUD) for on-the-fly drone control and enemy identification. **Optical Camouflage** allows for undetected movement through hostile territory, while **Sync Shot** enables coordinated attacks by tagging targets from the ground or via drone. A **dynamic cover system** facilitates surprise attacks and flanking maneuvers with the **Cover Swap** feature. For close-quarters engagements, players can master **brutal hand-to-hand combat** techniques. The game boasts an **extensive animation system** with over 2,500 animations, enabling a wide range of tactical movements for stealthy takedowns and fluid combat.

The game features a robust single-player campaign with 12 missions across 8 diverse locales, from Africa and Moscow to the Arctic. Players can also team up with up to three friends online for a **co-op campaign**, executing highly coordinated assaults with multiple perspectives. The **"5th man" UAV drone** can draw fire and mark targets, while players can utilize sonic blasts and mounted weapons on vehicles. For a true test of endurance, **Guerrilla Mode** pits you and your team against hundreds of enemies in increasingly difficult waves, inspired by U.S. Army counter-insurgency tactics. The **multiplayer mode** offers fast-paced, 6v6 battles with up to 12 players. Choose from three distinct classes—Rifleman, Engineer, and Scout—and unlock new gear across 10 maps. Experience deep character customization, gather intel, and utilize the suppression system to support your team. Four objective-focused game modes, including the classic GR Siege, are available, developed by Red Storm, known for *Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter*'s multiplayer.

**Gunsmith Mode** provides unparalleled weapon customization, offering over 20 million weapon combinations. Players can select from dozens of attachments and components to personalize their firearms for any combat scenario. Test your customized weapon in the firing range to ensure optimal performance before deploying it in any mission.

**Brink** offers a unique first-person shooter experience, merging single-player, co-op, and multiplayer gameplay. No matter your playstyle, your character will grow and evolve. You'll choose your combat role to defend yourself and humanity's last sanctuary on dynamic battlefields with deep customization and an innovative control system.

The game is set on the Ark, a massive floating city torn by civil war. Initially built as a self-sustaining refuge, the Ark became home to thousands escaping rising sea levels. This led to conflict with the original residents, sparking a power struggle between the Security and Resistance factions. Players face a crucial decision: **which faction will you join?**

**Brink** stands out with several key features. You can personalize your character's appearance, unlocking more options as you play. Importantly, your character's development is consistent across all game modes. This means progress in the single-player story carries over to co-op and competitive matches. The game allows for seamless switching between campaign, co-op, and multiplayer. Multiplayer supports up to seven players (or AI bots) in co-op and up to 16 players in competitive modes.

A notable feature is the **SMART Movement System**. This system enhances standard shooter controls with a dedicated **SMART button**. Pressing this button allows the game to intelligently guide you to your intended destination. This benefits all players, helping them make **smarter combat decisions**. Your objectives, missions, and gear are dynamically generated based on your role, location, and the current battle situation. As a developer noted, "You will **always know your objective** and **why it's important**."

**Brink: A Seamless Blend of Shooter Gameplay**

Brink is an immersive first-person shooter that masterfully combines single-player, co-op, and multiplayer experiences into one fluid adventure. This innovative title allows you to develop your character whether you're playing solo, with friends, or battling others online. In Brink, you choose your combat role as you fight to survive and protect humanity's last sanctuary. The game boasts dynamic battlefields, extensive character customization, and a groundbreaking control system designed to keep you engaged.

The game unfolds on the Ark, a man-made floating city teetering on the edge of civil war. Originally conceived as a self-sufficient, eco-friendly habitat, the Ark has become a refuge for thousands due to rising sea levels. Tensions are escalating between the original inhabitants and the refugees, leading to a fierce conflict between the Security and Resistance factions vying for control. The choice of allegiance is yours.

**Key Features:**

*   **Unleash Your Unique Identity:** Brink's advanced player customization offers a vast array of visual options, ensuring your character is truly one-of-a-kind. As you gain experience, more customization choices become available.

*   **Two Factions, One Character:** Embark on the single-player campaign as either a Resistance or Security operative. Then, seamlessly transition your character online for cooperative or competitive play with other gamers.

*   **Fluid Transitions:** Take your personalized character online at any moment. Brink allows for effortless movement between your single-player campaign, co-op sessions with friends, and intense multiplayer battles. Online multiplayer supports up to seven other players (or AI) in cooperative missions against the opposing faction, or up to 16 players in competitive matches.

*   **Intelligent Movement with SMART:** Brink utilizes familiar shooter controls but introduces the innovative SMART button. A press of this button allows the game to intelligently assess your intended destination and execute the movement. As one developer stated, "SMART makes navigating the environment intuitive, even in the heat of battle." This feature empowers both seasoned FPS veterans and newcomers to make smarter decisions during fast-paced action.

*   **Dynamic Objectives and Rewards:** Missions, communications, and inventory selections are dynamically generated based on your role, status, location, squad, and the overall battle situation across all game modes. You'll always know your objective, what to do, and what rewards await your success.

Brink is a first-person shooter where you can blend single-player, co-op, and multiplayer action. You develop your character whether you play alone, with friends, or against others online. In Brink, you pick your combat role as you fight to save yourself and humanity's last refuge. The game has dynamic battlefields, deep customization, and a new control system.

The game is set on the Ark, a floating city facing civil war. Once a self-sufficient "green" habitat, rising oceans forced the Ark to house thousands of refugees alongside its founders. Tensions between these groups have grown, leading to a fight for control between Security and Resistance forces. Which side will you join?

Brink offers deep character customization with many appearance options, making your character unique. As you gain experience, you unlock more ways to customize. You can choose to fight in the campaign as either a Resistance or Security member, then take that same character online for co-op or competitive play. Move between your single-player campaign, co-op with friends, and multiplayer action anytime. Multiplayer lets you play with up to seven other players (or AI) cooperatively against the opposing faction, or with up to 16 players competitively.

Brink uses familiar shooter controls but adds the innovative SMART button. Pressing SMART lets the game figure out where you want to go and move you there. This helps both new and veteran FPS players make better choices in fast action. Objectives, communications, missions, and inventory are generated dynamically based on your role, condition, location, squadmates, and the battle's status across all modes. You'll always know your objective, what to do, and your reward.

Name: The Longest Journey
Description:
The Longest Journey is an amazing graphical adventure, where the player controls the protagonist, April Ryan, on her journey between parallel universes. Embark on an exciting and original journey of discovery, where you will explore, solve puzzles, meet new people, face terrifying monsters, learn, grow, and live the adventure of a lifetime! Over 150 locations spanning two distinct and detailed worlds More than 70 speaking characters 40+ hours of gameplay 20+ minutes of high-resolution pre-rendered video footage Cinematic musical score

**Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™**

Return to the Caribbean with wannabe pirate Guybrush Threepwood and the zombie pirate LeChuck in this acclaimed LucasArts adventure. Monkey Island™ 2 Special Edition: LeChuck’s Revenge™ faithfully updates the classic sequel with stunning special edition details. Building on the success of The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition, this reimagining offers new features and an unparalleled interactive experience.

After seemingly defeating LeChuck in their first encounter, Guybrush sets his sights on the legendary treasure of Big Whoop. However, LeChuck returns as a zombie, fueled by a desire for revenge. Guybrush must rely on his wit, humor, and adventurous spirit to finally defeat his nemesis and prove himself the greatest pirate in the Caribbean. Voodoo dolls, spitting contests, and amusement parks are just a few of the challenges Guybrush faces. He'll meet old friends, battle new enemies, and use all his mojo to overcome LeChuck's wrath.

Experience the game anew with these signature Special Edition features:

*   **High-Definition Graphics:** Enjoy a completely re-imagined art style, hand-drawn and presented in high definition.
*   **Full Voice Over:** Hear the story and characters come alive with complete voice acting from original Monkey Island franchise cast members, available in both Special Edition and Classic modes.
*   **Renewed Music Score:** A re-mastered and re-recorded musical score, performed with live instruments, enhances the atmosphere.
*   **Special Edition and Classic Modes:** Seamlessly switch between modes at any time with the scene-for-scene hot swap feature.
*   **Enhanced Gameplay:** A new, intuitive interface and controls offer a more interactive experience.
*   **In-Game Hint System:** Keep puzzles fresh and fun with an integrated hint system.

Discover all-new features:

*   **Direct Control:** Choose your playstyle with either the classic point-and-click interface or the new intuitive direct character control.
*   **Object Highlighting:** Quickly find hidden objects with interactive object highlighting.
*   **Behind-the-Scenes Art:** Explore an in-game art viewer showcasing never-before-seen artwork from both versions of the game.
*   **Original Developer Commentary:** Hear amusing stories and development insights from Ron Gilbert, Tim Schafer, and Dave Grossman.
*   **SteamWorks Achievements:** Test your pirate prowess by collecting a variety of achievements.

**Relive the Classic: The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition**

*The Secret of Monkey Island™: Special Edition* is a **modern revival** of the beloved 1990 point-and-click adventure. This updated version meticulously preserves the original's charm while adding **stunning new hand-drawn art and animation**. A **re-mastered musical score** with full orchestration and **complete voice acting**, featuring the original cast, were crucial for authenticity.

Players can **instantly switch** between the enhanced graphics and the original classic version. This "scene-for-scene hot swap" feature lets purists relive the game as they remember it, while new players enjoy a visually impressive experience. The story follows **Guybrush Threepwood**, an aspiring pirate on a humorous quest to uncover the legendary secret of Monkey Island. He arrives at Mêlée port seeking pirate treasure, ambition, and adventure.

The *Special Edition* includes a **comprehensive hint system** for its intricate puzzles and a **redesigned, user-friendly interface**. As Guybrush, you'll aim to earn pirate respect, become infamous in the Caribbean, and win the heart of **Elaine Marley**. The adventure culminates in a confrontation with the ghost pirate **LeChuck**, offering an exciting experience for all pirate fans. Critics note that this remake lets you "play it again for the first time."

Name: Zero Escape: The Nonary Games
Description:
Kidnapped and taken to an unfamiliar location, nine people find themselves forced to participate in a diabolical Nonary Game by an enigmatic mastermind called Zero. Why were they there? Why were they chosen to put their lives on the line as part of a dangerous life and death game? Who can be trusted? Tensions rise as the situation becomes more and more dire, and the nine strangers must figure out how to escape before they wind up dead. Two spine-tingling Nonary Games Zero welcomes you to take part in both the Nonary Game and the Nonary Game: Ambidex Edition as the award-winning escape-the-room visual novels Nine Hours, Nine Persons, Nine Doors (999) and its sequel, Virtue’s Last Reward (VLR), are together for the first time. A remastered and revamped Nine Hours The well-received classic Nintendo DS game 999 has been updated with hi-res graphics and a variety of new features including both Japanese and English voice acting! Seek a way out Search for clues within numerous locked rooms and solve mind-bending puzzles in order to escape. VLR even has two difficulty settings for more of a challenge. Fascinating theories and pseudo science ideas abound along the twisting, turning journey to uncover who Zero is, why everyone was kidnapped, and the shocking connection between the Nonary Games.

**Grim Fandango Remastered: A Classic Adventure Reimagined**

**Grim Fandango Remastered** brings a **critically acclaimed adventure game** back to life. You'll step into the **shadowy world** of the Department of Death and meet **Manny Calavera**, a travel agent for souls on their **final four-year journey**. But this afterlife bureaucracy hides a **sinister conspiracy** that threatens Manny's own eternal rest. The game is celebrated for its **unforgettable characters** and a **unique blend of film noir and Mexican folklore**. This reimagined version offers an experience that is both **nostalgic and remarkably fresh**, earning numerous accolades, including **GameSpot's Game of the Year** for the original release.

The revitalized **Grim Fandango Remastered** features **stunning visual and auditory enhancements**. Developers at Double Fine Productions have repainted **high-resolution character textures** and added **new, dynamic lighting** to breathe new life into its iconic art style. The classic score has been **re-recorded with a full live orchestra**, adding a rich, immersive layer to the gameplay. Critics like those at IGN have praised this detail. Players can also delve deeper into the game's creation with **over two hours of exclusive developer commentary**, featuring insights from creator Tim Schafer, and explore a **comprehensive concept art browser**. **Grim Fandango Remastered** ensures this timeless classic continues to captivate a new generation of players, preserving its legacy for fans and newcomers alike.

Name: The Book of Unwritten Tales
Description:
In a world torn by war, the aged gremlin archaeologist Mortimer MacGuffin harbors the dark secret of a powerful artifact. Whoever calls this artifact his own, will determine the fate of the world. While the Army of the Shadows sends out its best and most devious agents to discover the secret, the Alliance's four heroes find themselves involuntarily drawn into the crisis... Key features: Humorous Point & Click homage to the RPG and fantasy genre. About 20 hours of gameplay in a massive game world with detailed graphics. Multi-character gameplay: Play as Wilbur, Nate, Ivo, and the Critter - in turn or simultaneously - and use the skills of your heroes wisely. Meet numerous crazy characters - from two-headed ogres and vegetarian dragons to good-natured zombies. Solve over 150 mind-boggling puzzles and discover more than 300 items that can be used and combined.

**Syberia: A Lawyer's Mechanical Mystery Adventure**

Embark on a **captivating journey** with Kate Walker, a New York lawyer whose life takes an unexpected turn. Initially tasked with a straightforward legal assignment – finalizing the sale of an old automaton factory in the Alps – Kate anticipates a swift return home. However, this seemingly simple job evolves into an epic adventure, spanning from Western Europe to the remote landscapes of Eastern Russia, ultimately transforming her life.

Kate's quest to locate Hans, the enigmatic inventor behind the **Syberia mystery**, unfolds across **breathtaking locations** and introduces her to a cast of **unforgettable characters**. This extensive odyssey, marked by vast distances and the passage of time, compels Kate to re-evaluate her core beliefs. What began as a business transaction blossoms into a **destiny-altering pursuit**. The game is celebrated for its **compelling narrative**, which surpasses conventional storytelling. It boasts **richly developed characters** set against **stunning, lifelike 3D environments**. The **cinematic presentation**, characterized by its film-quality camera work and framing, delivers a **deeply immersive experience**. Furthermore, Syberia's **ingenious puzzles** are seamlessly integrated into the narrative, ensuring a **fluid and engaging gameplay experience**.

Name: Gemini Rue
Description:
Azriel Odin, ex-assassin, arrives on the rain-drenched planet of Barracus. When things go horribly wrong, he can only seek help from the very criminals he used to work for. Meanwhile, across the galaxy, a man called Delta-Six wakes up in a hospital with no memory. Without knowing where to turn or who to trust, he vows to escape before he loses his identity completely. As fate brings these two closer together, we discover a world where life is cheap, identities are bought and sold, and a quest for redemption can change the fate of a whole galaxy. Key Features: Over 60 hand-drawn backgrounds A moody, film noir atmosphere Control both Azriel and Delta-Six An innovative investigation system A gripping sci-fi mystery DVD-style commentary track

**Syberia II: A Surreal Quest for the Last Mammoths**

In **Syberia II**, the adventure continues for Kate Walker, a sharp New York lawyer. After a demanding search across Europe to locate a missing heir and finalize an automaton factory buyout, her mission seemed complete. However, Kate's journey is far from over.

She unexpectedly teams up with the eccentric Hans Voralberg. Together, they embark on a new, **surreal quest**: to find the last of the legendary Syberian mammoths. This journey takes them deep into a forgotten world, far beyond anything they've encountered before.

Hans's lifelong quest, which he began alone years ago, is nearing its end. Kate and Hans will face **unprecedented dangers**, pushing their courage and resolve to the limit. A **mystical Syberia** lies ahead, promising an unforgettable experience.

**Key Features:**

*   **Original and Captivating Storyline:** Experience a unique narrative that draws you into Kate and Hans's extraordinary journey.
*   **Rich and Intriguing Characters:** Meet new, memorable characters who add depth to the unfolding story.
*   **Realistically Detailed 3D Environments:** Explore beautifully crafted worlds that bring the game's setting to life.
*   **Integrated Puzzles:** Encounter **cleverly designed puzzles** that seamlessly blend with the gameplay, challenging your skills throughout the adventure.

**Goodbye Deponia: The Chaotic Conclusion to a Junkyard Saga**

Get ready for the ultimate descent into chaos with **Goodbye Deponia**, the adventure comedy that wraps up the beloved junkyard saga. This installment throws **three versions of Rufus** into escalating mayhem. The Organon threatens to destroy Deponia, the enigmatic Goal has vanished again, and Rufus, as usual, finds new ways to mess things up.

Rufus dreams of escaping the junkyard planet Deponia for the utopian paradise of Elysium. He sees the giant elevator connecting the worlds as his ticket out. His obsession with **Goal, an ex-Elysian girl, is key** to his escape plan. Rufus thinks he has a foolproof scheme, but in true Deponia fashion, it all unravels spectacularly.

The story begins with Rufus on an Organon cruiser, trying to blend in. Goal disappears. A cloning machine offers a glimmer of hope, but an error leads to complications, and Goal slips away again. Now, Rufus faces **three huge challenges**: find Goal, reach Elysium, and stop the Organon from destroying Deponia.

These are the kinds of problems that only **three Rufuses could solve**! Driven by desperation, Rufus clones himself, leading to absurd consequences. In Goodbye Deponia, you'll **control all three Rufuses**, coordinating their efforts to complete objectives, even as Rufus himself often trips over his own feet.

**Goodbye Deponia is the definitive conclusion to the Deponia trilogy**, following the best German game of 2013. The Deponia series offers three wacky adventures on the junkyard planet. These point-and-click games are perfect for comedy fans, adventure game veterans, and newcomers. The series is known for its **beautiful, hand-drawn 2D graphics, sharp, sarcastic dialogue, and dark humor**. It has won many awards, including the German Computer Game Award.

**Key Features:**

*   A **classic point-and-click adventure** in a unique world, inspired by Douglas Adams and Terry Pratchett.
*   From the creators of Memoria and Edna & Harvey.
*   The **epic, final conclusion to the Deponia series**.
*   **Unique comic style** with lovingly realized, hand-drawn HD 2D graphics.
*   **Musical cutscenes** with beautifully animated sequences.

## Civilization IV: A Revolution in Strategy Gaming

**Sid Meier's Civilization IV** is a landmark title in the beloved PC strategy series, celebrated for its **deeply engaging gameplay** and **complex strategic depth**. This installment, which has sold over **6 million units worldwide** and received widespread critical praise, cemented Civilization's legacy as a **true gaming icon**. Developed by Firaxis Games and led by Sid Meier, Civilization IV introduced **innovative gameplay mechanics** and **new victory conditions**, giving players **powerful tools** to manage and grow their empires.

The game transports players to a **vibrant 3D world**, a significant visual upgrade that greatly enhances the player experience. A **key innovation** praised by critics is the introduction of **user-friendly modding tools**, allowing players to **customize their game like never before**. Civilization IV also features **robust multiplayer options** for exciting competitive play. Widely considered a **top game of 2005**, Civilization IV remains a **must-play** for strategy fans globally. (Note: Online multiplayer is no longer supported for the Mac version of Civilization IV.)

Name: Sid Meier's Civilization® IV
Description:
With over 6 million units sold and unprecedented critical acclaim from fans and press around the world, Sid Meier's Civilization is recognized as one of the greatest PC game franchises of all-time. Now, Sid Meier and Firaxis Games will take this incredibly fun and addictive game to new heights by adding new ways to play and win, new tools to manage and expand your civilization, all-new easy to use mod capabilities and intense multiplayer modes and options*. Civilization IV will come to life like never before in a beautifully detailed, living 3D world that will elevate the gameplay experience to a whole new level. Civilization IV has already been heralded as one of the top ten games of 2005, and a must-have for gamers around the globe! *Mac version's Online Multiplayer is no longer supported.

**Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition: A Gateway to Classic and Modern WWII Strategy**

This legacy version of **Company of Heroes (COH1)** grants you access to the latest updated version, also simply titled 'Company of Heroes,' within your Steam library. **It is strongly recommended to use the latter version for online play.** You can also explore the vibrant COH1 Steam Community and Modding scene by visiting the associated pages: [COH1 Community Hub](link) and [COH1 Steam Workshop](link).

**Experience the Sacrifice and Intensity of WWII**

Company of Heroes delivers a **visceral WWII gaming experience**, revolutionizing real-time strategy. It brings to life the sacrifice of heroic soldiers, war-ravaged environments, and dynamic battlefields. Starting with the D-Day Invasion of Normandy, you will lead Allied squads against the German war machine through pivotal WWII battles.

**A Cinematic Single-Player Journey**

Immerse yourself in a **rich single-player campaign** that captures the cinematic intensity and bravery of ordinary soldiers facing extraordinary events. This experience portrays the turmoil of WWII like never before.

**Advanced Gameplay Features**

*   **Intelligent Squad AI:** Your soldiers come alive with advanced AI. They interact with the changing environment, seek cover, and employ sophisticated tactics to defeat enemy forces.
*   **Stunning Visuals:** Built on Relic's cutting-edge engine, Company of Heroes boasts unprecedented graphic quality and a physics-driven world for an RTS.
*   **Environmental Strategy:** Real-time physics and a **completely destructible environment** ensure no two battles are alike. Destroy anything and reshape the battlefield to your advantage. Utilize buildings and terrain, or deny them to your opponents.

**Multiplayer Competition**

Engage in **2-8 player multiplayer battles** via LAN or the internet. Join friends online for the ultimate Axis versus Allies showdown.

**Company of Heroes** is a critically acclaimed real-time strategy game that immerses players in the intense battles of World War II. It vividly captures the **bravery of soldiers**, the **destruction of war**, and the **chaos of the battlefield**.

The game begins with the pivotal D-Day landings in Normandy, where you command Allied forces against German adversaries. You'll fight through iconic battles, experiencing the **courage of everyday soldiers** facing overwhelming odds. **Company of Heroes** features an **immersive single-player campaign** that highlights the realities of war.

A standout element is the **smart squad AI**, where soldiers intelligently use cover, react to their environment, and employ tactical maneuvers to overcome enemies. The game boasts **impressive graphics** powered by a robust engine, delivering top-tier visuals and a **realistic, physics-based world** essential for an RTS. Players can leverage **tactical environments** with fully destructible elements, allowing them to alter terrain and destroy structures to gain a strategic advantage. Beyond the single-player experience, **Company of Heroes** offers **online battles** for 2-8 players, enabling competitive play via LAN or online.

For further details, including reviews and information on total conversions for the original **Company of Heroes**, consult the 'Company of Heroes - Legacy Edition' page on Steam.

**Rome: Total War™ - Collection: Conquer Ancient Rome**

Embark on an epic journey through ancient Rome with the Rome: Total War™ - Collection. This comprehensive package brings together two critically acclaimed titles from the renowned Total War series, offering you the ultimate strategic experience of building and defending a sprawling empire. As your dominion expands, so too will the threats you face, from relentless barbarian hordes to internal political turmoil.

The Rome: Total War™ - Collection features:

*   **Rome: Total War:** Choose one of three powerful Roman families and embark on a century-spanning quest to dominate the Roman Empire. This seminal title, honored as "Best Strategy Game" in 2004 by leading publications like IGN, GameSpy, and GameSpot, delivers profound strategic depth and engaging gameplay.
*   **Rome: Total War - Barbarian Invasion:** This official expansion plunges you into the twilight of Roman dominance. Witness the empire's decline as fierce barbarian tribes launch devastating assaults, igniting widespread conflict and challenging the established order.

Within these immersive games, you have the opportunity to "fight alongside or against history's greatest leaders such as Julius Caesar, Spartacus, and Hannibal to expand or destroy the Roman Empire," as detailed in the game's official description. You can command legendary figures like Attila the Hun or the Saxons, leveraging their unique strengths and weaponry to challenge Roman supremacy. Engage in colossal battles featuring thousands of soldiers clashing simultaneously. The extensive campaigns demand meticulous management of your empire's economy, populace, religious factions, and military might to secure its survival and achieve ultimate victory.

In **Crusader Kings III**, you step into the role of a medieval ruler, guiding your dynasty through centuries of history in this grand strategy epic. Developed by Paradox Development Studio, the game masterfully combines **deep medieval roleplaying with immersive grand strategy**. Your legacy begins by selecting your noble house and leading it to glory across generations.

Beyond warfare, **true leadership demands expert diplomacy, astute realm management, and sharp cunning**. Take control of your house and expand your dynasty across a meticulously researched medieval world. You can start your saga in either **867 or 1066**, claiming lands, titles, and vassals to forge a realm worthy of your royal blood. Your death is merely a transition, as your lineage continues with new playable heirs, whether planned or… unexpected.

Explore a **sprawling, simulated world** filled with a diverse cast of characters. From peasants and knights to courtiers, spies, and jesters, you'll uncover secret love affairs and intricate political schemes. A wide array of **historical characters can be romanced, betrayed, executed, or subtly influenced**.

The **vast medieval map** stretches from the snowswept Nordic lands to the Horn of Africa, and from the British Isles to the exotic riches of Burma. You can **claim, conquer, and rule thousands of unique counties, duchies, kingdoms, and empires**.

Each character is unique, with **traits and lifestyle choices shaping their actions and schemes**. Rule with an iron fist, inspiring fear, or lead with magnanimous deeds. **Genetics can be passed to your children**, bestowing genius or crippling stupidity. Groom your heir with guardians or educate them yourself. If they prove inadequate, you can arrange marriages or **despatch them through other means**.

**Customize your ruler and noble house**, from appearance to attributes, creating a monarch fitting their inherited virtues and vices. Govern an evolving realm, granting titles as you see fit, or **usurp your liege to claim their crown**. Beware of rivals, from restless serfs to vengeful concubines. Danger lurks around every corner.

**Recruit agents and unsavory elements** to undermine, blackmail, or murder those in your path. Alternatively, **seduce your way to power and influence**. Blood will flow.

Assemble **men-at-arms units and powerful knights**, managing battlefield tactics and armies. You can **raid and plunder nearby lands** or hire mercenaries and Holy Orders for major conflicts. Be pious to gain religious support, or **design your own faith** as you battle for everlasting fame or eternal damnation.

Introduce cultural innovations and construct mighty castles to enhance your realm's wealth, prestige, and security. The paths are limitless, offering **thousands of dynamic events and life-altering decisions** tailored to every situation and character. Secure your place in history through countless means.

**Call of Duty®: Relive World War II Through the Eyes of Ordinary Soldiers**

Call of Duty® immerses you in the pivotal moments of World War II, offering a **realistic and intense portrayal** of the conflict. Instead of focusing on famous generals, the game highlights the **crucial contributions of everyday soldiers** and **unsung heroes** from Allied nations. Their **collective actions were vital** in shaping the course of history.

You'll experience the war as part of a **well-trained squad**, where **authentic tactics** and **teamwork** are essential. **Providing covering fire** and **aiding injured comrades** are **key to survival**. The game emphasizes that victory was a **shared success**, showcasing the unique skills of each soldier. For the first time, Call of Duty® provides **multiple viewpoints**, allowing you to fight as an American, British, or Russian soldier. The game includes **24 missions** spread across **4 linked historical campaigns**. These missions involve a range of objectives, from **sabotage and assaults** to **stealth operations, vehicle combat, and rescues**. The game's **historical authenticity** is evident in its **accurate weaponry**, **period settings**, **historically inspired vehicles**, and **realistic sound**, creating a **deeply immersive World War II experience**.

© 2003 Activision Publishing, Inc. Activision and Call of Duty are registered trademarks of Activision Publishing, Inc. All rights reserved. All other trademarks and trade names are the properties of their respective owners.

**Forge Your Empire in Sid Meier's Civilization V**

Sid Meier's Civilization V invites you to lead your civilization from its humble beginnings in the Stone Age all the way to the advanced Space Age. This acclaimed turn-based strategy game challenges you to **engage in warfare, master diplomacy, research groundbreaking technologies, and face off against legendary historical leaders**. Your ultimate goal is to **forge the most powerful empire the world has ever witnessed**.

Civilization V offers a compelling experience that is **easy to learn yet profoundly deep**. Newcomers will appreciate the welcoming interface, allowing them to **jump in and play at their own pace**. Veterans of the series will discover the **signature depth, intricate detail, and precise control** they expect. The game features a **visually stunning world** with "ultra-realistic graphics" and "lush and dynamic" environments, perfect for strategic expansion.

Beyond single-player, you can **challenge players globally or locally in multiplayer matches**. Civilization V also boasts **unprecedented modding capabilities**, with a built-in community hub to easily discover and install enhancements. The game is designed to perform well on a wide range of computers. Key innovations include a **hexagonal grid** for new tactical possibilities, **city-states** that offer distinct diplomatic benefits, and an **advanced diplomacy system** for more engaging negotiations. The Modding SDK is a free download, and Mac, Linux, and SteamOS versions are available in multiple languages.

**Lead your civilization to global dominance in Sid Meier's Civilization V**, the ultimate turn-based strategy game. Guide your people from the Stone Age to the Space Age, **engaging in warfare, diplomacy, and technological discovery**. Challenge historical leaders and forge the most powerful empire ever seen.

Civilization V provides an **easy-to-learn yet deeply strategic experience**. Its **intuitive interface** welcomes new players, while veterans will find the series' hallmark **depth and control** fully intact. Explore a **vibrant world** rendered in stunning detail, where you'll battle for and claim **lush landscapes**.

The game features **unprecedented community and multiplayer options**. **Mod the game extensively** and access mods directly through an in-game hub. New strategic layers are added with a **hex-based grid**, introducing fresh combat and city-building tactics. **Independent City-States** become vital diplomatic assets, and an **enhanced diplomacy system** allows for more meaningful interactions with AI leaders. Civilization V is built for **broad system compatibility**, running on a variety of PCs.

*Note: Mac and Linux + SteamOS versions are available in English, French, Italian, German, and Spanish.*
*The Modding SDK is a free download.*

**Experience WWII Submarine Warfare with Silent Hunter® III**

Silent Hunter® III stands as a premier simulation of World War II submarine combat, offering an **unparalleled and immersive naval experience**. Developed by Ubisoft, this game is renowned for its **realistic gameplay**, featuring a **powerful 3D engine**, **detailed crew management**, and **stunning visuals**. It's a must-play for both simulation enthusiasts and history aficionados.

Step into the **tense and meticulously recreated world of WWII**. The game boasts **sophisticated 3D water modeling**, **dynamic day/night cycles**, and **historically accurate submarines, ships, and aircraft**. You can **explore detailed U-boat interiors**, witness **realistic weather effects**, and enjoy **rich sound design**, all contributing to a **definitive WWII submarine warfare simulation**.

In Silent Hunter® III, you take command of formidable U-boats, including iconic models like the **Type II, VII, IX, and XXI**. Your objective is to **hunt Allied convoys and warships**, mirroring the challenges faced during World War II. Reviews emphasize the critical role of **stealth**: you must **"lurk silently beneath threatening escort ships to launch devastating torpedo attacks, or surfacing to engage enemies with the deck gun."**

The game features a **dynamic campaign**, allowing you to forge your own naval war narrative. Your career progresses based on your decisions within an **unscripted, non-linear WWII campaign**, ensuring a **unique and engaging experience with every playthrough**.

Silent Hunter® III is also remarkably **accessible**, featuring a **gentle learning curve** that makes it more approachable than many other simulations. The **"naval academy tutorial"** guides you through the essentials, and you can **adjust realism settings** to match your preferred level of challenge.

**Effective crew management is paramount**. Players have observed that **"the crew will respond to orders and evolve based on the outcomes of each patrol,"** adding significant strategic depth. For those seeking multiplayer action, Silent Hunter® III supports **cooperative play for up to eight players via LAN**.

Name: The Making of Karateka
Description:
Prince of Persia creator Jordan Mechner was a college student when he created one of the biggest-selling games of 1984: Karateka. Now, in a new interactive documentary from Digital Eclipse, the story of how a teenager with an Apple II created one of the most groundbreaking, influential games of all time. THE ORIGIN STORY OF A LEGENDARY GAME CREATOR Discover how Karateka was made through an exhaustive archive of design documents, playable prototypes, and all-new video features. Like walking through a museum, you can explore the interactive timelines at your own pace. PLAY THE ACCLAIMED ORIGINALS Enjoy pixel-perfect versions of the original Karateka games and a variety of never-before-seen early prototypes, with rich quality-of-life features like save anywhere, rewind, chapter select, and director's commentary. TWO REMASTERED GAMES Karateka Remastered is an all-new version of the original game featuring cutting-room-floor content, commentary, achievements, and more. Deathbounce: Rebounded is a fast and frantic twin-stick shooter based on Jordan's unpublished prototype. A GROUNDBREAKING MASTERPIECE Discover how Karateka became one of the first games to include cinematic scenes, a moving original soundtrack, rotoscoped animation, and a Hollywood-style love story, influencing the decades of games that followed. THE GOLD MASTER SERIES New from Digital Eclipse (Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Cowabunga Collection, Atari 50: The Anniversary Celebration), the Gold Master Series presents iconic games in an innovative 'interactive documentary' format, putting the shared history of games and their creators into one comprehensive package.

Name: Wanderlust: Travel Stories
Description:
In a bar, on the world's most remote island, a group of strangers share their stories. Step into their shoes and experience travel from distinct perspectives. This collection of playable novels is inspired by real events and places—but the course of each journey depends on your choices. A bridge between literature and gaming Wanderlust: Travel Stories is a book that you shape. If you’re seeking something a little bit different it is for you—and if you can read this, you have all you need to get started. An anthology of travel stories Four long stories and five short ones, each written by its own team of authors. Every journey offers a unique playstyle as you experience travel through the eyes of distinct individuals. Like an idealistic student, a jaded reporter, or a man who’s simply a terrible planner. Authentic, grounded and well researched Inspired by true stories and set in real places. Travel to the mysterious statues of Rapa Nui, bustling streets of Bangkok, pristine expanses of the Antarctic, grasslands of the Serengeti, and more. Dive into tales created by passionate travelers and experienced reporters, see the world they saw throughout their journeys. Emotions color perception Your choices shape the characters’ mood. This, in turn, changes how you see the world. All emotions are valid: happiness or enthusiasm aren’t everything, feeling sad or fatigued is perfectly natural. Minimalism Tasteful aesthetic, bespoke photography, and immersive soundscapes set the tone. Just enough to stir your own memories or feed the imagination. Introducing Slow Gaming Like a peaceful afternoon with a cup of tea and a novel, it’s a slow-paced and meditative experience. You don’t have to rush or fight, you can take in every moment at your own pace. If this is what you seek, check out our Slow Gaming Manifesto . From the creators of The Witcher, Dying Light and Hitman We sail into uncharted waters with this experimental playable travel documentary. We would love you to join us on the journey. Follow us For more travel stories, follow our social media channels: Facebook , Twitter , Instagram

## That Dragon, Cancer: A Father's Tribute to His Son

*That Dragon, Cancer* is a **deeply moving video game** that serves as a heartfelt tribute to a son named Joel. The game opens with a poignant invitation: "This is where we go to remember our son Joel, up through here along this path. We want to show you who he was, and how his life changed us. Can we walk here together for a while?" This **immersive, narrative-driven experience** is designed to memorialize Joel Green and, through his story, honor the countless others he represents.

This **poetic and playful interactive retelling** chronicles Joel's four-year battle with cancer. The game uses a blend of first-person and third-person perspectives with point-and-click mechanics, creating a **two-hour narrative experience** that encourages players to pause and immerse themselves in a **deeply personal memoir**. It features audio from home videos and spoken word poetry, exploring profound themes of faith, hope, despair, helplessness, and love. *That Dragon, Cancer* also includes **in-game tributes to loved ones of over 200 Kickstarter backers**. The central question posed to the player is: **Can you find hope in the face of death?**

Name: KURSK
Description:
KURSK is the first ever adventure and documentary video game inspired by real events. You assume the role of a spy who finds way on the Russian nuclear submarine K-141 Kursk. Your task is to collect secret information about the revolutionary Shkval supercavitating torpedoes. While trying to complete your mission, you become witness to the dramatic events which shook the world at that time. LIVE THE HISTORY Experience the history of the fateful voyage of K-141 KURSK that ended at the bottom of Barents Sea. THE WORLD OF 2000 See through the first person perspective the fascinating world of 2000’s Moscow, Vidyayevo and the extremely detailed Oscar II-class submarine. INTELLIGENCE OPERATIVE Walk the fine line between gathering secret information, getting to know important people and getting caught spying. DECISIONS Get to know the crew of Kursk submarine, maintain important relationships and make decisions that have a long-lasting impact. GAMES BEYOND™ New sub-category for Jujubee's products characterized by a greater emphasis on the story being told, original gameplay, and mature subject matter. 'We believe the time has come to tell real stories. In an age in which we compete for the free time of consumers against the entire entertainment industry, including movies and TV series, and when people are less likely to read non-fiction, game producers have an additional obligation. It's true that games are becoming more complex, offering an incredible audio-visual experience, and allowing us to lose ourselves in a virtual world, but they rarely help us grow. That is why we want to step outside the self-contained world of video game subject matter and invite players to broaden their knowledge about history or the actual world. We’re convinced that KURSK will be a very attractive title to anyone looking for an ambitious and mature game' - said Michal Stępien, CEO of Jujubee. Extras included in Standard Version: Premium KURSK Wallpapers; Unique Digital Artbook in PDF format; Official Game Digital Soundtrack.

**Unraveling the Mystery of an Enigmatic Signal in "Noise"**

In the chilling atmosphere of 1988, as the Soviet Union teeters on the brink of collapse, players step into the shoes of a radio amateur who stumbles upon a perplexing, round-the-clock broadcast. This **enigmatic signal** emits incomprehensible noises, occasionally punctuated by a human voice that remains frustratingly indecipherable. The mystery deepens when it's discovered that the signal's origin point, according to all available maps, **simply does not exist**. The core mission is to **unravel the terrifying secrets** hidden within this enigmatic signal.

"Noise" offers a distinct gameplay experience where **conventional weaponry is absent**. Your protagonist is a survivor, and the **trusty radio is their most invaluable tool**. This device is **central to understanding the unfolding events** and navigating the perilous environment. Players will independently select radio waves to intercept the mysterious signal, attempt to communicate with unseen individuals, or simply tune into the broadcasts of the era. The radio is not just a plot device; it's a **critical gameplay mechanic** woven throughout the narrative. The story unfolds through the protagonist's internal thoughts and dialogues, as well as through meticulous exploration of the game's environments, with **key story details potentially remaining hidden** unless players engage in thorough investigation. The distinct setting of the USSR imbues the narrative with a peculiar and unsettling flair, reminiscent of Stephen King's masterful storytelling. The primary antagonist is a creature that relentlessly patrols and explores the environment, mirroring player movements and reacting dynamically to their actions. **Activating lights or using a flashlight will draw its attention**, prompting it to investigate. Survival hinges on the ability to **effectively hide**, as direct confrontation is impossible – the creature cannot be killed. Fortunately, the creature is **blind in the dark**, meaning extinguishing lights and waiting patiently can be a viable evasion tactic. Furthermore, the creature itself emits radio waves, providing a **crucial tracking method** via the player's radio. The artificial intelligence powering this antagonist was inspired by the iconic monster from the "Alien" film and game, making it a **formidable and integral part of the story**, as significant as the protagonist themselves.

## Explore Global Heritage Sites with Blueplanet VR

**Blueplanet VR** offers a unique way to virtually visit the world's most stunning **heritage sites**. Explore over **40 immersive experiences** that transport you to places like the ancient **Borobudur Temple** in Indonesia and the grand **Bears Ears National Monument** in the US.

Using advanced **photogrammetry** and careful art design, Blueplanet VR creates a **real sense of being there**. You can move freely through these amazing places. Some experiences even let you **hang glide** for a bird's-eye view of the scenery. The platform also includes **interactive features** to help you learn more about the history and culture of these important locations. Want to try it out? A **free demo** with four different scenes is available.

**Behind the Scenes: The Making of the Tomb Raider Reboot**

Explore the fascinating development of the **Tomb Raider reboot** with **The Final Hours of Tomb Raider**. This digital book offers an in-depth, **behind-the-scenes look** at Crystal Dynamics' four-year effort to reimagine the iconic franchise.

Journalist Geoff Keighley leads you through the studio's creative journey in this extensive narrative. You'll discover **exclusive, never-before-seen art and videos** that showcase game elements ultimately cut from the final release, providing a unique perspective on the game's evolution.

Key highlights from **The Final Hours of Tomb Raider** include:

*   A deep dive into the creation of the new "Tomb Raider."
*   Rare concept art and video revealing discarded game ideas and designs.
*   Interactive features, such as 360-degree studio tours and a music mixer.

Name: DeathTolls Experience
Description:
DeathTolls Experience is a journey through data in virtual reality that aims to re-sensitize the user to the casualties of the terrorist attacks in Europe, refugee deaths in the Mediterranean Sea, and the human cost of the Syrian civil war. The project challenges the lack of concern that results from the frequency of such news on the mass media. By walking the user through hundreds of thousands of dead bodies in photorealistic CGI scenes, the creator Ali Eslami aims to inspire an active awareness towards big data that represents massive deaths, and compassion for the people behind those numbers. On the basis of a virtual journey through the history of European bloodbaths, an ocean filled with body bags containing recently drowned Syrian refugees, and casualties of the Syrian civil war, DeathTolls Experience immerses us in the meaning of these figures, opening up an emotional perspective on this suffering and terror.

**The Book of Distance** invites you on a profound virtual journey, exploring themes of immigration, family, and the impact of historical prejudice. This immersive experience centers on the story of Yonezo Okita, who left Hiroshima, Japan, in 1935 to start a new life in Canada. However, the outbreak of war and state-sanctioned racism tragically transformed his identity, marking him as an enemy.

Generations later, Yonezo's grandson, artist Randall Okita, uses **The Book of Distance** to guide us through an emotional landscape. This interactive virtual pilgrimage aims to **recover what was lost** due to these historical events. The work masterfully blends techniques from mechanical sculpture, film, and stage design to offer a **redefined approach to personal storytelling in virtual reality**.

Family archives are woven into the narrative, adding a **haunting layer of realism**. The visual aesthetic is striking, featuring 2D and 3D hand-crafted sets that evoke the style of Japanese woodblock prints. Coupled with evocative character design and seamless choreography, these elements create a captivating experience. **Surprising moments of interaction** gently transport viewers across the ocean and through the passage of time. Randall Okita encourages active participation in this generous act of imagination, creating a space of **magical theatre and generational echoes**. Throughout the narrative, even during its darker moments, the experience remains a constant companion, guiding us through the story.

Name: qrth-phyl
Description:
In qrth-phyl you will manoeuvre around, and within, three dimensional stages, leaving a persistent tail behind you that you must avoid. The stages are algorithmically generated and adapted according to how you play. Hidden in the game are documentary elements that chart the development and inception of Blockade/snake/worm videogames from 1976 to today. The game plays in 3D, is adaptive and fuses elements of documentary. qrth-phyl continues the algorithmic, generative and metaphorical arcade game design ideas last seen in previous hermitgames/Verran release Leave Home . Key Features - Sequence game mode: play through an infinite algorithmicly generated sequence of stages collecting dots to unlock the exit and generate the next stage informed by how you've played. - Seed game mode: generate a single infinite stage from a chosen seed recorded to the leaderboard. Optimise the best seed for the highest score. - Box game mode: simple fixed size box 3D stage for hiscore chasing - Steam Leaderboards, chase friends scores or better every player in the world - 14 carefully chosen Steam Achievements - Unique electronic soundtrack created using the AY-3-8912 (ZX Sinclair Spectrum audio microchip) Based on a prototype created in the deep south west of Cornwall circa 2004 it was (re)developed for PC and XBLIG between 2011-2013 and revised for Steam in 2018. Built by one person with custom tools, self generating code and a modified AY-3-8912 audio chip. ​

**Rock of Ages: A Strategic Battle Through Time**

Prepare for a unique gaming experience with "Rock of Ages," a title that masterfully blends rock-rolling action with profound strategic depth, all set against a backdrop of captivating art and music spanning various historical eras. This is a game where the only options are to crush or be crushed. At its core, the gameplay pits two opposing castles against each other – one yours, and the other your adversary's. As stated by the developers, ACE Team, known for their creative prowess demonstrated in "Zeno Clash," your objective is to demolish the enemy's stronghold using a colossal boulder. [Source 1]

As your opponent fortifies their defenses, you must skillfully maneuver your boulder to overcome their resistance and raze their unsightly tower. However, vigilance is paramount, as a formidable boulder will also be hurtling towards your own defenses. [Source 2] The game offers a diverse array of units, allowing players to both defend their tower and disrupt the enemy's offensive. "Rock of Ages" supports both online and offline multiplayer, providing ample opportunities for competitive play. Furthermore, it features three distinct game modes: War, Time Trial, and SkeeBoulder, each offering a unique challenge. The game's atmosphere is further enhanced by its presentation, drawing inspiration from five rich, historic periods of art and music, creating an unparalleled gaming environment. As a bonus, a FREE Original Soundtrack is included with the game download. [Source 3]

Galactic Bowling offers a unique take on the classic game, infusing it with an intergalactic theme and exaggerated style. This title is designed for players of all ages and skill levels, featuring accessible and intuitive controls that allow anyone to jump straight into the action.

The game boasts a vibrant universe populated by wild characters and unique levels, all delivered with over-the-top humor. Players can experience fast-paced competition in both single-player and multiplayer modes. A single-player campaign guides players through a story, allowing them to ascend the ranks of the Galactic Bowling League. For those seeking a quick diversion or an extended session, Galactic Bowling promises an entertaining and addictive experience.

The single-player campaign includes 11 distinct characters and environments, offering two play modes: Regular and Battle. Competitive players can engage in head-to-head online multiplayer matches. The gameplay is enhanced with super powers, special balls, and "Whammies." As players progress, they can unlock new characters, environments, and minigames, with the ultimate goal of unlocking all 30 Steam Achievements.

**Alley Cat Bowling** offers a fresh take on ten-pin bowling, turning it into an interactive, **crowd-play experience**. Designed for **Twitch streamers**, this game lets you easily share your gameplay and connect with your audience in a **new and exciting way**.

With Twitch's powerful features, streamers can create **real-time engagement**. Your viewers can join in and **directly impact the game** using chat commands and video feedback. This blends classic bowling, digital fun, and live social streaming into a **dynamic interaction**. The game also adds to the fun with a **growing collection of unique bowling balls** and **different bowling alleys**. To play Alley Cat Bowling, you'll need a **Twitch account** and a **reliable internet connection**.

Name: VR Mini Bowling 2
Description:
VR Mini Bowling returns in this new and improved installment! VR Mini Bowling 2 brings the addition of Powerups, which completely change the way the game is played in this cross between bowling and mini golf! Please Note: If you already own VR Mini Bowling 1, you can use the 'Mini Bowling Upgrade Bundle' to buy VRMB2 at a lower price. If you do not yet own VRMB1, then I only recommend buying VRMB2 as it contains everything that VRMB1 has, plus more! Key Features: Bowling Ball Powerups (Split Ball, Big Ball, Orbit Ball, Fast Ball) 5 scoring modes 5 courses with 10 unique lanes each (including 3 re-imagined legacy courses) Traditional bowling lanes with realistic physics (spin, oil patterns)! Local Multiplayer 24 different bowling balls to choose from (16 unlockable) Personal best statistics for each lane and scoring mode Customizable Sound Effects Adjustable Throw Force Multiplier Global Leaderboards for each scoring mode on each course Improvements: Automatically pick up the ball by pressing the trigger. You no longer have to reach out and grab it (you still can if you want to though...) Re-imagined environments with improved visuals Simplified lobby for easier navigation and multiplayer selection When playing multiplayer, you can now switch players whenever you want. Each player can play thru all lanes at once, switch every 1 lane, every 3 lanes, etc. Multiplayer scoreboards available on all lanes Standard Mode: The newest game mode! Use powerups to boost your game and try to get the highest score possible! No Powerups Mode: Normal bowling rules apply, and no powerups are available. Try to get the highest score possible! Stroke Play Mode: This mode will put your skills to the test! Use powerups to you help knock down all of the pins in as few throws as possible. Rush Play Mode: Speed is the key in this mode. Knock down all of the pins as quickly as possible! You get unlimited throws in this mode so fire away! Normal Bowling Mode: Feel like changing it up and playing a regular game of bowling? You can! Play with or without Powerups, try Active Spin mode (you change the spin on the ball as it goes down the lane) and even change the oil pattern on the lane!

Name: Bomb Bowling 2
Description:
Bomb Bowling 2 is an indie puzzle game with physics. Knock the pins off the screen using explosions. Keep track of what is happening and then select the moment for the accurate click. The sequel of the Bomb Bowling. 50 levels with new contents. Hone your skills before a new challenges!

**Bowling: A Playful Date for Connection**
